* Tennessee House Republicans began the process of expelling House Democrats for protesting pro-gun measures.

* Tennessee House Republicans voted to allow teachers to carry guns in schools.

As Americans across the country rally for life-saving gun control, here’s what Republicans are up to just weeks after the Nashville mass shooting: Ron DeSantis signed a bill allowing permitless carry in Florida. Tennessee House Republicans began the process of expelling House Democrats for protesting pro-gun measures. Tennessee House Republicans voted to allow teachers to carry guns in schools. | = And this isn’t even half of it. Peter, the fight to end gun violence begins at the local level. If we don’t step up now, MAGA Republicans will have nothing standing in their way of pushing more of their “guns everywhere” policies. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun safety champions at all levels of government, but we can’t do it without your support. name: Rick Scott
subject: Re: the next generation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | When I decided to enter the world of politics, I didn’t do it for personal fame or glory.
I first decided to run for office because I saw the future the Left was paving for my children and grandchildren, and I knew I had to do something to stop it.
_**But now, the radical Left’s path for our children is even more treacherous:**_
* They’re being left with TRILLIONS of dollars in debt to pay down.
* They’re inheriting streets full of crime and violence.
* And they’re being taught that they’re inherently evil or racist because of the **color of their skin.**

name: Helen Gym
subject: Our city is only as strong as its public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
Team, I've spent my life fighting for public schools, because I know that public education is the single biggest investment we can make in our future.

As a teacher, activist, and mom, I took on a status quo that slashed school budgets, demonized teachers, and tried to leave our children behind. This morning I visited Steel Elementary School to outline my Schools-First Agenda to Support Philadelphia Children and Families.

I’ll share more on my plan in a moment, but it’s based on my belief that great teachers, strong mentors and fully-resourced school communities can change the course of young people’s lives. We know that investing in a transformative vision for our public schools and our children isn’t just possible, it is a necessity.

If we want a safer and stronger Philadelphia, then it starts with restoring our city by investing in our schools. Add your name in support of my bold vision for strengthening families and growing our city by delivering safe, quality schools for all children. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1sO0H3ww_0CpQHhy5Q00JQ2]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1sO0H3ww_0CpQHhy5Q00JQ2]

Here are the pillars of my plan:

Fighting for a Fully Funded School District with Strong Schools in Every Neighborhood
This means partnering in a statewide coalition to fully fund public education, crafting budgets that reflect Philadelphia’s actual needs, and devoting more City resources to our public schools.

Launching a 10-Year Effort to Modernize Every Philadelphia School
Toxic, dilapidated public school buildings are far too common in Philadelphia. I will kick off a Green New Deal for Philadelphia schools, lead a school repair plan, design schools to meet 21st century learning needs, and provide real playgrounds for every school.

Keeping Children Safe from Morning to Night
Every parent wants a bright and healthy future for their child, and achieving that goal will be my foremost priority. I will lead a mobilization effort to protect every single child while they travel to school and return home, give young people safe places to go year round, address the mental health crisis facing youth, expand social workers in schools, and interrupt violence by supporting the kids most at risk.

Providing an Enriching, Engaging Education for Every Child
I will deliver on the promise of public schools that don’t just improve test scores — but inspire, motivate, and engage children. As Mayor, I’ll expand access to pre-K, champion culturally responsive curriculum, invest in CTE, and expand bilingual education programs.

Fully Staffing Schools with the Talented, Diverse, and Culturally Relevant Workforce Children Need
I’m determined to create pipelines to increase the numbers of teachers of color, eliminate leveling, restore librarians to every school, and invest in school support staff.

Restoring Trust, Increasing Accountability, Promoting Transparency, and Growing the District
I will ensure that both the City and School District engage in a united effort to deliver the schools that Philadelphia deserves. Our priorities include growing enrollment in District schools, providing a responsive partnership with parents, overhauling the high school selection process, improving school transportation services, and engaging neighborhoods to support their schools.

I’ve been delivering solutions like this since long before I had a formal title or political power, and I don’t plan on stopping anytime soon. Will you add your support of my vision to fulfill the promise of education in our city? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1sO0H3ww_0CpQHhy5Q00JQ2]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1sO0H3ww_0CpQHhy5Q00JQ2]

I will lead a schools-first agenda that doesn’t just apply band-aids to long-overlooked crises, but aggressively pursues new streams of state and federal funding to heal our young people and remake our public schools into joyous places to learn and work – where safety is guaranteed, classrooms are fully-staffed, and buildings are equipped for 21st-century learning.

This city will rise or fall with the success of our schools. I’m determined to see it rise.

— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=ErGuuS1hcv2jkY2NNa6UYjuVC1aSfvX%2FgLfNd%2BdS3EoeBoa8T5iJcca%2FWujv11chjYKe4u%2FLr25XGdIUqrDS6k2rWmUWWqu1kr2wSENPR69R59hiN1lPMBG51VIB4VxD96g07C0hdKFY1nsCQXTMZF030yl6NKvGUZZnxlL8m2SYw3P0v87iK%2FGp74gxC3S2pR7S1ezXCEG4JSD8DLH9T%2FWXeL6JIX9KIWhTV4BnrLo0WoK9mhPfUhpVu5C1Z5LBDu52JzyAonxBdZgYbuArGbdHfMqIPRs6OfiI7cAKXwqQIZSqaY0DLLOPURDGiy3%2B9tPLdK1m1uMq0Urr5H24tzpyz5T4y%2BvY88TFOZVliEys73881ZIo9DjL4HEDc1VLIJ5ritzIazZx%2BSrwDgFLeNjcr7sXWSJRkoAnuu6AdTlBpkzA0Wg5hwaFKHaxNx%2F6]

name: Tennessee Update (via DLCC)
subject: Republicans silence Democratic leaders
body:
BREAKING: Two Democratic lawmakers were just EXPELLED from the TN House | | |
---
| | **BREAKING:****Two Democratic lawmakers were just EXPELLED from the Tennessee House** Moments ago, Tennessee GOP lawmakers voted to _remove_ two Democratic House members, all because they joined their constituents in peaceful protests calling for gun safety legislation – after a horrific school shooting in the state _only 10 days ago._ On top of that, the Tennessee House GOP advanced a bill granting permission for teachers to carry guns in schools throughout the state. **This is where their priorities lie.** [ We need to stand strong and united against the GOP’s extremism. body:
This afternoon, the GOP-controlled Tennessee State House voted to expel two Democrats for standing with students to demand action on school shootings. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZDxta_rmckKERplAGsr51uf9sCfvvDwOuoWGVoe3eh51iP3z2qebssiUH-ipnONmCuPoW-b7LPpdLJWfAW2eOGCOfYlkazuBTP9E8qMi38kFqHUEN5cWsEj_D8PR4PMm6ioUVMDI_CK1DvYqZNEPUU_pR8OyG8w9w3F6f501nwkmTZ-rYpB_AOmh9ZqRRa7B9Rzsmb8oaga57W80wYIbIgiCQdpPej8tYw9T1t3TCq__T1u8E5YCWIPiWGJcEoBewN7SGhT9qCd1RHW1rA6nvoZKe7zH1YDEQS0KbERkP9-19i-RSIAM3g4stxRdkgco/3v5/DGQ3IP-yTe-VblrUG0rvmQ/h0/yER1joVbw_l1CPkRxkqVL9bo5t-SDb2kzEsYOTSokbM)

Derek-
---
This afternoon, the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted to **expel two of the #TennesseeThree Democrats** who [stood with students to demand action on school shootings](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDF_EhahDunAKtjeY1qEh5p_yUhZLX23NjPOlycD-tiTWDqX1ayUUR1qPHAAYWnlglRvuSKW-IubszCZyDSYkAGICfNiIalQ59CUNdF3GCQmkOFXpUPR5J9D0w5t_36yyAfgzm5ynfgjnSI6mPR5j8eCQSsAC0UCyjbfqL95H_hyduPWtuZZLCO3lWBbKzKQj7GqteENqCs2-cKW3UMsSi1kJoSKBomE3Y0Hcy0jLL-2IkLDJbOgM76BOd8NlCYLSwsrBQlVypPNkEuZa6dqsgMddbnW8OXgW3LqK62Vi6RNsrFB0d5nyyzA8_0wc2EGKhQ/3v5/DGQ3IP-yTe-VblrUG0rvmQ/h1/mdCVDtvU-0IGbTdhtYUSZa7rgmLrpqjrXRFjUuFhXO0). Yes, you read that right: removed from office for political dissent. Make no mistake: the expulsion of Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson is an attempt to silence the voices calling out the GOP supermajority for their extreme agenda that is putting Tennessee students and families at risk. It's not lost on us that of the three resolutions of expulsion up for debate today, only those to expel young Black men passed. **Today's actions send a clear threat **to Democrats fighting for the lives and dignity of their constituents in GOP-controlled states across the country. The Young Democrats of America stand in solidarity with the Tennessee Three, and condemn the expulsion of Rep. Justin Jones and Rep. Justin Pearson. It's on all of us to help them fight back.**[Click to learn more about how you can join the fight.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDK7b6Fqbor3bYFGUJCwWOArHVpjZn6WroTpStDtNejXbzzbNfyRwn9j29hTgsnnjtsYHnifNBGFH7ot927MrBJ8AHwI8GDeBA8pdWq8rJzius0Qt5pJRp0HSCVwo7sAYP8hmLjLUoy_l3CaYyvX4q1uTNHY08r5XM4LHWPqtZXKw2TdEyhy7_n26mbSBO00QcU0L3zRLFMQ1uE-cKroEPLowxqHtl9boLHIaljh5viFYtjCPrak9uv4D-JpMTZoqUg3MpKiiWy9ZsEeyGCpO4qu-4oXNeMz0Ge6Te0wVSX1q1Xl2I-M0PY2WJS7ovLRirw/3v5/DGQ3IP-yTe-VblrUG0rvmQ/h2/nf9AP3ptUis8G9p0j95LcfT9Gvx8CGZA2qDC0XtcqX8)**

clean_body: This afternoon, the GOP-controlled Tennessee State House voted to expel two Democrats for standing with students to demand action on school shootings. | | Derek- This afternoon, the Republican-controlled Tennessee House of Representatives voted to expel two of the #TennesseeThree Democrats who . Yes, you read that right: removed from office for political dissent. Make no mistake: the expulsion of Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson is an attempt to silence the voices calling out the GOP supermajority for their extreme agenda that is putting Tennessee students and families at risk. It's not lost on us that of the three resolutions of expulsion up for debate today, only those to expel young Black men passed. Today's actions send a clear threat to Democrats fighting for the lives and dignity of their constituents in GOP-controlled states across the country. The Young Democrats of America stand in solidarity with the Tennessee Three, and condemn the expulsion of Rep. Justin Jones and Rep. Justin Pearson. It's on all of us to help them fight back. | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: FW: Exciting Update: Liz Harrington to Keynote the Republican Action Conference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference! | | |
---
|
---
| | Hey Peter,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the news about our fantastic new keynote speaker for the upcoming Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th. We're incredibly excited to have Liz Harrington, Trump's Spokesperson, join us at the event!

As you may know, Liz is a prominent conservative voice and will be sharing her insights on the current political landscape, including the unprecedented indictment of former President Trump. Trust me, [you won't want to miss her speech!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=585e9ef38a&e=6a281f566d)

If you haven't registered yet, now's the time to [secure your spot](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b8f38986f3&e=6a281f566d) and join fellow Republicans for engaging panel discussions, networking opportunities, and an unforgettable experience. Plus, take advantage of our Early Bird Registration for discounted rates.

[Sign up ASAP and join us to hear from Liz Harrington and other inspiring speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=592e8c96c4&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fa3731c5c5&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| Best,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
|
---
| | Peter,

We have some fantastic news for the upcoming 2023 Republican Action Conference! We're thrilled to announce that we've secured none other than Donald Trump's 2024 Campaign Spokesperson, Liz Harrington as our new Keynote Speaker!

Liz Harrington is a prominent conservative voice and a well-respected figure within the Republican Party. As a former National Spokesperson for the Republican National Committee and current Spokesperson for President Trump, she brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the stage.

[Don't miss this exclusive opportunity](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bda1a1b30a&e=6a281f566d) to hear Liz Harrington share her insights on the current political landscape, the future of the Republican Party, and how we can work together to secure victories in upcoming elections.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=42d23b6281&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Join us at the Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d65fda28d7&e=6a281f566d) at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center, for an unforgettable experience. Here's a quick overview of what you can expect:
* Engaging panel discussions and workshops on topics like campaigning, grassroots activism, citizen lobbying, ballot collection, fundraising, and digital media
* A Friday night social reception for networking with fellow Republicans and enjoying a fun-filled evening
* The exclusive Saturday night banquet with Keynote Speaker Liz Harrington

Don't wait – secure your spot at the conference today!
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7a3ed7a572&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| [Take action now and register for the conference to hear from Trump Spokesperson Liz Harrington and connect with other passionate Republicans ready to take back our state in 2023 and 2024.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1cf9762e2a&e=6a281f566d)

We can't wait to see you there!
\- Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/rac2023-reminder-1340880?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

**Our mailing address is:**
Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005
[Add us to your address book](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=722dfc7d2a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=722dfc7d2a).

---

[www.wsrp.org](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=186ba6b650&e=6a281f566d)

name: Alan Keck
subject: I’m tired…
body:
...tired of Kentucky not reaching its potential.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-r/) I don't want to take up too much of your time, but if you're reading this email, you've supported our campaign in some form or fashion. _Whether that be your time, your talent or your treasure -**I want to say 'thank you' for your support.**_[__**Thanks to that support, we 're dropping a new ad today, and since YOU made this possible, I want you to have the exclusive first look:**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-j/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-t/) [📺 WATCH MY NEW AD](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-i/) _With Kentucky at 44th in workforce, 44th in education and 48th in median income, I 'm running to be your next Governor because **I 'm tired...tired of Kentucky not reaching its potential.**_As a father, husband, CEO and mayor, I want to build a Kentucky that is growing, one that has a world-class education system and doesn't only value life at birth, but supports our families beyond it...[ __**and I hope you do too!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-d/) _**Because with just a few short weeks before the primary election,[_we can 't take our foot off the gas._](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-h/)**_[__**So, if you 're willing and able-I hope you'll consider making another donation of your time, talent or treasure to ensuring we make Kentucky win again. **__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-k/)_It doesn 't take much, **but it will take all of us** to accomplish the impossible. __Let 's make Kentucky win again, and give our kids the best and brightest future our blessed Commonwealth can provide._God Bless and talk soon. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-u/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-l-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-o/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail20.com/t/y-u-pfuldt-dytiuyidkd-b/)

name: Freedom First Project
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzM3NTU2In0/SAq6LpU7TB1OT_8SiWTobA)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.**** ****You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzM3NTU2In0/_JkGumvOKlJHjZ7ahQaQbA)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzM3NTU2In0/TZqB0PhchZ-cwqDS4Gc5Lw)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Take the National Survey on Election Fraud
body:
I'll bet you've heard this one before: voter fraud doesn't exist--it's just a ploy.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztclne2i1jvucgbr8ap7ion3pfhdt4rohat7n5b0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hm8or1clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative

I'll bet you've heard this one before: voter fraud doesn't exist--it's just a ploy.

That's the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

Apparently, election fraud only exists when the Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

The reality is that voter fraud does exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left's attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I'm asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [National Survey on Election Fraud >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za5mrqdgvmqfidr7fn4st786narbims1tvgse0lg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hm8or1clh2bs)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive reforms and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute or so to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfrnhtmni0s7a3g87sit3gp1j1b0kkq7c5vss998_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hm8or1clh2bs)

Thank you so much. I look forward to seeing your response.

Regards,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

body:

---
| | Friend, House Republicans created a national strategy to _permanently lose elections for a generation_ : Ban TikTok, an app that 94 million – primarily young Americans – use. The TikTok ban strategy comes at a time when the GOP complains about liberal U.S. social media companies canceling and censoring conservatives. It’s ironic many of these same “conservatives” now agitate to ban a platform owned by an international group that includes several American investors. **_My issue with an outright ban on this social media platform is the massive BIG GOVERNMENT power grab._**
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: No turning back from Trump’s arrest
body:
The charges are bogus, but that’s the point.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04478%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fXChCIgDJhhBhatej4Um8w&sysid=1)
Friend,

**For the first time in our country’s history, a front-runner for the Presidency has been arrested. There is no turning back now. The radical left has escalated their hatred for Donald Trump to a new level. **

The charges are bogus, but that’s the point. They are showing you that they can do it and get away with it, and the radical left-wing media will cheer them on.

I’m afraid for the future of our country. We’ve crossed the Rubicon, and it means war against the radical left-wing activists in control of our media. Their interference with President Trump’s campaign goes too far. If we are to stop the election interference with the media before 2024, it means we must destroy their reputations fully.

[**I am calling for your immediate support. Can you donate $35, $50, $100, or more to the Media Research Center (MRC) and help me destroy the leftwing media?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04479%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2frJ7TMq7SOT%2fHBTUlAirMQ&sysid=1)

_When I founded the Media Research Center (MRC) in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media._ Now, Americans are losing their faith in the media. It is my personal goal to ruin what remains of their reputation before 2024.

MRC’s assault on the leftwing media is working!
* This week Disney announced 7,000 layoffs, including dozens of top executives at ABC News.

* Last week NPR laid off 10% of its employees.

* And in just the last 6 months, NBC News, Washington Post, MSNBC, and Vox have all reduced their staff.

Why? Because the American public isn’t buying their nonsense anymore!

[**Please rush your support today to help me defeat the radical leftwing media >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04480%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CjqyG12ZQl1B6MjogWF8Xw&sysid=1)

How does MRC expose the media’s hatred for America?

**FIRST:** The MRC monitors and clips videos of all content from major networks, social media accounts, and news outlets. They have over 900,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

**SECOND:** My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and media bias.

**THIRD:** MRC’s team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

**_The media must be held accountable and exposed during their coverage of President Trump’s arrest. I am asking for your help to raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours. Please send your urgent support by selecting an amount to contribute today. _**

I know it sounds like a lot, but frankly, it’s a drop in the bucket to what the left is spending with their woke corporations. George Soros spent MILLIONS to influence the media. I don’t have leftwing billionaires to support us. I am counting on your help today.

Brent Bozell

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Why Good Friday Instead Of Dark Friday? | From The Desk Of Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
The Dark Part Comes Before The Good Part Today is Good Friday. It is an interesting title for what was the DARKEST Friday in human history: the Son
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11682.1.3c44a66f2375dbf96c0e391d9b36453f) |
---
## The Dark Part Comes Before The Good Part
---
|
---
**Today is Good Friday.**
It is an interesting title for what was the **DARKEST** Friday in human history: the **Son of God** was crucified on a wooden cross.
**Why do we call it Good Friday and not Dark Friday?**
The answer is simply because there is no **Resurrection Sunday** without **Crucifixion Friday** therefore, it was a Good Friday for us.
Often in life, to get to the good part we have to _travel through the dark part_ yet so many quit during the dark part.
Last Sunday, I preached a message on this very thing entitled "[Full Circle](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11683.1.494b9ee2c3dd99020d061c2c581c7ba8)."
I believe it will help you if you are in the dark part, to get to the good part.
Watch here: [https://youtube.com/live/9QLGgZ3XF00](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11684.1.114d48a1eb08cbca8d872ea080c3360e)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11685.1.17522520dcdd06a2831009ff3c4ab61d), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11686.1.6f4608d6fb8c849fd525c51f17916866), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11687.1.bbf199fbdbc001db5a1c218cfb2fa030), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11688.1.f03874fbf9e288763f6dbc2cd91523ff), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11689.1.f1d5003efaff0e3ec45b0167028bccb5), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20363514.11690.1.eb7d9c2c600e6e878e73931bf7e62c25)).

My name is Kash Patel, and I founded the Kash Foundation. We work with litigation grants for specific cases and help fund all the legal work, compile documentation about declassified docs, fight to get important docs declassified, and shed light on Deep State corruption. Now, we’re expanding our mission to help patriots and whistler blowers battle the Deep State in the courts.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: His insights reveal the truth
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za9chefkd92e4r7hbqrcb6ggie7sof3qggo6muu8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmcob1chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we’d like to share with you today. It’s the trailer for our free online course,**[“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zevgfam824pnli7sdjeb1g1magqckb18ni32j480_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmcob1chh2bs)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below:** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmfloioeu3tqo0216qsc9l65bv9tjfusgdn80ug_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmcob1chh2bs)**_
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4eqmnctf24q6uekmsrmampb14u0mu0ss98j0obo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmcob1chh2bs)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That’s why we have produced this course, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis’s writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we’re thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward—one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis—as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you’ll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by[registering for this free online course](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv94c0bniuhrfuqgl4c9s7m9pcol3rk6e5b66at0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmcob1chh2bs). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****.** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis—enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Take the National Survey on Election Fraud
body:
I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: voter fraud doesn’t exist--it’s just a ploy.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1WxMLeX5lJ39EPdf0NhADw&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative

I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: voter fraud doesn’t exist--it’s just a ploy.

That’s the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

Apparently, election fraud only exists when the Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

The reality is that voter fraud does exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left’s attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I’m asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [National Survey on Election Fraud >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q9cC68ytO3PWnQ91b2tEgg&sysid=1)

Your answers will help us pressure lawmakers to pursue aggressive reforms and hold those who enable fraud legally accountable.

The survey should only take a minute or so to complete, but your input is invaluable to this work. You can get started right now using the secure link below:

[https://secured.heritage.org/voter-fraud-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654239%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YsUrkYfw2Orw8tnw79dwTw&sysid=1)

Thank you so much. I look forward to seeing your response.

Regards,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Update

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksbm2lrvk42vokp88df8vs1ss0tkkdl32b644gg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7nb56toeddv4v5bvgd5nlj2q8ref53g7ph7ngs8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkldubh565h06sd2132sprbb0o8po90fl07ja9tg_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjd24t7h8pb9sjt5vv003rlmbk4oveeto4bo9fb8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrq5dih21ok0u7ergetnvtlu40gmq0phv0kuov38_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8h4ugdejp48qb5sfol50iici2od19conlk6i3ng_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgn6a3061hajnmsl2q4qd53u51p8riahd8otofdo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze5vj74i7eo9n6uh7dbs2cgtkbsqljdl7b9pfjoo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zac6ho803b64kkos0e1rqn2jssfoekbgie8n7mf0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpie787nnto4606opc1kqnh20ucpg2t9nfu5oco0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs6up13iqvhmj45c775g6q10nho41f42gvh406lo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk823dsf6o1g9et3bihk1lvabghb53opts28baio_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc5fbtc28mkkbk6drgi4po98nqghc0d7al3mssag_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmaoj6c5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: David Horowitz
subject: Trump: 2024 is the final battle
body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information

| |
---
| |
---
| | I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. My latest book **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztae0lh9q63ml8g40afde9rgajbb55p7nolr20ro_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)”[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zod8ft5f8h0tldg9uqo6mdkv8evsol74vqc2tuf8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)** lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot.But don’t take my word for it – take the word of Donald Trump and other patriots concerned for America’s future.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgsqldd635fhaopgdt5ni6h37u31nn1cq7upkrjo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)

| | |

| |

| "David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."
---
**\-- Dinesh D’Souza****New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**
---
| | |

| |
---
| _"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”
---
**\-- Dennis Prager****Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | |
---
| | **With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my must-read new book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.**Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfgprcslkorbdb9ka9s2n1cj48055dun78qtc238_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)”**They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqutng8kp2ad8akc4ohp3gth1lh8u7rdi54eoffo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)
---
| | You see, 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end...
---
**_I was one of them... before I saw the truth..._**
---
| | That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out— because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine for radical Marxists.But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country.That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **[Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z40fatvkj7mo05cpgvc3umc3pvja85i0sc7mrh4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)** **That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.** The Left thrives when no one knows what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, or who’s helping them do it. That is why I’ve dedicated my life to exposing the methods and motives of the radical left to American patriots like you.
---
| | In Freedom,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. As Trump said in his speech in Waco, TX: “2024 is the final battle, it’s going to be the big one.” We must arm as many Americans as we can with the truth about 2020 and the leftist plans for America. **Will you donate $35 today so I can mail you your copy right away?**
---
[Send me my copy of
**__Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last__**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvcp7b85o2k08ajkiumtrn469r2c7763toi8o0oo_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3hmeo36c3h2bs)

name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Why BLEXIT is joining Turning Point USA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsa390hD4N

BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the
Left's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is
joining Turning Point USA

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osa390hD4N

Fellow
American,

Candace
Owens here - and I've got exciting news.

BLEXIT --
the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left's
victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is joining
Turning Point USA!

Alongside
my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and
grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to:

Defeat
toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory -
getting them out of our kids' classrooms forever,

Free
black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's
victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American
Dreams, and

Win
against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe
with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased "educators," Big
Tech, and more!

To
accomplish these massive - and important goals - I must raise
$100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25,
$50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

When the
BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer even
more life-changing programs … expose even more of the
Left's toxic and racist lies … and reach even more
minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I
thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right
away.

That's
because, in the fight to save America from the Left, Turning
Point USA is the real deal - organizing 600,000+ student
activists to FIGHT and WIN today's Culture War.

But to
hit the ground running in this exciting new partnership, I must
raise $100,000 as soon as possible.

Will you
stand alongside me, my friend Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA,
and TPUSA's BLEXIT programs by making your gift of $25, $50, $75,
$100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

In 2018,
I founded BLEXIT to inspire Black Americans to turn away from the
victimhood mentality and to reject the Left's new "plantation" of
the mind.

Now, in
2023, I'm proud to have BLEXIT work alongside Turning Point USA
to expose even more of the Left's toxic and racist lies and reach
even more Americans with TPUSA's inspiring, pro-America message -
that teaches every American to love our country again, work hard,
and pursue their American Dream!

Today I'm
counting on your help to hit the ground running. Will you please
make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500,
or more today to help me reach our critical $100,000 goal?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

Working
together with Turning Point USA, BLEXIT will inspire MILLIONS
more young people from all backgrounds to escape the Left's
"Woke" dystopia and to love America once more.

If you're
with me, please make your gift right now.

Time is
running out -- I hope to hear from you today!

Candace
Owens
Chair of
BLEXIT
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I have never been more determined than I am right now.

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654246%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Xhj%2fb7jC7hSH7AohM7rWSA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed yesterday was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden’s Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we’ve witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654247%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v8MKYchGPyZn1kh%2bBqgqQw&sysid=1)**

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they’re entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans took their masks off in Tennessee, and these state legislators need your help to win special elections after an unjust expulsion.
body:
The masks slipped again
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16fccd93-f05b-4b87-a59f-d97bf4a09124/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Since we watched yet another slaughter of our children, in Tennessee, the masks, or should I say hoods, have come off Republican state legislators._** _Over the past few days, students marched to the statehouse to protest the fact that after the latest mass shooting in Nashville, Republicans planned to do nothing._ **_Three Democratic state legislators: Reps Justin Jones, Justin Pearson and Gloria Johnson_** **_joined the students in protesting. _**_For that they were threatened with expulsion by the Republican majority in an unprecedented move by the MAGA Republicans. The Democrats had broken no laws, they had just peacefully protested._ _Yet, in this state where the Ku Klux Klan was founded, where 50 years ago to the week Martin Luther King Jr., gave the final speech of his life, _**_Pearson and Jones--both Black--were expelled. Johnson, who's white, was not. When asked by the media why she was spared, and not her colleagues, an angry Johnson said it "might have to do with the color of our skin."_** **_Jones, in his final speech, pointed out Republicans didn't expel their own members for child molestation and domestic violence. _** **_Pearson and Jones can run for their seats again in a special election. _**[**_We must send them back to the state house, because Republicans cannot get away with racism and attacks on our democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5d6cf50-6712-4a9f-90e9-536497d1d5c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Will you join Blue Amp in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the courageous Justin Jones and Justin Pearson as they run to win back the seats Republicans just stole from them and their constituents?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T414ef59c-81aa-4458-9bc6-13de91075294/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for never giving in to attacks on our democracy._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Sick of inflation? We have a plan
body:
Right now, America’s fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding $230,000 per U.S. household!

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CwLgRJQnvhpJl4xPoRKreA&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. But if you’re like most Americans, then you’re probably feeling the strain of the soaring inflation caused by our federal government’s unconscionable spending sprees.

**Right now, America’s fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding _$230,000 per U.S. household!_**

And if this debt goes unchecked, it may place a crippling tax burden on everyday Americans and could even set off another financial crisis with everyday Americans like you and me to foot the bill.

**Please join other concerned conservatives in demanding Congress curtail inflation, reduce taxes, and end its reckless spending spree by completing the quick 1-minute survey linked below:**

**[http://secured.heritage.org/inflation-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04406%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bdNh9Yu%2fvoO%2bn3l9RFglnQ&sysid=1)**

American families simply _cannot_ afford to get caught up in a vicious circle of rising interest rates, soaring inflation, economic stagnation, and ever-increasing debt.

[**Demand responsible stewardship of taxpayer dollars and a return to limited federal spending by completing your survey now »**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04407%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t4deneySVwY5Wz%2bq1oBRjw&sysid=1)

Armed with your answers, The Heritage Foundation will work side by side with conservative legislators on your behalf to advance meaningful fiscal reform and pressure Congress to stop wasting _your_ money on frivolous federal spending.

The more people who complete this survey, the louder our collective voice. Please complete your survey now by clicking the link below--it will only take about a minute of your time:

**[http://secured.heritage.org/inflation-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04406%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bdNh9Yu%2fvoO%2bn3l9RFglnQ&sysid=1)**

Gratefully,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

clean_body: Right now, America’s fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding $230,000 per U.S. household! | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I hope this email finds you well. But if you’re like most Americans, then you’re probably feeling the strain of the soaring inflation caused by our federal government’s unconscionable spending sprees. Right now, America’s fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding $230,000 per U.S. household! And if this debt goes unchecked, it may place a crippling tax burden on everyday Americans and could even set off another financial crisis with everyday Americans like you and me to foot the bill. Please join other concerned conservatives in demanding Congress curtail inflation, reduce taxes, and end its reckless spending spree by completing the quick 1-minute survey linked below: American families simply cannot afford to get caught up in a vicious circle of rising interest rates, soaring inflation, economic stagnation, and ever-increasing debt. Armed with your answers, The Heritage Foundation will work side by side with conservative legislators on your behalf to advance meaningful fiscal reform and pressure Congress to stop wasting your money on frivolous federal spending. The more people who complete this survey, the louder our collective voice. Please complete your survey now by clicking the link below--it will only take about a minute of your time: Gratefully, Andrew P. name: U.S. Justice Foundation
subject: Are they hiding it from the media?
body:
The radical left has not given up on fighting for DC Statehood.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "Headline") Peter: Joe Biden said he stands with those supporters of DC Statehood, but then he went along with the Republican Party and signed the DC Crime Bil. The radical left tried to claim that DC Statehood was D.O.A., but something must have changed because my inbox is flooded with emails that say otherwise and these emails are from both Democrats as well as Republican Senators. **The DC Insiders must know more than the media has been reporting.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "Report") **[Please chip in to help us keep Americans from being duped by the Media. We can't be caught flat-footed when Biden starts pressuring the U.S. Senate to vote in favor of D.C. Statehood.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "Please chip in to help us keep Americans from being duped by the
Media. We can’t be caught flat-footed when Biden starts pressuring the U.S. Senate to vote in favor of D.C. Statehood.")** While we may not have 100% of the facts about the posture of this bill especially when Congress is in recess--one thing is clear: The radical left has not given up on fighting for DC Statehood. **That means we can 't let up in our opposition to that unconstitutional power grab!** **[You MUST help us defeat DC Statehood, and that requires YOUR financial support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "You MUST help us defeat DC Statehood, and that requires YOUR
financial support.")** With 51 Democrats in the U.S. Senate, the odds of defeating it get slim if we remain on the sidelines and silent. We must remain actively engaged and vocal in our opposition. Chuck Schumer and AOC are clearly mustering their liberal hordes to continue a pressure campaign on the U.S. Senate and the White House. With the fate of Biden's political career and legacy at stake, there's no way he doesn't end up caving into the demands of the radical left and pushing hard on Senators to pass D.C. Statehood before the 2024 election. **We cannot stress how important it is that we do not give up for a moment.** **[Please rush a donation to help us STOP DC STATEHOOD before it's too late! Your support will help us continue our efforts to educate Americans whom the media is trying to deceive.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "Please rush a donation to help us STOP DC STATEHOOD before
it’s too late! Your support will help us continue our efforts to educate Americans whom the media is trying to deceive.")** D.C. Statehood is unconstitutional, and it would effectively make D.C. a state that votes with the far left 100% of the time. The radical left is going to work overtime to ensure they obtain this power grab by any means necessary even if that means they need to keep it from their friends in the media. **[Help us fight them before it's too late!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62530490:JSpw6eGEN:m:1:3331421248:4751AF6941B5006EECBA8401DE21C74A:r "Help us fight them before it’s too late!")** Thank you, James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79761%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K3WPw%2fUAPzJaLSbqS3%2bX4g&sysid=1)
---

Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party’s payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg’s unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79762%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jM9ZoJWTlbz66K2o%2bU0bEg&sysid=1) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79763%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnyuxnWMiVuTJhv3opHgpQ&sysid=1) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left’s weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: You oughta be frustrated by this!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
The Left wants to destroy this man, let's help him where we can. |
---

Fellow American,

I'm sure you are frustrated and upset about everything going on in New York - you oughta be!

This is an outrage. They are bending the law to go after President Trump, so let's do something about it. The Left wants to destroy this man - we NEED to help him where we can.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61679238:WuZSghDN-:m:1:877327319:449F41744F15218F08E038837948B063:r)
We've seen what the Left can do when they want to destroy conservative leaders. They tried to tear down Justice Brett Kavanaugh. They attacked Justice Amy Coney Barrett. They spent President Trump's entire presidency pulling out every charge from their playbook they could think of.

I think there is a never-ending effort to destroy Donald Trump and everything around him.

We've got to fight back with all that we have in the tank if we want to be successful in 2024.

Let's do two things, Fellow American:
1. **Secure the Senate** in 2024. We are only two seats away from a senate majority, and there are three Democrat incumbents up for re-election in **ruby red states**. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in '24.
2. Let's get behind President Trump and give him another term so he can turn the country around!

**[Your generous contribution today will be split between these two great causes and Team Graham. Can President Trump and Senate Republicans count on you to RUSH a split donation of $5, $10, or more right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61679238:WuZSghDN-:m:1:877327319:449F41744F15218F08E038837948B063:r)**

This indictment is one of the most shocking, dangerous, and irresponsible decisions in American history by any prosecutor. We cannot stand by and let Democrats like NY District Attorney Alvin Bragg continue to use the courtroom to score cheap political points with the far-left base.

The best way we can fight back is to VOTE next year, but you can help NOW by sending a campaign contribution to our most winnable seats.

**[We need your help, Fellow American. $5, $10, or even $20.24 will help us support President Trump and Secure the Senate in '24.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61679238:WuZSghDN-:m:1:877327319:449F41744F15218F08E038837948B063:r) **

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61679238:WuZSghDN-:m:1:877327319:449F41744F15218F08E038837948B063:r)
Lindsey Graham

| [**WATCH NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61679238:WuZSghDN-:m:1:877327319:449F41744F15218F08E038837948B063:r)
---

He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=734955d97b2842769c9e763d371b3448&_e=ZiUbAT-2y75-B8piUrojWaPHrPwFHBSX30g6ihLQhzBfS8JgMYmoS8pi--3HDp9uKyTwmItNNYCcQzG6vqApfWtDcMTtPLGK5uGI6bq8Ku472JDggPboYmet8K-Gi7XuYjy9Tv4BkrzmCFQxyDgNgMDSx3KvhTFj1KFIJ0X-IBkpw0WYgJ2h-aG32a5swtY9kjp4LpADIcAy89c3WFDsoQFm_Lfar-TE_7AbHgqCLJa6iqdroJc4hpU8U5e6DG7f0yQufeWtnXzLMpMezfnqg1kW4QUPx4eE7U-nDGM1swUK-oT3d2i9ZygR7EQ5WS0yuXVfo8iXaeT3_cFzDzDNRwrGoRZ8tg8vop33XDPAhOYFOxqdX7hIZLHgGlS6pVSoq1SoMBXO8d6MzO6_wLGy2255uRPa2Ed9JISzeOscK2s%3D) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus_--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=734955d97b2842769c9e763d371b3448&_e=ZiUbAT-2y75-B8piUrojWaPHrPwFHBSX30g6ihLQhzBfS8JgMYmoS8pi--3HDp9uKyTwmItNNYCcQzG6vqApfWtDcMTtPLGK5uGI6bq8Ku472JDggPboYmet8K-Gi7XuYjy9Tv4BkrzmCFQxyDgNgMDSx3KvhTFj1KFIJ0X-IBkpw0WYgJ2h-aG32a5swtY9kjp4LpADIcAy89c3WFDsoQFm_Lfar-TE_7AbHgqCLJa6iqdroJc4hpU8U5e6DG7f0yQufeWtnXzLMpMezfnqg8X4P-iXdU7k3bwmNrGDkoEECwCAzOXFtHn8vYljsA7EvRyfdeKe2kB3SfrjFAYCqSfUzQ3CDZE4aUpBgOfRCHw1I3SclUWvkVMUqnRZThc0P2pRC5eAQvway-JGnkCD_PKLN4LSFLAidIx7FEvkJ_Y%3D) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. ** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. ** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _ The New York Times_' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will... **
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our "Liberty Walk." clean_body: I have a special gift for you This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include George Washington and Thomas Jefferson ... Abraham Lincoln and Frederick Douglass ... Winston Churchill , Margaret Thatcher , and Ronald Reagan. All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times ' "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of Imprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
