clean_body: Growing up on a family farm, I’ve always known the importance of being up before the sun and starting the day off right. I wake up bright and early, start a pot of strong coffee, and get to work. | | | = Good morning, Peter! Growing up on a family farm, I’ve always known the importance of being up before the sun and starting the day off right. I wake up bright and early, start a pot of strong coffee, and get to work. Today, the first thing on my list was to get this email out to you. We’re heading into a holiday weekend, and I know many people will be spending time with friends and family celebrating Easter or Passover. Before we all log off, I have a quick ask. This is the first week of Q2, and we want to make sure we keep the momentum we built in Q1 and surpass it. = I know it’s early, but how great will the rest of your day go knowing you already did your part to protect our democracy? Thanks for your support, and have a beautiful day! ☀️ – Mariah Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country – because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic.

clean_body: Our country is dying, but we will save it! Our country is dying, but we will save it! | | | Friend, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face 136 YEARS IN PRISON for having committed NO CRIME. But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself. I felt sorry for our country – because this is NOT America. Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic. | Thank you, | Donald J. | | **" That's why this is the moment to make sure that, when the Judge examines your life, you have placed your faith in Jesus Christ's death and resurrection for the forgiveness of your sins."**
In light of Trump's arrest, the great Rev. Franklin Graham just spoke out on what will guide us through any trying time.
Because at this moment, America needs God more than ever.
**Faith in God in America is already at an all-time low.**
**Democrats have just pledged $45 million to wipe out Christian Republicans.**
**And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.**
Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Republicans will never show up to the polls again. Then they'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties.

What’s happening in Tennessee right now is infuriating. After the horrific act of gun violence that happened in Nashville, voters and gun violence prevention advocates protested at the Tennessee state House to urge their lawmakers to finally pass meaningful gun reform. Three House representatives — Justin Jones, Justin J. Pearson, and Gloria Johnson — joined the protest. The Republican-controlled House voted to punish the three lawmakers by stripping their committee assignments. And last night, they voted to expel Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson — two Black men — from the House. **Special elections will be held soon to fill their seats — and they both have the chance to run again. So, let’s make sure they have the resources they need to win, stay in office, and keep up the fight for gun safety legislation.** [_**If you’re able please split a contribution between Justin Jones and Justin J. >
What these House Republicans are doing is anti-democratic, extremist, shameful, and downright racist.
Instead of responding to a mass shooting with meaningful action that will protect our children and our communities, they’re focused on silencing and expelling two Black men who are rightfully sounding the alarm on this issue — and silencing the people of Tennessee, too.
This is not what democracy looks like — and we must fight back.
[_**We desperately need both Justin Jones and Justin J. Pearson’s voices in this fight. Friend, Justice Clarence Thomas has got to go.
**A new report has revealed that he VIOLATED ethics laws by failing to disclose luxury vacations paid for by a far-right megadonor.**

Over the past two decades, Justice Thomas has accepted MILLIONS in the form of private jet rides, jaunts on a superyacht and stays at an exclusive private resort. One trip alone was worth more than $500,000!
**The scale of this corruption borders on ridiculous – but it's far from shocking.**
Last year, we learned that his MAGA extremist wife, Ginni Thomas, was personally pressing Trump's Chief of Staff Mark Meadows to overturn the 2020 election results. And, her husband was the ONLY justice to vote against allowing the release of records proving Trump's plans to order military seizure of voting machines. **Thomas' corruption and seditious actions run deep – and they pose a serious threat to the integrity of the court.**
**Especially after these new reports, it is UNACCEPTABLE for Justice Thomas to continue serving on the Supreme Court.**

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden’s Scandals Demand Accountability!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Thanks to our members’ commitment****, Judicial Watch has become the American people 's true "independent counsel." **
We are the unrivalled national leader with _independent research and uncompromisingly thorough investigations concerning government corruption_. Our aim is to challenge government secrecy more aggressively this year than we ever have...but [we need you to join the Judicial Watch team!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

We are investigating these serious scandals to bring accountability where it is overdue:

* The _disastrous and lawless failure_ of the **Biden administration** to enforce **U.S. immigration law** , creating an historically unprecedented wave of out-of-control illegal immigration at our southern border

* The **mounting scandals surrounding President Joe Biden** , ranging from his stonewalling (**with the complicit University of Delaware**) our open-records request and lawsuit for his U.S. Senate records; his mishandling of classified documents; and significant evidence of sleazy overseas business deals engineered by his son, **Hunter** , which may have well enriched the president himself

* The**ongoing corrupt politicization of the U.S. Department of Justice** under Biden Attorney General Merrick Garland -- who has "weaponized" the Department and is targeting parents who opposed **Critical Race Theory** as potential terrorists and suing states that have enacted commonsense election reforms to protect ballot integrity

* And unlike the mainstream media, _we have not walked away_ from **digging into federal government contacts with, and grants given to the controversial Wuhan Institute of Virology in China** , now conceded by the federal government to be the likeliest source of the Covid-19 pandemic.

I ask you to endorse our essential investigative work designed to get to the facts and share what we learn [with the American people [by supporting our work with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**Your support right now is especially important because...**
...no matter who is in the White House or who controls Congress, _America needs Judicial Watch as an independent non-partisan watchdog whose loyalty is to the rule of law, the U.S. Constitution and the American people 's right to know what its government is up to_.
Although it is gratifying that the Republican House leadership is now following our lead on investigating _some_ of these issues, _we cannot let up_ ...on our own independent investigations _or_ on keeping pressure on Congress to fulfill its oversight responsibilities!
And that's why I am asking you _[to help underwrite our independent investigations with a generous tax-deductible gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)_ ...because our investigations come with real price tags!
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

As you know, far too many scandals have been ignored or swept under the rug by "business as usual" **Republican** _and_**Democratic** politicians on Capitol Hill.
That's why we do what we do...and why we are "the only game in town" that Americans can rely on to break through the walls of government secrecy and investigate, expose and, when necessary, prosecute public corruption.
**_Day in and day out, we fight hard in local, state and federal courts for transparency and accountability from our government_ ...._and we 're accustomed to winning these fights_!**
Few have fought as hard...or as successfully...as Judicial Watch to enforce laws that support honest elections, _especially those that help guarantee that only eligible U.S. citizens vote in our elections_.
_And we are exposing the abuse of taxpayer dollars in funding Critical Race Theory (CRT) in schools and other public institutions_ ...while also suing school districts and administrators on behalf of teachers fired from their jobs because they dare to criticize CRT propaganda and other leftist policies in schools.
We are also taking on the radical Left by challenging unconstitutional quota programs and laws (in **California, Minnesota** and **North Carolina**) that attempt to divide Americans based on race, gender, ethnicity and sexual orientation!
[**But we need your help to stay on track with all our investigations, as well as our lawsuits!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Supported with your best gift today, I can promise you we will keep working successfully to honor the trust you place in us as _America 's most effective government watchdog_!
Thank you, in advance, for making a tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch today!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62878&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

The national GOP is fuming about our success in Georgia, and they’re going to be shoveling money into Georgia in an effort to halt our momentum. body:
Together.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61431764/400066569/823540626?refcode=ea.cfc44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cfc44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM0NDA2MC00OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTsHcXRQsMbwUP1HzuR_rfsNEfX8jSyUQuKwVXHdmm8=&emci=2d6601ff-c8d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cfc44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, expanding Medicaid is a tremendous achievement for North Carolina. It’s important that we have been able to deliver on our promise of making health care more accessible and affordable for the people of our state. It’s been a priority of mine for years, and when I met with President Biden last month, I told him that I hope our success will inspire the remaining 10 states that have yet to pass Medicaid Expansion to do so. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61431765/400066571/676408098?refcode=ea.cfc44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cfc44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM0NDA2MC00OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTsHcXRQsMbwUP1HzuR_rfsNEfX8jSyUQuKwVXHdmm8=) **I’ve promised President Biden that I’ll continue to do everything possible to support his agenda for America.** Giving more people better quality health care, protecting our democracy and our most fundamental rights, finding solutions to fight climate change, improving our infrastructure and creating good-paying jobs. These are the things that we _must_ do to move America forward. North Carolina will have a key role to play in the presidential election next year. We are a true toss-up state — and I _know_ that 2024 is the year we can turn it blue for President, Governor, the Legislature and other Democrats. **Together, we can re-elect President Biden and elect Democrats at every level of the ballot.** **[Peter, can I count on you to help me as we lay the groundwork for success in 2024? body:
They have some really rich friends in common who like to give them big money.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61431782/400066617/754863273?refcode=em_header&refcode2=d0c44060-48d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=HD6AlKXQyn0QNrxQrAiRTsaaSLGPCdJ6V7a6qy5ONAR1+EhgIEPY2Mto+V1IOMxCEwCNNTI0vGxScMwzm6NfRQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODQzNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGM0NDA2MC00OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFX8aUVCOKqPNjo_q0y6Pbet_-bK2Y6_RO26aJOjm9o=)
Peter -
Yesterday we learned Clarence Thomas has been accepting luxury vacations paid for by a Republican billionaire mega-donor.
We also learned that the same mega-donor is a big fan of Kyrsten Sinema’s work — donating to her as she blocked the Democratic budget bill.
This is what we are up against.

We also learned that the same mega-donor is a big fan of Kyrsten Sinema’s work — donating to her as she blocked the Democratic budget bill. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: An American Tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d371a81be0ac4d8e942ab6ca11b62454&_e=x0e8azJQJ0XUcMM9vpqPuEYI0Ulmy8lw5UrYw1bmxqBjYchBQATwKFKQoeh3QwhQpNsXh0dP2BpL85ZRs7hZgK5YUhiE5xXq69ubgE8kY64JnSmQQydLSqkWaIcSa9NeAXnSTK-1rhwVPcmCqi1ZEGQo-4wyl4B3NsR6bxrIdxXR_pl807AXPkTvhIiEDuUcSV5b9M-KN7Qsla1E52fLUMRKibap1_Ac3f9FbNskNQYo1kz7jYQt_oqXnkcQGfGb6Cj7oJQilsOaYceW0-auEk13YxaXGceBXJjhsTBOF6CbmWPDRjhcgeDIqGxc0RII-uDmoyeqy5_RRoynFpG_LxM_i6Guh9mm62Ni6waQRvlhYpucWWGBE6OK8O1OB8ly)

Peter, This is a tragedy.

A new poll shows that Americans are pulling back from the core values that make our country strong.

**Patriotism, family, and religious faith are all afterthoughts for the new generation, and there’s one clear group to blame: America’s socialist Left.**

Friend, these are the values that built America into the greatest country in the world - and they’re the values I put my life on the line to protect in the U.S. Navy.

**If we don’t save our values before it’s too late, America as we know it will be a thing of the past.**

[**Join me today and win the fight for American values!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d371a81be0ac4d8e942ab6ca11b62454&_e=x0e8azJQJ0XUcMM9vpqPuEYI0Ulmy8lw5UrYw1bmxqBjYchBQATwKFKQoeh3QwhQpNsXh0dP2BpL85ZRs7hZgK5YUhiE5xXq69ubgE8kY64JnSmQQydLSqkWaIcSa9NeAXnSTK-1rhwVPcmCqi1ZEGQo-4wyl4B3NsR6bxrIdxXR_pl807AXPkTvhIiEDuUcSV5b9M-KN7Qsla1E52fLUEluwLVHGAdngjy4M2QBtQ_HeRLfkfFZWOZ9mdO3j7sjsJNDa350gG_j6orjkSwTyY_HSmdzoiZ8tOD-hq3dTR1zZvUzy9USf-KtQfx-aFjvWM-yPrkni6Qbcd4vqvBF8Bl-fY2YYnXSoWGxWk0JkJ8V7JO7nbKenbbZrBG7UOFA)

[**FIGHT FOR OUR VALUES**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d371a81be0ac4d8e942ab6ca11b62454&_e=x0e8azJQJ0XUcMM9vpqPuEYI0Ulmy8lw5UrYw1bmxqBjYchBQATwKFKQoeh3QwhQpNsXh0dP2BpL85ZRs7hZgK5YUhiE5xXq69ubgE8kY64JnSmQQydLSqkWaIcSa9NeAXnSTK-1rhwVPcmCqi1ZEGQo-4wyl4B3NsR6bxrIdxXR_pl807AXPkTvhIiEDuUcSV5b9M-KN7Qsla1E52fLUFCNmNy-PhMjrAp91BKfI3ffRt7dTWsZ-BIpquXcSmUKzjAueTyjEMpiP_D6BAkWgOdE4IX7dVbTucp4dQUExJUnfOyhRl-517BYjw_atINhVxk3QqorMOCZDWNVeBGj0c7Y-d40BEVJnP2YSHr5GqYyfdB-rLDDjp0J6VwpKEYn)
---
Peter, my family and I came to America with little besides the clothes on our backs.

But we loved this country from the moment we stepped foot on American soil, and we owe our lives to the freest country on Earth.

_But now, that freedom that has saved so many lives is in jeopardy._

[**The fight to defend American values starts with hardworking patriots like you, and I need you to step up now and protect our way of life. Join our fight for values today!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=d371a81be0ac4d8e942ab6ca11b62454&_e=x0e8azJQJ0XUcMM9vpqPuEYI0Ulmy8lw5UrYw1bmxqBjYchBQATwKFKQoeh3QwhQpNsXh0dP2BpL85ZRs7hZgK5YUhiE5xXq69ubgE8kY64JnSmQQydLSqkWaIcSa9NeAXnSTK-1rhwVPcmCqi1ZEGQo-4wyl4B3NsR6bxrIdxXR_pl807AXPkTvhIiEDuUcSV5b9M-KN7Qsla1E52fLUBtiRwHvfQCLwXpitv1kypL-xME1js5Q_etj6HwyjZ8wp3ASktsl--JGLJYep9qCmcNIxQHjQzh3eZD6b8vqN6dKbrhYG9g1PWwseeT_8kl542lc-VsgGdk2UU2NLNTidVfY9-WAv9AacL3iIdvR75CqxbiPdD-LREHejP9xb2TG)

---
Peter, After years of Republican control, we are putting our foot down and saying enough. Indiana has an F rated quality-of-life for families, a D- rated workforce, and our education system and maternal mortality rates are running far behind other states. We are consistently rated as having among the lowest quality of life in the categories that matter most. Lisa says that she was lucky that her first bosses were strong women who reinforced the values of working hard, creating a level playing field, and extending a hand to those who need it.
Those values inform the work we do here on Team Lisa.
Our campaign holds those values up as our north star, and we can’t fully deliver on them if we fall short of our fundraising goals.
April is off to a slow start and we’re counting on your help. It’s a big ask, but are you able to make a $300 donation? If not, we completely understand. It’s a lot of money! Could you chip in $10 instead? It would go a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230407_wknd]
With Republicans in the House Majority and campaign experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we show financial strength - especially at this point in the election cycle.
We know your money is hard-earned, and we don’t ask lightly. Anything you can give ahead of the weekend will make a huge difference.
Here’s the link again. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-apr2023?refcode=EM_FR_20230407_wknd]
Thank you very much,
Team Lisa
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

**

He’ll do whatever he can to DESTROY President Biden and his powerful Democratic agenda... _so we’re making a HUGE call to Democrats everywhere._

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Our endeavor for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Smiley Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Smiley for Washington Inc
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
Peter, It's Tiffany Smiley.
Last year, my Senate race made national headlines as I sent a 30-year incumbent scrambling to hold onto her seat.
And even though we didn't get the results we wanted, my battle for America is far from over.
You see, I'm not the kind of person who gives up after just one setback. I grew up on my family's farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| | It sparked my love of community, and inspired me to study to become an OBGYN nurse to help women during the most significant moments of their lives.
With my high school sweetheart Scotty, we had a life I could only dream of - until I received a call that changed everything. Scotty, who was serving in the U.S. Army in Iraq, had lost sight in both his eyes to a suicide bomber.
When I got to his side at Walter Reed, they asked me to sign a document on the spot that would prevent him from ever serving his country again.
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| | **But I wouldn 't give up on his dream.**
Since then, I've dedicated my life to ensuring that every veteran gets the benefits and care they deserve - and Scotty went on to become America's first blind active-duty Army Officer.
My husband and I went up against the establishment in the U.S. military and won. And now, [I'm ready to take on the rest of the broken American bureaucracy.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
| | [**END OUT-OF-TOUCH WASHINGTON POLITICS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
I started my mission last year running for Senate in Washington, and now, I'm starting a new fight with **Endeavor PAC.**

When I was fighting for my husband Scotty's future, I saw that the bureaucracy in Washington fiercely protects its insiders while leaving hardworking Americans behind.

The resistance was tough, but we won - and now, I'm ready to win for the rest of America.

I'm not giving up on my mission to elect strong, freedom-loving leaders to the House and the Senate.

**The fight for 2024 is already underway,[and it's going to take each one of us doing our part to change how business is done in Washington.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)**
---
[**JOIN OUR TEAM NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
As someone who loves America, it pains me to see the radical Left and the DC establishment try to erode the freedoms that make our country strong. But I know that there are hardworking Americans out there who want to TRULY fight for our country and bring forward conservative solutions for families like yours and mine.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
I'm not going to lie - the road ahead will be long and difficult. But I'm not about to give up anytime soon.
I'm ready to take on the forces that want to take away your freedoms, and today, you have a choice -[**will you stand with me for American freedom or let the DC establishment erode the country you love?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)

Through **Endeavor PAC** , we can build off of our momentum from our Senate campaign to elect strong conservatives from ALL walks of life that will tackle our border, our skyrocketing crime, out-of-control inflation, and so much more.
Our work is cut out for us, and any amount you can pitch into our mission will fuel the fight for maverick conservatives across America.
**[Now that you know my story, it 's time for us to write the next chapter in America's story together. Please, pitch in what you can now to fuel our fight to END business as usual in Washington and send the next generation of conservatives to the capitol.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)**
---
[**PITCH IN $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
[**PITCH IN $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
[**PITCH IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
For America,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)
---
Tiffany Smiley
---
[**STAND WITH ENDEAVOR PAC**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532588:6Xf1beGN7:m:1:3331421248:016DF09F059893D5C0994FC688572A27:r)

body:
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532184:63qcbeGTN:m:1:3391001263:A2122644C68C2F957906B7AA8EE8A8EB:r)

**
**This is Tiffany Smiley.**
** **
**_I 'm here to tell you that I am done._**** **

_I 'm done_ playing games with career politicians who don't care about the lives of everyday Americans.

_I 'm done_ playing by the "establishment's" rules.

These people have done everything they can to drag this country down, and _I 'm done with it._

I got into the political arena because I experienced a broken system and wanted to stand up for what is right.

Although I didn't win my race, I'm not giving up on the fight, and I _know I can count on you to help me._

I started a new endeavor to help elect leaders willing to put fourth policies that allow all Americans to love out their dreams and improve their daily lives.

** ****[PROTECT THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532184:63qcbeGTN:m:1:3391001263:A2122644C68C2F957906B7AA8EE8A8EB:r) **
**

Thank you very much for your support. I'm proud to have you join my team.

Sincerely,

Tiffany Smiley

name: James Comer
subject: Public enemy #1 to the Radical Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | This is Chairman James Comer.

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is **SMEARING** my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just **ATTACKED** me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency...

_**[After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we're exposing, I won't let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I'm personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62531497:J0IVueG0N:m:1:3365131770:E4E79108A3075061386A68A2E096907B:r "After all the
corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. But I
need your help to fight back. So I’m personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five
bucks a piece. ")**_

It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work...

They've been let off the hook for YEARS with Nancy Pelosi in charge of accountability. Biden and the Radical Democrats were NEVER forced to answer for anything.

No one held them accountable... and they took full advantage.

**As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. **

But going up against the Liberal powers at be is a monumental undertaking. They've tried trashing my reputation, jamming up my investigations, and threatening our House Majority. The only thing that can stop them is the power of our ENTIRE grassroots standing up and fighting back.

_**[Are you with me? I'm counting on it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62531497:J0IVueG0N:m:1:3365131770:E4E79108A3075061386A68A2E096907B:r "Are you with me?
I’m counting on it. ")**_

---

For God and Country,

**James Comer**
_Chairman, House Oversight Committee_

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Happy Friday, Peter! It’s Michael Haley hoping to catch you before the holiday weekend. Our family is getting ready to celebrate Easter. As the designated chef, that means a lot of preparation in the kitchen. But I wanted to take a moment before the craziness to bring it back to the true meaning of Easter and share some insights into our family’s faith journey. Nikki and I came from two completely different backgrounds; I grew up Christian attending a Methodist church. Nikki was born into a Sikh family. Her parents were and are very serious about their Sikh faith. Her parents would receive invitations to visit various congregations, and they would take Nikki’s siblings and her along. Nikki converted to Christianity because the teachings of Christ spoke to her in a way that she could understand and that would help her live her life. Despite these two different upbringings and backgrounds we had as individuals, we decided to forge a new path for the future together. So that’s exactly what we did. We chose to be Christian; we chose to be married in the Methodist church, we chose to raise our children to love God and love this country. And we continue to choose God every day in our actions and words. Our prayer this Easter is that families and friends gather to reflect, laugh, eat, and talk—together. From church services to Easter egg hunts, holiday traditions are meant to be communal and family activities. Our faith is very personal to us, but we are feeling so incredibly moved after hearing from countless supporters all across the country that have empathized with our story and supported Nikki’s message of faith, freedom, and a better America for all. If you support this message and her conservative movement, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=6cd0128cb9e3c4e26f15c344052a7bbf9a3982a956b90f4a75a0be35fce58507e2b48bbfa178572aea8e8f27babddc08304176d72016101656254d77406abfef I’m hoping you’ll participate in $5 Friday to help Nikki spread her message even further. Our family feels so blessed to have you along for Nikki’s journey to the White House. I hope you have a safe and family-filled holiday weekend, Peter. It’s Michael Haley hoping to catch you before the holiday weekend. Our family is getting ready to celebrate Easter. As the designated chef, that means a lot of preparation in the kitchen. But I wanted to take a moment before the craziness to bring it back to the true meaning of Easter and share some insights into our family’s faith journey. Nikki and I came from two completely different backgrounds; I grew up Christian attending a Methodist church. Nikki was born into a Sikh family. Her parents were and are very serious about their Sikh faith. Her parents would receive invitations to visit various congregations, and they would take Nikki’s siblings and her along. Nikki converted to Christianity because the teachings of Christ spoke to her in a way that she could understand and that would help her live her life. Despite these two different upbringings and backgrounds we had as individuals, we decided to forge a new path for the future together. So that’s exactly what we did. We chose to be Christian; we chose to be married in the Methodist church, we chose to raise our children to love God and love this country. And we continue to choose God every day in our actions and words. Our prayer this Easter is that families and friends gather to reflect, laugh, eat, and talk—together. From church services to Easter egg hunts, holiday traditions are meant to be communal and family activities. Our faith is very personal to us, but we are feeling so incredibly moved after hearing from countless supporters all across the country that have empathized with our story and supported Nikki’s message of faith, freedom, and a better America for all. If you support this message and her conservative movement, I’m hoping you’ll participate in $5 Friday to help Nikki spread her message even further. Our family feels so blessed to have you along for Nikki’s journey to the White House. I hope you have a safe and family-filled holiday weekend, Peter. Time sure flies, Peter.

Can you believe we only have seven months left to gear up for the most competitive Mississippi election in decades?

We need to put the pedal to the metal on every available resource to get folks out there and vote in November. I'm talking phone calls, volunteers, mail pieces, digital media, and everything in between!

[This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. Every vote counts on November 7th, and we need to make sure folks know it. That's why I'm counting on you to chip in $7 right now to help us bring home the win >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440700/400091560/-1470085607?amount=7&refcode=ea.61a9035f-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.61a9035f-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFhOTAzNWYtNTFkNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w-gOD5_v2po2iB7Q05-ph32ejT_uop7B-KGQgiX7qzo=)

Look, your support today publicly shows that you're dedicated to electing a leader that values the truth and puts working people and families first. Because let's be honest, it's been nothing but four years of backward leadership from Tate Reeves and the good ol’ boys club down in Jackson.

Our hospitals are shutting down, our schools need funding, our infrastructure is crumbling, and our rural communities are hurting. Meanwhile, Tate Reeves is too busy enriching his pals with our tax dollars and putting special interests first.

Enough is enough, Peter. We need him gone, and I need your help to make it happen. And with our first public filing deadline coming up at the end of the month, there’s never been a more important time to make your first contribution.

These next seven months aren’t going to be easy, but it will all be worth it on November 7th, when we finally defeat Reeves and move Mississippi forward.

[So what do you say? name: Mark Warner
subject: Disturbing Supreme Court News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Supreme Court justices should have to abide by a basic code of ethics

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440806/400092006/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYyOWZmNC01MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvXZJ6uKP4FbR2q9AkVRZ1EZGmRZJr6A2uML0A9VSI=&emci=8343d719-c7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=00629ff4-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | **“Clarence Thomas Secretly Accepted Luxury Trips from Major GOP Donor”
_\- ProPublica_** **“Ex anti-abortion leader claims Alito leaked 2014 opinion”
_\- USATODAY_** [**_Add your name to demand Supreme Court ethics reform._** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440807/400092007/1694963865?refcode=mw_em_230407_1&ms=mw_em_230407_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYyOWZmNC01MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvXZJ6uKP4FbR2q9AkVRZ1EZGmRZJr6A2uML0A9VSI=&emci=8343d719-c7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=00629ff4-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237) Derek, These are just a couple of the disturbing headlines we’ve seen recently involving Supreme Court justices. While I will wait until we have all the facts about particular Justices, it is pretty clear that we need a basic code of ethics for members of the Supreme Court right now. These justices are unelected and serve lifetime terms, yet they’re subject to little to no ethical guardrails. The result? In many cases, they are able to accept gifts and vacations from people who have interests before the Court, they don’t have to recuse themselves from cases they might have conflict with, and there’s no process to submit an ethics complaint at the Court. That’s why I’ve sponsored legislation to require the Supreme Court to hold itself to a basic code of ethics. _The Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal and Transparency (SCERT) Act_ would strengthen disclosure requirements for justices so we know what special interests are lobbying before the Court, and require judges to be recused from cases where an involved party spent significant funds to get them confirmed. ****[_**Add your name to call on Congress to pass our SCERT Act and implement basic accountability and transparency for the Supreme Court.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440808/400092008/1694963865?refcode=mw_em_230407_1&ms=mw_em_230407_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYyOWZmNC01MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvXZJ6uKP4FbR2q9AkVRZ1EZGmRZJr6A2uML0A9VSI=&emci=8343d719-c7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=00629ff4-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)**** It’s pretty simple: Supreme Court justices should have to abide by a basic code of ethics. Passing my bill would be a step in the right direction to restoring public trust and confidence in the Supreme Court. [_**Join me in my fight to change the course of the Supreme Court by signing my petition right now >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440809/400092009/1694963865?refcode=mw_em_230407_1&ms=mw_em_230407_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYyOWZmNC01MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvXZJ6uKP4FbR2q9AkVRZ1EZGmRZJr6A2uML0A9VSI=&emci=8343d719-c7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=00629ff4-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237) Thank you, Mark Warner ********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61440810/400092010/1694963865?refcode=mw_em_230407_1&ms=mw_em_230407_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYyOWZmNC01MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvXZJ6uKP4FbR2q9AkVRZ1EZGmRZJr6A2uML0A9VSI=&emci=8343d719-c7d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=00629ff4-51d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)********

clean_body: Supreme Court justices should have to abide by a basic code of ethics | | | “Clarence Thomas Secretly Accepted Luxury Trips from Major GOP Donor” \- ProPublica “Ex anti-abortion leader claims Alito leaked 2014 opinion” \- USATODAY Derek, These are just a couple of the disturbing headlines we’ve seen recently involving Supreme Court justices. While I will wait until we have all the facts about particular Justices, it is pretty clear that we need a basic code of ethics for members of the Supreme Court right now. These justices are unelected and serve lifetime terms, yet they’re subject to little to no ethical guardrails. The result? In many cases, they are able to accept gifts and vacations from people who have interests before the Court, they don’t have to recuse themselves from cases they might have conflict with, and there’s no process to submit an ethics complaint at the Court. That’s why I’ve sponsored legislation to require the Supreme Court to hold itself to a basic code of ethics. The Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal and Transparency (SCERT) Act would strengthen disclosure requirements for justices so we know what special interests are lobbying before the Court, and require judges to be recused from cases where an involved party spent significant funds to get them confirmed. ** It’s pretty simple: Supreme Court justices should have to abide by a basic code of ethics. Passing my bill would be a step in the right direction to restoring public trust and confidence in the Supreme Court. Thank you, Mark Warner ******** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: URGENT Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the petition to demand Clarence Thomas be impeached >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Impeach Clarence Thomas! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0b275ef-4684-4756-b03d-5429dc5a27cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a5b2572-6a5d-40fa-a62d-041a099a91ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | As if there weren't enough reasons to remove Clarence Thomas from the Supreme Court, a jaw-dropping new one emerged this week -- [Thomas has secretly received millions of dollars worth of lavish vacations from a prominent GOP donor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c9688f7-9afd-4e7a-b1de-9d4c9fbe8622/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), over the course of many years. Thomas never reported these gifts, in violation of ethics rules, and most likely [the law](https://default.salsalabs.org/T381acb8d-c6fc-47a0-964d-1ab18b820482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as well. It's time for him to be impeached, as AOC and multiple other lawmakers have called for. We can't allow this behavior to become normalized. And if Republicans refuse, we need to keep up the pressure, and force them to relent, or openly align themselves with this corruption (which does not play well with swing voters). [**Add your name: Impeach Clarence Thomas.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td56a6673-8faf-491e-bc18-d333484993f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kellen
subject: Kellen Friday Update - April 7, 2023
body:
The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. IMPORTANT: We are doing the first national exclusive interview on And
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/0aOTCgCSK/c?w=G3MCn02Y9dDxaljCF8oXrRxqazg_dDA8x0rI3rG3RHI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL3NvLzBhT1RDZ0NTSz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjIxOGM2YmFhLTUzOWUtNDczYS1iNjNmLWIyMzRjNzZlOGM3NCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
## The Kellen Courier - Weekly Newsletter, Edition 1
---
| |
---
| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. IMPORTANT: We are doing the first national exclusive interview on Anderson Cooper 360 TONIGHT! Set your channels to CNN at 8:00 p.m. ET. Friends, Family, and Supporters, It has been an exciting start to my campaign for Congress. The outpouring of support from across the country, from friends and colleagues to classmates and mentors, has been a humbling experience. Your kind words encourage me. Your support inspires me. I share the same yearning for honest leadership and integrity in office. The response from the public is pouring in. It’s exciting to share our footprints in the [media](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/0aOTCgCSK/c?w=p6DRc0oqvlqdldYAhIICWIJVMuruVqBFSt8vOJAk_jU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL3ByZXNzIiwiciI6ImJhYWM1NmMxLWU4YWQtNGYwMy05NmQwLTFmYTdmMTQ4NTRlOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjIxOGM2YmFhLTUzOWUtNDczYS1iNjNmLWIyMzRjNzZlOGM3NCJ9). We are talking to local news outlets and now going national! Every interview and article helps our presence, so please share with others. I’m excited to announce my candidacy on national television and to let the American people know that there is someone championing a strong democracy. One that holds elected officials accountable. We need leaders who want to make a positive impact with integrity at its core.
Our small but mighty team is growing and working through the many messages across social media, emails, and texts. It means the world to me to hear from so many people, and I look forward to sharing more with you as the journey unfolds. P.S. I encourage you to share your thoughts using the new [Contact page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/0aOTCgCSK/c?w=_OBtR3AYoY_ShgBIVoHA2BOnzbgMVtN-BmajiKMoofw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL2NvbnRhY3QiLCJyIjoiYmFhYzU2YzEtZThhZC00ZjAzLTk2ZDAtMWZhN2YxNDg1NGU5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0) on our website. Please share this newsletter with your community! All the Best,
---
| |
---
| | Kellen J. Curry
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Net Zero is Dangerous: Come see why!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132956?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Climate change activists continually agree that Net Zero is the way to go, but in reality, the concept of Net Zero is a dangerous trap. **

Net Zero aims to eliminate gases and emissions from the atmosphere, but 80% of the country is run on fossil fuels. The United States would not be able to function properly in a Net Zero society.

**Best-selling author and fossil-fuel activist Alex Epstein will be in Jackson in a few weeks to discuss why we need the oil and fuel industries and why we should reject the Net Zero agenda. **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7ea4d1f1a4&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| **Tickets for this event are on sale now, and you can purchase one[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8b3e54d0c2&e=5703353baa). You don't want to miss out!**

A copy of Alex Epstein's book, "Fossil Future," will be provided with a purchase of each ticket.

I hope to see you there!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3bb01395a0&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---
| | _ _

You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0329234fff) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=0329234fff).

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: 📝 Have you taken Kim's survey yet, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Kim's held 100 town halls across the district and traveled over 17,000 miles to hear from people like you Have you taken Kim's survey yet, Peter?

Kim knows how important it is to bring our concerns to Congress, so she wants to hear from every member of this team. We're getting ready to share the responses with Kim, so make your voice heard.

[**Take our Q2 Priorities Survey right away and let Kim know what you would like to see Congress focus on in the coming months →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61441920/400096473/-641096261?ms=em23_230407_survey_esrv_gq_act___DrKSfC_ettx&refcode=em23_230407_survey_esrv_gq_act___DrKSfC_ettx&source=em23_230407_survey_esrv_gq_act___DrKSfC_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230407_survey_esrv_gq_act___DrKSfC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=ejHQNgaheYnw44YUO8rg5wmxaet4mQ77sfQsvMsryWLueuzqJxb0zSFrg9AX4MFU1wzHv/mHVwmOjnIEHsx/mlUdX8pDX/22HCrR71olYbpqaTZ5jWBYlIR/tTpW1r5id8HMJngb6MosrdiQXxx3I8gWV6NSTT2xJ4VDIFrqHfk=&refcode2=e3902cdf-54d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzkwMmNkZi01NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQjWf1xs6nc2FFdcJIGP1brXnFIVQIdvk6xGnRCn6S0=&emci=977d9f6b-b9d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e3902cdf-54d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

From: Team Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com>

We just closed the books on the first quarter of the year, and Kim has already had a busy year in Congress! She had her 16th bill signed into law, was appointed to chair a task force on the upcoming national Farm Bill, and introduced bills to increase health care access for children and provide crucial support to Washington farmers.

Kim is working hard to fight for the issues that matter most to you. As we begin the next quarter of the year, Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team about which issues are at the top of your mind.

[**Will you take our Q2 Priorities Survey now? Kim knows how important it is to bring our concerns to Congress, so she wants to hear from every member of this team. We're getting ready to share the responses with Kim, so make your voice heard. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com> Date: Wed, Apr 5, 2023 Subject: Kim wants to hear from you, team! Team, We just closed the books on the first quarter of the year, and Kim has already had a busy year in Congress! She had her 16th bill signed into law, was appointed to chair a task force on the upcoming national Farm Bill, and introduced bills to increase health care access for children and provide crucial support to Washington farmers. Kim is working hard to fight for the issues that matter most to you. As we begin the next quarter of the year, Kim wants to hear from this grassroots team about which issues are at the top of your mind. Kim's top priority has always been listening to the people of Washington's 8th District. That's why Kim's held 100 town halls across the district and traveled over 17,000 miles, and it's why she sends out surveys like this to ensure every person has a chance to make their voice heard. Our team will share the results of this survey with Kim later this week, so make sure you take a moment to make your voice heard! Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. body:
I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead.
Peter, I know you usually hear from my husband Raja. But today, I told him I'd reach out instead. [_**Peter, I wanted to personally tell you why I’m so proud of my husband, why he deserves your support, and give you a peek into my family. I hope you will read until the very end. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61441970/400096529/-1810142053?refcode=20230407_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwMmNkZi01NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtlQSpjo-KWTVflkta0a4g31W-Lan1w9rzq1x35x9XM=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61441972/400096531/-1810142053?refcode=20230407_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwMmNkZi01NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtlQSpjo-KWTVflkta0a4g31W-Lan1w9rzq1x35x9XM=) _Our family!_
---
Raja is the hardest working person I know.
He fought tirelessly for protections for frontline healthcare workers like me.
He went after companies for targeting e-cigarette campaigns at young kids like ours.
And at the end of every day, he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.
[_**I’ve never been prouder of my husband. He’s fighting hard for families like yours and mine every day. And I know he doesn’t like asking for money. So I hope today, you’ll listen to my request instead. I know we need strong people like my husband in Congress, and I’m asking you to support Raja however you can. Anything you could chip in, whether it’s $5 or $25, would be greatly appreciated by both of us. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61441974/400096533/-1810142053?refcode=20230407_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwMmNkZi01NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtlQSpjo-KWTVflkta0a4g31W-Lan1w9rzq1x35x9XM=)
One of the things I love most about Raja is that this isn’t about politics for him.
It’s deeply personal.
It’s rooted in his experience as a child of immigrant parents.
It’s rooted in his role as a father who wants the best for every child.
It’s rooted in the same values I’ve watched him champion for decades.
I couldn’t be prouder of him -- as a congressman, husband, and father.
That’s why I wanted to email you today. I hope you see in Raja what I do -- and I hope you don’t mind me asking you to support him however you can. Will you join us?

But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Salute to Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
April 7, 2023
Dear friend,
I remember many years ago, when I first heard of Justin J. Pearson. I heard
that there was a young student, a college freshman, making an impact at Mitchell High School in Memphis. I had to see for myself.
I was so impressed by what I found I invited him and his family to Nashville. I wanted him to be recognized by the General Assembly and, of course, give some remarks to the body. Of course, when it was time to give his remarks, he burned the house down.
He’s not changing. He’s a fearless, courageous leader and I expect, no
matter what happened yesterday, he’ll be changing lives and communities for years to come.
Thank you, Justin, for showing us the way,
Shelby County Mayor Lee Harris
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94287/images/2018%20MLH%20and%20Justin%20Pearson.jpg]

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: This message is extremely important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Friend it's already the beginning of April
| | |
---
I can’t believe it – it's already the beginning of April.
To fight the onslaught of GOP money and close polling in the days before Election Day, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.
We _had_ to take on debt. The good news is that it worked, and we won.
**That debt makes emails like this one _extremely_ important.** If we’re going to pay it down according to schedule, I need 32 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.
You’re a valuable supporter, and I feel like I can ask you directly: **[Will you please be one of the 32 donors who help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61442113/400096995/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2250-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTlhMjNkOS01NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbgIsQBC4cr8rN0KInGZQH3SXQ_oOk63b2qP5AHdT-8=)**
Thanks so much. With our debt reports made public each quarter, we can’t afford to fall short.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| | Hi — I make it a point to check in with my supporters to see what issues are top-of-mind for them. I know that the news cycle can be overwhelming, but I’m asking you to take this time to stay engaged and share what issues matter most to you. [**Will you take a minute to fill out my April Issues Survey? Your voice will help guide my work in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61443575/400103091/-618851916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY4ZDFlYy01N2Q1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiEvHEboQwfYAZXw9YMEuBaYO1hkQ0bUfXY9ilmnmIs=&emci=cd3a6662-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7968d1ec-57d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957) | | | [Take the April Issues Survey >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61443576/400103092/-618851916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY4ZDFlYy01N2Q1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiEvHEboQwfYAZXw9YMEuBaYO1hkQ0bUfXY9ilmnmIs=&emci=cd3a6662-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7968d1ec-57d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)

If you’re the type of person who turns on the news and immediately wants to change the channel, I don’t blame you. Republican attacks against marginalized groups and the rights we hold dear seem never-ending.
Since retaking the House majority, Republicans have done nothing but fan the flames of culture wars, further dividing our country.
And I know that families across Nevada are feeling the effects of the far-right majority in more ways than one. House Republicans haven’t come up with a single, common sense plan to put money back in the pockets of working people.
Needless to say, I know there could be a lot on your mind. And I’d be grateful if you used this survey as an outlet to share your concerns and priorities with me.
[**Can you share which issues matter most to you by filling out my survey? I’ll be reviewing responses tomorrow, and I’d love to see yours included.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61443577/400103093/-618851916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTY4ZDFlYy01N2Q1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiEvHEboQwfYAZXw9YMEuBaYO1hkQ0bUfXY9ilmnmIs=&emci=cd3a6662-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7968d1ec-57d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10997957)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin=20for=20State=20Representative?=
subject: Voter's Need to Know
body:
I'll stand for Them | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-451861?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **DISTRICT 24 VOTERS NEED TO KNOW**
---
| **Friends,**
**District 24 voters, you need to know that as your State Representative, I will fight against failed policies and special interest groups. **I will be a strong advocate for our community, and I promise to always have your best interests in mind. I will work hard to ensure that our district's needs are met and that our voices are heard. **Join me in this fight for a better future!**
**The election is only six weeks away! Now is the time for you to get involved.** Your vote is your voice, and we must ensure our voices are heard. Vote in this election, and let's create a better future for our community together! Join me in the upcoming weeks by walking neighborhoods, making calls, or placing a yard sign to **spread the message of Faith, Family, and Freedom!**

[Contact me at my website and let me know you're ready to join the team!](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=620ad58f45&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| | **IMPORTANT VOTING INFORMATION**
---
| **Special General Election**

Only registered voters who live within House District 24 are eligible to vote in this election.
Voter Registration Deadline: April 17, 2023

Early Voting: May 6, 2023, to May 13, 2023, Sites open from 10 AM to 6 PM

Mail Ballot Request Deadline: May 6, 2023, by 5 PM
Mail ballots must be received by the Supervisor of Elections office by 7 PM Election Day to be counted

Election Day: May 16, 2023 - Polls open from 7 AM to 7 PM

---
| [STAND WITH RYAN AS RYAN STANDS FOR YOU!](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=20ea1ea75f&e=d1c1b9864f "STAND WITH RYAN AS RYAN STANDS FOR YOU!")
---
|
---
| Friends, I want to hear from you! I would like to see what is on your mind for the future of District 24 and the State of Florida. **[Please take a moment to go to my campaign website and contact me.](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=690ce802dd&e=d1c1b9864f)**

I appreciate all of your input and support!

_**God Bless America!**_
---
|
---
| Candidate for Florida House District 24
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=801da9867b&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

name: Mississippi Conservatives
subject: We’re proud to be Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
| | | Friend, Mississippi is one of the best places in America to be a conservative.

From our churches to our community centers, the love of God, country, and family rings true throughout the state.

_But even with such strong conservative roots, the radical Left STILL thinks they can take a run at our state._

It’s up to us to show them that liberal ideas have NO PLACE in Mississippi.

**Stand up to the radical Left and let us know now: are you proud to be conservative?**

Peter, Last night, I watched in horror as Republicans in the Tennessee House of Representatives expelled two Black men, Justin Jones and Justin Pearson. They were removed from the House after leading demonstrations calling for new gun control laws following the horrific school shooting in Nashville last week. The third woman who led the demonstrations, who is White, was not ousted. It’s a shocking affront to our democracy, and it’s horrifically racist — plain and simple. This is not the way our democracy should work. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson were democratically elected. Their expulsion is not only an affront to these two men, but a move to disenfranchise every single voter in their districts — continuing on a shameful legacy of silencing marginalized communities and the representatives they elect. Now, there’s a possibility for Justin Jones and Justin Pearson to be reappointed to their seats in the interim, until a new election is held. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Remembering the “Attorney’s Oath”
body:
This is not the independent American judiciary our Founding Fathers intended. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/30d4e39539e6/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america-462422?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| This month, we all became witness to something historic: A former President of the United States, and current Republican presidential candidate, was charged by a Democrat New York City District Attorney in what many pundits agree is nothing more than a political prosecution. This is not the independent American judiciary our Founding Fathers intended.

I, like every lawyer, took the “Attorney’s Oath,” swearing to live by and dedicate my life to upholding the rule of law. By nature, the rule of law is applied and enforced universally, regardless of societal status, circumstance, or (most relevantly today) political party. That basic operating principle is under attack.

Repeatedly over the last few years, we have seen progressive prosecutors manipulate the rule of law to bully and obstruct President Trump and those of us who share his political views. Judicial attacks have repeatedly been waged against our elections, our freedom of speech, and our freedom to assemble.

At the same time, radical prosecutors are pushing to abandon the rule of law for dangerous criminals and even divert critical resources away from law enforcement officers, hindering the abilities of these brave men and women to do their jobs effectively. More specifically, they are pushing for reduced sentences, legalized drug use, and relaxed bail standards, which release potentially dangerous criminals back on our streets with more ease and less accountability.

The way that I see it is this: There is a difference between those we are mad at and those we are scared of. The judicial system is meant to protect society from those we are scared of, not score political points against those with whom we disagree. It’s about time those serving as District Attorney recognize the difference.

The “Attorney’s Oath” was drafted and agreed to, not for the benefit of the prosecutor, but for the benefit of the public. No one – not even the justice system itself – is above the law. We must begin to universally enforce the rule of law without personal prejudice or political bias, and remember that this is a tool to improve our communities, not win the next election.

If we want a local government that protects local people, we must elect conservative District Attorneys that are rooted in our community and dedicated to the equal application of the rule of law.

---
| [STOP RADICAL PROSECUTORS](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=0952917a88&e=3c5d31b5ad "STOP RADICAL PROSECUTORS")
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=51d4fb782b&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=bf9de82e0b&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, There’s been a lot going on this past week. Former president Trump was indicted and charged with crimes, and House Republicans continue to defend him. We just had local elections across IL-17. Severe storms just hit Central Illinois and more extreme weather is expected in the coming days. With so much in the news, I want you to make sure you have a chance to weigh in and let me know what issues are on your mind. What do you want me to look more closely at in Congress? I value the input of my constituents and supporters, and I’m not relying on pundits and polls to identify the issues folks care about. Your ideas -- on surveys like this one -- help me understand what folks in IL-17 and across the country are thinking about so I can better serve you in Congress. Some may call that unconventional.I call it common sense! So please, it takes less than 5 minutes. Let us know your thoughts -- I’d really appreciate it. All my best, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . | | | Peter,

**[I’m Senator Rick Scott from Florida](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b0ba61390de84bd397bb2a0ef5d76c09&_e=XxtOQ_dc7davMvhIk0N26ArYMjzVIdCjVm5g7OgjW9i6tsdaGkqqoel7Gt52Mhpi-CI401pqsoZe_VOYJ6x6k7CNOMBXVdCsBEiJ8k0wlbzkVmEYrAT1wtwl1iNSbtP9CPhfn4CmeE6kR4DqO2yzUs0Gt36cshItOa88trdbeCUf6XixG7TueZOoKXRTTZQeMKJCa7zZRGniaPXe7Esw7rilI9dmzaaeKmOdoFivJjM8wFMFKhTPOy1ThrmPt13TcVrvFxVQWqsLitnCK8WjPvOaGfG7XGPZAflJ9N6-o-8LN_nZUnjU104OewBDZ_S4pCoFXl9LA1hCzAVRM9BpGjk1O5QDmnpu1wPwWo88KOV8UeLLec-VHq68qRIjfsvh)** – and for the next year and a half, I will be gearing up my re-election campaign to keep Florida RED.

I have 3 goals: **Win my campaign to keep Florida RED, help take back the Senate majority from the far-Left Democrats, and return some sanity to our country.**

I’m writing to you today to let you know about how invested and optimistic I am in seeing conservatives retake the Senate majority next year, and it starts with my race in Florida.

**My team is working night and day to build the support we need to win in Florida so that we can go on offense in other states to defeat the Democrat Senate Majority by next November.**

[**That’s why before April 10th, my team and I have set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to pledge their support to our efforts**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=b0ba61390de84bd397bb2a0ef5d76c09&_e=XxtOQ_dc7davMvhIk0N26ArYMjzVIdCjVm5g7OgjW9i6tsdaGkqqoel7Gt52Mhpi-CI401pqsoZe_VOYJ6x6k7CNOMBXVdCsBEiJ8k0wlbzkVmEYrAT1wtwl1iNSbtP9CPhfn4CmeE6kR4DqO2yzUs0Gt36cshItOa88trdbeCUf6XixG7TueZOoKXRTTZQeMKJCa7zZRGniaPXe7Esw7pdwJMt6EBYF5jQlOIt4_dpPRj4dRqjGduTUo6OGypNQAcoG5M0kAaqeDE0KpV1dKJFP8jg4XzYXTRc1HolOEove9N1dNzbR6N6_PNHB8Bpwlo_OkYYINpWJsuHZpBbtNdQSNk2OaYdQOFIGVASik-xAmakwSJOmC7DJGav9gBOI); taking back the Senate will be an “all hands on deck” effort and I'm counting on YOU.

Think about what is at stake IF Republicans can’t flip the Senate next year:
1. Democrats will kill the filibuster if they don’t do it sooner,

name: Tara McGowan, Courier Newsroom
subject: One of these is not like the others 👀
body:
The difference between our Arizona newsroom and other Arizona media outlets is startling.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)
**Peter, is there an Arizona-wide ban on the word “abortion” that we don’t know about? 🤔**
Earlier this week, Democratic Governor Katie Hobbs vetoed a Trojan horse bill that would have further criminalized abortion. Gov. Hobbs’ veto is _literally_ saving womens’ lives — but if you were just to read the news coverage coming out of the state’s main media outlets **you would have no idea**.
Unlike them, our Arizona newsroom, _The Copper Courier,_ understands the importance of making state and local government news transparent and accessible for our readers — and it shows in our headlines.
[**But don’t just take my word for it. Take a look and then chip in anything you can today to help our reporters deliver accessible local news:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3594?refcode=em-20230407&t=2&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)
**Okay Peter,****see if you can spot the difference here:**
First up, _The Copper Courier’s_ headline —
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3594?refcode=em-20230407&t=3&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)
Up next, the Arizona mainstream media’s headlines —
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3594?refcode=em-20230407&t=4&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)
**Did you catch that, Peter? The mainstream media outlets didn’t mention abortion in any of their headlines.**
Instead they focused on the number of vetoes Governor Hobbs has delivered — withholding the important, lifesaving context of the bill she struck down.
**At Courier Newsroom, we do news differently.** Our reporting is always rooted in facts, science, and the communities our newsrooms serve. We strive to report the truth all the time, something that these other Arizona media sources can’t live up to.
We treat our audience with respect, because we respect you — it’s that simple. We’re not going to withhold important information or context, and we’re certainly not afraid to say the word “abortion.”
[**Please ensure our small, local newsrooms like**** _The Copper Courier_****can keep reporting the facts by donating anything you can today. We’re working across eight different battleground states, so every dollar donated helps:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3594?refcode=em-20230407&t=5&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3594?refcode=em-20230407&t=6&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)**
Thanks for your support,
Tara McGowan
_Founder & Publisher_
_Courier Newsroom_

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=824_120351_-VUNu_&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=824%2E120351%2E-VUNu_)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

body:
Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson
#
Peter,**one year ago today** we made history.
The Senate confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the 116th Justice of the U.S. Supreme Court. As the first Black woman to ever serve on the Supreme Court, Justice Jackson's confirmation marked a crucial step forward in diversifying our justice system at our country's highest institution.
Her appointment is a testament to the progress the Democrats have made to build a brighter future for our country – even with all of the GOP roadblocks in the way.
[**So if you want the Democrats to continue making monumental progress, pitch in $5 right now to join us in the fight to protect our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61445671/400110790/1052165986?refcode=dd_em_230407__t1_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWE4ZTMzZi01ZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZ9R0WXm9PlAUpByo010Ot6-lmW2-TpAbVXZt1mnSDs=)

clean_body: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson Peter,one year ago today we made history. The Senate confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the 116th Justice of the U.S. Supreme Court. As the first Black woman to ever serve on the Supreme Court, Justice Jackson's confirmation marked a crucial step forward in diversifying our justice system at our country's highest institution. Her appointment is a testament to the progress the Democrats have made to build a brighter future for our country – even with all of the GOP roadblocks in the way. = While there is still much work to be done, we can look to Justice Jackson's confirmation as a beacon of hope and progress. Thank you for your continued support and dedication, Team Durbin **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Martin Heinrich
