body:
Fighting climate change will take all of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61445817/400111191/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2E4ZTMzZi01ZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5oKXoIVzMhe7Bp1Zv7r7Rgz7rXg2D9LCn1ejbGru4U=&emci=e6027227-43d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=23a8e33f-5dd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Friends, I can trace my commitment to clean energy all the way back to college, when I designed and built a carbon fiber solar-powered car called the “Sun Tiger” with my engineering classmates. We even raced it across the country: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61445820/400111192/1960715033?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2E4ZTMzZi01ZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5oKXoIVzMhe7Bp1Zv7r7Rgz7rXg2D9LCn1ejbGru4U=) Now, I'm working in the Senate to make 2023 the best year yet for clean energy. We've made incredible progress recently through the _Inflation Reduction Act_ and the bipartisan infrastructure law. I'm especially proud that the _Inflation Reduction Act_ includes provisions from my _Zero-Emission Homes Act_ and gives homeowners rebates for clean energy appliances like electric stoves and heat pumps. I'm working on electrifying my own home right now. **But we need to make even more transformational investments in clean energy to take on the climate crisis with the urgency it requires.** That includes advancing renewable energy transmission to prepare our country for a wave of clean energy projects. More renewable power on the grid will help us fight climate change, create jobs, and save you money — _renewable energy is the cheapest source of new electricity in most of the country._ My passion for clean energy transmission must be why _Axios_ just called me “The Senate's transmission king” (I promise I won’t let it get to my head!). **But the future of clean energy isn’t just up to me or the select few of us on the Senate’s Energy and Natural Resources Committee. It will take all of us. Together, we can continue building support for policies that invest in clean energy, create jobs, and protect our planet.** **[Can you pitch in any amount to my campaign to help continue this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61445821/400111193/1960715033?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2E4ZTMzZi01ZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5oKXoIVzMhe7Bp1Zv7r7Rgz7rXg2D9LCn1ejbGru4U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61445822/400111194/1960715033?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2E4ZTMzZi01ZGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5oKXoIVzMhe7Bp1Zv7r7Rgz7rXg2D9LCn1ejbGru4U=)

body:

Margins are razor-thin right now. Now more than ever, every seat counts. **[Republicans in every state must fight tooth and nail to hold and pick up seats in every election across the country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532621:6lXSVeGbN:m:1:3331421248:6362D4F8677A3E5F7F42ECDD40E164E3:r "Republicans in
every state must fight tooth and nail to hold and pick up seats in every election across the country.")**

**A leftwing activist Wisconsin Supreme Court alone gets Democrats one step closer to:**
* REVERSING election integrity measures put in place after the 2020 election

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Regarding 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House –

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2es41h29gva0jbplnef28ij57h5pmvqu73qqki8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z432j6cb06frhllldo04e314gqllgiauc0n3l0m8_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdvp1hmae58gibj7oi1kf2jrcsjbej26vanh0um0_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. name: Luz at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA will never been enough
body:
I’m an organizer and activist with United We Dream Action. And I’m undocumented and unafraid. | | | Hi Peter, I’m Luz. I’m an organizer and activist with United We Dream Action. And I’m undocumented and unafraid. I came to the United States from Bolivia when I was four years old — growing up, I didn’t know I was undocumented. It wasn't until I was 16 and applying for DACA when I realized what that meant. After I learned I was undocumented, I felt alone and afraid; like I should stop joining protests and retreat into the shadows. But I found hope in organizing to win permanent protections, so I put my skills right to work to provide for myself, my family, and my community. For DACA recipients like me, and the millions not protected by DACA, we need more than temporary protections. One misstep or one rogue judge can take away our livelihoods, our ability to provide for our families, and our freedom from the fear of deportation. Immigrant youth and our allies fought to win DACA over 10 years ago, and ever since, we have had to fight to protect DACA and our communities against years of right-wing attacks. **But the truth is that DACA will never be enough to keep us safe. That’s why our fight is for a pathway to citizenship.** We will do whatever it takes to win our demands until _no one_ is living under the fear of detention and deportation. But we can’t do this without the support of grassroots allies like you. **Will you make a contribution to United We Dream Action to support our fight for permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FG3trb-wmgcy52pQrV9WGQNUn3uH0ea_n_Ma6d_Dtz7GYbQnq0RSfSGh23_OlyU_gyR34fNjU0Inhi_VRautiUBla2AH_n6HSE-VQAxlcJ_SxF6HyENL81R_s6fF3DeRALK1A77Q4P0IUPsACyzAdqA4Cv4HJnGih2x30KNcGobznZN-g7gypEQibnoS5WG1M26jAjFLQli4pn77zvxegJIudwipHG59M2lgZjFYfp3ShucbtorG-r-zygSm31J0xZdGTcs_eJ1zhwD-9kIzZrpe4eXANKKdPQ6RxITYDfxvXSRjuynEKyocg4Zl9QVg0ZjfoUsUksynkWo3NYQQwUn/3v5/yEsVJhicRcyk7bJmPxGucw/h0/rl1yLVDw3ExL3FGyaTOr38rDiRgARQohBzkYRoNCF7E)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Colorado Agrees to Settle Lawsuit over Ineligible Voters; Agrees to Extensive Reporting and Review of Voter Roll Clean Up Efforts
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 3, 2023
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62885&L=29191&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sb3JhZG8tdG8tc2V0dGxlLWxhd3N1aXQtb3Zlci1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e845a2fe5ed1e96a6925b39c5cc212a29167be34e3333e9caca0d5f4f36fa391) | **[Judicial Watch Victory: Colorado Agrees to Settle Lawsuit over Ineligible Voters; Agrees to Extensive Reporting and Review of Voter Roll Clean Up Efforts](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62885&L=29191&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29sb3JhZG8tdG8tc2V0dGxlLWxhd3N1aXQtb3Zlci1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e845a2fe5ed1e96a6925b39c5cc212a29167be34e3333e9caca0d5f4f36fa391)** Judicial Watch announced recently that Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls. As part of its settlement Colorado will report to Judicial Watch on its yearly progress in cleaning up its rolls for the next six years. Since Judicial Watch filed its lawsuit, Colorado voter roll removals increased by 78%, from 172,379 to 306,303 per reporting period. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 3, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that Colorado’s secretary of state agreed to settle a lawsuit alleging that Colorado failed to remove ineligible voters from its rolls. As part of its settlement Colorado will report to Judicial Watch on its yearly progress in cleaning up its rolls for the next six years. Since Judicial Watch filed its lawsuit, Colorado voter roll removals increased by 78%, from 172,379 to 306,303 per reporting period. ---|--- | | | | | Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg last week rocketed to global celebrity with his indictment of former president Donald Trump on charges related to a 2016 hush money payment. Trump’s lawyers immediately fired back. “He did not commit any crime,” the attorneys said. “We will vigorously fight this political prosecution in court.” ---|--- | | | | | Trump is a crime victim. New York Democrats’ reckless scheme to prosecute and jail President Trump is a dangerous attack on the rule of law and a brazen attempt to rig the 2024 elections for President Biden and Democrats. Judicial Watch denounces Alvin Bragg’s corrupt attempt to make Trump a political prisoner. Congress and every responsible government official should do everything possible under the law to undo this attempt to wreck our republican form of government. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Justice Department and the State Department for extradition records of illegal alien Saul Chavez, who ran over and killed William “Denny” McCann, the brother of Judicial Watch client Brian McCann ---|--- | | | | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

Peter, can we count on you to add your name to our petition?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61446801/400114659/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.07_b1_te_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYjIxMC01ZmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESiy-2RNmKJOHxYNrZoZqzj6RSpwrwlG-Kg70bNiDXE=)
Peter,

Only three months into 2023, the United States has _already_ surpassed 125 mass shootings this year. **That means there have been more mass shootings than days in the new year.**

**Let’s be clear: Inaction on the federal level is not an option.** Enacting common sense gun reform – like strengthening background checks, closing loopholes in gun laws, and working to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous individuals – is our only path forward to keeping our communities safe.

[**If you agree that Congress needs to enact life-saving gun violence prevention legislation, can we count on you to stand with Emilia and sign our petition? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61446802/400114660/-1082709708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYjIxMC01ZmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESiy-2RNmKJOHxYNrZoZqzj6RSpwrwlG-Kg70bNiDXE=&emci=55e978e7-4bd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3921b210-5fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
| [**Sign our petition »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61446803/400114661/-1082709708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYjIxMC01ZmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESiy-2RNmKJOHxYNrZoZqzj6RSpwrwlG-Kg70bNiDXE=&emci=55e978e7-4bd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3921b210-5fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
---

This epidemic of gun violence is not new: Thousands of Americans die, every year, from gun-inflicted wounds.

**_Peter, these deaths are preventable, but extremist Republicans refuse to take legislative action to prevent them._**

MAGA Republicans are more focused on banning books than banning assault weapons, controlling reproductive healthcare decisions than controlling background checks, and offering “thoughts and prayers” than offering action and change.

Enough is enough.

[**Add your name if agree with Emilia that it’s past time to put partisan politics aside and pass life-saving gun violence prevention laws. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61446804/400114662/-1082709708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYjIxMC01ZmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESiy-2RNmKJOHxYNrZoZqzj6RSpwrwlG-Kg70bNiDXE=&emci=55e978e7-4bd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3921b210-5fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
[**Add your name »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61446805/400114663/-1082709708?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTIxYjIxMC01ZmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESiy-2RNmKJOHxYNrZoZqzj6RSpwrwlG-Kg70bNiDXE=&emci=55e978e7-4bd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3921b210-5fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
---

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: Trump Indictment (Urgent Update)
body:
I have major news to share with you...

| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpv7pvbbak7vuhm9fpeg7evpd0o80ebnts2skfko_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs)
---
Fellow patriot, I have major news to share with you... America First Legal has opened an investigation into the New York County District Attorney Alvin Bragg's Office to obtain the internal and external communications from its key leaders regarding former President Donald J. Trump. _For years now, we all have watched as the left and its allies in government and the media have weaponized the criminal justice system against conservatives ... _ **Think about this:** the contrast between the aggressive response to the Russia-Collusion-Hoax and the abusively harsh treatment of the J6 rioters, on the one hand, and the blind eye turned toward the Chinese Communist Party's payments to the Biden family and the celebration of the BLM rioters, on the other, **is undeniable and _truly dangerous_.** **Make no mistake:** America First Legal will obtain and expose records about Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg's unprecedented efforts to abuse his office to target political opponents. _**WE WILL _EXPOSE THE TRUTH_ behind this disgraceful attack on former President Donald J. Trump and on the rule of law in America. **_ **Thank you for your support >> **[**secure.winred.com/AFL **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0i1aca6u87qvc6kgnggntrqrlntm5nsred7j41g_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs) [**_DONATE NOW TO HELP US TO EXPOSE THE LEFT_ >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuq6m3ohanqu7m9d8d5vlarmu92inetav7hja7to_rp22sh2s8i66o70c3ieeor6cdh2bs) America First Legal will continue fighting to stop the left's weaponization of the criminal justice system and to hold accountable all officials at every level of government who abuse prosecutorial power to persecute their political opponents. _With sincere thanks for your crucial support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Breaking News - Statement from NPP CEO
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2846.JPG]
"Yesterday’s expulsion of duly elected officials in Tennessee only solidified for the communities we seek to serve and register to vote that their voices and votes don’t matter. As an organization that centers engaging and mobilizing communities of color, immigrant communities and the youth, our jobs were made even more difficult because of the undemocratic act in Tennessee. We will continue to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania to ensure the disenfranchisement that happened in Tennessee couldn’t possibly happen in Pennsylvania in the future. Together, we aim to prove that their voices and votes will not be ignored. "
- Kadida Kenner, New Pennsylvania Project’s CEO
News You Can Use
Pa. House Democrats' majority is on the line in DelCo race to replace Mike Zabel, who resigned amid harassment [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/election/mike-zabel-heather-boyd-katie-ford-special-election-house-20230330.html] allegations (Philadelphia Inquirer)
“A special election to replace former Democratic state Rep. Mike Zabel will determine whether Democrats keep their one-seat majority in Harrisburg – with Republican Katie Ford and Democrat Heather Boyd facing off for the seat."
Pa. primary election 2023: A complete guide to the candidates for Commonwealth and Superior Courts [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/03/pa-election-primary-2023-commonwealth-superior-court-candidates/] (Spotlight PA)
Philly has never elected a Latina citywide lawmaker. Could this year bring change? [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/election/mayor-city-council-race-philadelphia-latina-latino-voters-candidates-20230331.html] (Philadelphia Inquirer)
“For decades, one Latino lawmaker has been the norm for Philadelphia City Hall. Today, Latinos make up 15% of the city’s population, but hold just one of 17 Council seats. And the May 16 Democratic primary presents an opportunity for Philadelphia’s Latino community — and its women in particular — to finally increase their representation in City Hall.”
Your Guide To The Philadelphia Primary Election [https://thephiladelphiacitizen.org/complete-guide-primary-election-2023/] (Philadelphia Citizen)
“In a city where turnout is typically low, you’d think Philly voters would overlook a primary. But in a city that’s as one-party as we are, the primary election — specifically, the Democratic primary — largely determines who wins in the general election.”
Supporters hope Pa.’s new legislature will embrace open primaries, but at least one big hurdle remains [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/04/pa-primary-election-2023-indepedents-third-party/] (Spotlight PA)
Infographic of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/unnamed-4.png]
Policy Corner
What is a Primary Election?
In a primary election, each political party selects its candidates to run for office during the general election. Voters vote for their preferred candidates to represent their political party. The candidates who get the highest number of votes in the primary election go on to run in the general election.
Pennsylvania has closed primaries which means you have to be registered to vote with a political party in order to vote for candidates who are running in that affiliated party.
All voters can vote on:
*
constitutional
amendments,
*
ballot
questions,
and
*
any
special
election
contests
held
at
the
same
time
as
a
primary
election.
The 2023 Municipal, Local and Judicial Primary Election is on Tuesday, May 16th. Polls are open from 7am - 8pm .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPPEF%2047%20-%20Closed%20Primaries-2.png]
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Director
of
Campaigns
and
Engagement
*
Director
of
Programs
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Fellows
(part-time)
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Upcoming Events
You’re invited! A free panel on Pa.’s Supreme Court candidates and why the 2023 election matters
To further examine the court’s role in Pa. politics and policy and the candidates looking to fill a potentially pivotal vacancy, Spotlight PA is hosting a free, virtual panel discussion with experts from the New Pennsylvania Project, Pennsylvanians for Modern Courts, and members of our government team.
They’ll also discuss why all the judicial races on your 2023 ballot matter.
Join us Thursday, April 13, from 6-7 p.m. on Zoom for everything you need to know before primary Election Day.
RSVP for free here [https://inquirer.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_kZHTX-dESlKUGXqqRUVj2A#/registration]
Submit your questions in advance to: events@spotlightpa.org
For more information on the Supreme Court judicial races click here. [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/04/pa-primary-election-2023-supreme-court-judicial-races-event/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image-10.jpeg]

body:
Josh Hawley thinks corporations are people — but he’s dead wrong.
#
Peter: **Josh Hawley thinks corporations are people — but he’s dead wrong.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30775?refcode=em20230407-2966&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2966%2E614464%2E-_33b8)
**_[Fight back now, chip in to defeat Josh Hawley >>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30775?refcode=em20230407-2966&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2966%2E614464%2E-_33b8)_**
Citizens United is the GOP Super PAC that sued the FEC and forced them to give corporations even more power to buy off our politicians and influence our elections.
So when Josh Hawley celebrated their endorsement, he showed us exactly who he really is — just another corrupt politician willing to let massive corporations spend unlimited amounts of money to gut our communities and undermine our democracy.
**Lucas Kunce is building a movement to defeat Josh Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs so that when he’s in the U.S. Senate, you’ll always know he’s fighting for real working people** — not the giant corporations and political elites that have spent decades tearing up our country. And that’s why we’re reaching out to you today, Peter.
Every day and every dollar between now and Election Day is another opportunity for us to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and expose Josh Hawley for the fraud he is. But the only way we’ll be able to do that, AND fight back against the vicious attacks that are already coming from Hawley + GOP insiders, is with a flood of early grassroots support from real people just like you. So please:
**[Will you chip in your first donation right now so we’ll have the resources to reach voters with Lucas’ message and replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate next year? Our campaign is fueled by real supporters just like you, so we mean it when we say any amount makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30775?refcode=em20230407-2966&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2966%2E614464%2E-_33b8)**

| | When I arrived, Scotty was still in trauma care, and I was informed that he would never be able to serve his nation again in uniform. They even asked me to sign a document, right there on the spot, consenting to Scotty’s immediate discharge from the Army. **_I refused. _** Since that day I've made it my mission to ensure Scotty, and every veteran gets the benefits and care they earned.
---

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, My name is Tiffany Smiley and I wanted to tell you a little bit about myself. I grew up in Pasco, Washington where I helped out on my family’s farm and learned the value of hard work. | | | | | I went on to play soccer at Whitworth College, where I also studied to become a nurse so I could pursue my passion of helping others in need. | | I married my high school sweetheart Scotty, who went on to serve our country in the United States Army while I started my nursing career. | | | | | In 2005, I received a call that changed both our lives forever, Scotty was severely wounded by a suicide bomber in Iraq, causing him to fall into a coma and permanently lose sight in both of his eyes. I immediately booked a flight for Walter Reed Medical Center to be by Scotty’s side. | | | | | When I arrived, Scotty was still in trauma care, and I was informed that he would never be able to serve his nation again in uniform. They even asked me to sign a document, right there on the spot, consenting to Scotty’s immediate discharge from the Army. I refused. Since that day I've made it my mission to ensure Scotty, and every veteran gets the benefits and care they earned. Scotty went on to serve as America’s first blind active-duty Army officer, breaking barriers for many who followed along the way. | | | | | It’s not every day you hear about American women going up against the U.S. Military. But we defied the government in a big way— and won. We stood up to a broken bureaucracy because it was the right thing to do. I will always stand up for our heroes and continue being an advocate for our veterans. In 2007, we welcomed our first child. While Scotty will never be able to ‘see’ our children’s faces, he’s always been an incredible father and hero to our boys. | | | | | Now, our family is taking on a new challenge. I'm staying in the fight to help families across the country achieve the American Dream. I will take the same fight and optimistic spirit I’ve shown throughout my life to help families secure a better life. I believe that now, more than ever, Americans need a voice to find solutions to their unique problems and end the partisan gridlock in Congress. My family began this journey in the halls of Walter Reed and we look forward to continuing this journey with you across the country. I hope you will join us in the fight to better our democracy and stand up for working-class Americans everywhere. I know you’ll do the right thing Sincerely, Tiffany Smiley Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | You are receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com Signing up for our emails is the best way to receive the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the National Republican Senatorial Committee. Thank you for joining the Team. It’s because of patriotic supporters from all across the nation that we’ve been able to FIGHT BACK against the Left, we need YOUR help. TEXT WIN to 55404 to start receiving text messages from the National Republican Senatorial Committee. If you want to be one of the FIRST people to get the latest updates on the National Republican Senatorial Committee, please follow us on and You can also sign up to receive from the NRSC and key members of the Republican Party. If you would like to opt out of important campaign updates like this, please If you would like to give feedback to the NRSC, Thank you again and we appreciate your support. clean_body: Here is your opportunity to sign up today for FREE. | | | | | Dear Reader, Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is ACTUALLY important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a FREE newsletter called where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to . In today's world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. At , we eliminate the bias and just deliver the facts of today's news and allowing you to reach your own conclusion. Get delivered to your inbox every Monday through Friday so you do not miss out on anything. Our team summarizes every story in a couple sentences or less and offers you a link to the full story so you can read deeper on what matters to you. covers a wide array of topics, so you stay informed on what is important. Politics, sports, market watch, scientific advancements, etc. we cover it all, so you stay informed. Join The Flyover today to cruise the news and just land the facts. % The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: We need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=83359135d0&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

We need you. I know times are tough, but we need you on our team to have any chance of making a difference this year and next in Washington State. That is why I am personally asking you to [renew your Sustaining Membership](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=112b213ceb&e=6a281f566d) – [or become a new Sustaining member](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=abcadbf800&e=6a281f566d) – of the Washington State Republican Party. We are building a strong and vibrant Republican Party, but we will need your [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8b3b1dc4a3&e=6a281f566d) to keep growing and expanding to achieve our ambitious goals.

The stakes couldn't be higher in this election cycle. Democrats in Olympia are pushing forward their own aggressive and radical agenda, and we need [your help](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fdc6d76811&e=6a281f566d) to stop them before it is too late for our great state.
Last week, the State Supreme Court upheld the Democrats' Income Tax on Capital Gains. Now there are bills to lower the initial threshold, expand the rate of the tax, and apply similar taxes to other forms of income. Without your help, the Democrats will achieve their stated goal of a progressive statewide income tax for all. And that is far from all, Democrats are pushing anti-family, anti-second amendment, and anti-public safety legislation at an aggressive pace.
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9a7b18d698&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By [renewing your Sustaining Membership today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c500363238&e=6a281f566d), you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

But we need to act fast. The Democrats are already ramping up their efforts to win elections in 2023 AND the critical 2024 elections. We can’t afford to wait - we need to match their energy with our own, and we can only do that with your investment.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=073f34d877&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e3483033fc&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| [Your contribution of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=46bdf5b275&e=6a281f566d)[$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=187ea311d6&e=6a281f566d),[ $25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=58cf8e754d&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d66773043d&e=6a281f566d),[ or more](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0778846087&e=6a281f566d) will make a real difference in our fight to keep Washington State out of the hands of radical socialists. [Become a card-carrrying Member of the Washington State Republican Party today by joining the party as a sustaining member.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4537b03dd2&e=6a281f566d) This card embodies your willingness to stand up for Republican priorities and take back our state.

We can't afford to sit on the sidelines - we need you to [join the team today.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a2c1d403c5&e=6a281f566d)

Best regards,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9997d78674&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---

---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._

body:
#
Derek —
We’ll be blunt: National security AND abortion access are under siege right now. If you’ve got a minute, let us explain.
Just a few weeks ago, the Pentagon rolled out a policy funding travel costs for Servicemembers who seek abortions.
In response, Senator Tommy Tuberville held up more than 160 Military promotions. These are generals and flag officers — critical, senior leaders.
Most people thought Tuberville would let this go, but he hasn’t. And every day he continues is a day that Republicans grow bolder. We all know their goal is to ban abortion entirely.
But now they’re threatening our national defense by delaying these promotions. And worse, their efforts to deny our women Servicemembers critical health care undermines Military readiness. That puts us all at risk.
If the GOP gets a majority in the Senate, there’s no telling just how extreme they’ll be in attacking our Military and our abortion rights. Remember: Our Democratic majority comes down to just ONE SEAT.
And Derek, we’re on defense in every competitive race in the country next year. _There is no margin for error._
VoteVets is gonna fight like hell to hold the Senate, but we need to start now. To do that, we’re launching the **VOTEVETS 2024 PATRIOT FUND** to kick start our efforts in competitive Senate races around the country.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61449074/400121933/1010378950?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE3YWVmMGUtNjVkNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X6XSvL0ET_jIAaKZblC0zKurHjLvsFsTNOL0fOv7YrQ=) Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support ahead of last week's FEC fundraising deadline. I'm proud to share that we met (and even exceeded!) our fundraising goal for the quarter. Thanks to you, we're headed into the next phase of our campaign in a position of strength.

One big challenge I'm grappling with is running for Congress while also continuing my legislative work in Sacramento. You may not know this, but I'm a chair on two committees -- Transportation and the Select Committee on Biodiversity. I'm also very active on five others.

This may be a bit unconventional, but when I made the decision to run, I knew that I wanted to continue advancing our shared policy goals. There are a number of important bills I'm working on I'd like to see to completion. And since public service is a centerpiece of this campaign, it's important that I continue to serve!

Your support -- contributing in response to emails like this one -- gives me the ability to continue passing good legislation for our community while also running a strong campaign. This effort is powered by individual donors and without a cent from corporate PACs, so please know that your donations make a huge difference and are truly appreciated.

Thanks again, friend.

Laura

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Are you paying attention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here.

| |
---
| | | I'll be blunt.

One of the **_most critical_** deadlines of 2023 is here. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to our America First agenda and hello to 2 more years of Biden and Schumer's destructive plans.

**Here 's where we stand:**
\- Our border remains wide open.
\- Crime is rampant.
\- Inflation is devastating hard-working Americans.
\- Big Tech continues to censor our voices.
\- Democrats continue to assault election integrity voter laws.
\- Indoctrination in our education system remains unchecked.
\- and Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour with the biggest liberal, megadonors in their elitist circles to __**DOUBLE DOWN**__ on their destructive agenda!

Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, and our majority in the house is on thin ice. If Democrats keep fundraising at this pace, 2024 is already set in stone. clean_body: One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here. | | | | | I'll be blunt. One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to our America First agenda and hello to 2 more years of Biden and Schumer's destructive plans. Here 's where we stand: \- Our border remains wide open. \- Crime is rampant. \- Inflation is devastating hard-working Americans. \- Big Tech continues to censor our voices. \- Democrats continue to assault election integrity voter laws. \- Indoctrination in our education system remains unchecked. \- and Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour with the biggest liberal, megadonors in their elitist circles to DOUBLE DOWN on their destructive agenda! Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, and our majority in the house is on thin ice. If Democrats keep fundraising at this pace, 2024 is already set in stone. We must fight back, and we must start NOW. "Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crush this deadline!" | | | | | | | | | | Every dollar counts. Please do your part to secure a better future for our country! | | Thank you for your support, Kevin McCarthy | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Peter,

**Last night Tennesse Republicans voted to expel 2 Black lawmakers for taking a stand against the gun violence happening in their communities.**

What they didn’t do was expel the white lawmaker who took the exact same stand and was accused of the exact same things.

**This is racism, plain and simple._But can we be surprised that racism is alive and well in the state that founded the KKK?_ **

Tennesse Republicans should be ashamed of their disgusting behavior.

For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to **Build Black Political Power** and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for _all_ Americans — **and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that moments like this make it even clearer that this fight is more important than ever.**

Here at The Collective PAC, our mission is achieving political equity and fixing the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected office throughout our nation, through investments in Black voters and Black candidates up and down the ballot.

[We’re committed to electing more brave Black representatives, like Justin Jones and Justin Pearson, who will stand up for what’s right — at any cost. Will you chip in $10 or any amount to help us?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oXtxrpByOksal4o4-OGwKQVtXxEBvshBx2z3yRMu0Z1b-JO6H0WFJf44Epoq7AsUWUrfob0BYnvHfekiA7ofnR7gywlIuxBUH6GdBvqH4RrJyRbSVa4EcRv4Aux_9OWERx1glXv6qVi6V48N3awbaBLa-UlTw4os26BmbWdiqCuEjRE78PfVNVSLAJG3aoHnsVgxFAS_O1_tUBC8Orhu1vTbzCR3EF_cMFhln98wfLUhxJKPowR5wW90fUhH5illUk9txzmrQQNCKuPHVivuiH5fm8BU4gRbdRcS-Snnw-PFjRzhg1xI0slkkR4O9IFR4BmZOVQV4KdlrZiKvDT4_HbUngqfRlqhgqiCdAagmOpU/3v5/_z9bAsacTkqeVEJIEDPuhw/h3/vCciU-bGO-eFS1zBuDDcKgZ5P2dMhH8NLY_CYTXUnvQ)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | | Peter, Last night Tennesse Republicans voted to expel 2 Black lawmakers for taking a stand against the gun violence happening in their communities. What they didn’t do was expel the white lawmaker who took the exact same stand and was accused of the exact same things. This is racism, plain and simple.But can we be surprised that racism is alive and well in the state that founded the KKK? Tennesse Republicans should be ashamed of their disgusting behavior. For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to Build Black Political Power and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for all Americans — and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that moments like this make it even clearer that this fight is more important than ever. Here at The Collective PAC, our mission is achieving political equity and fixing the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected office throughout our nation, through investments in Black voters and Black candidates up and down the ballot. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We are never going to stop fighting, Peter. This is too important to ignore All of us @ The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

|
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4qb2uqre2nv2tn33mfci235q1rhkp6d9utqsif8_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjg68oj2c1h2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zodeb5pb7mc2i5asfru3mohls6lmirg4hci4sibg_rp22sh2s8i66o70cjg68oj2c1h2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: Jon Tester
subject: damn proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467872/400161676/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4044-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTllNDFkYS04N2Q1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnaZdLmAGnJeADn1n5kwvo4k213SAoPSSAGd9TJf5tk=)
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**
**[_Can you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our fundraising goal. Anything you can give helps._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467873/400161677/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4044-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTllNDFkYS04N2Q1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnaZdLmAGnJeADn1n5kwvo4k213SAoPSSAGd9TJf5tk=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hey folks, Jon Tester here. I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts. I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet. These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win. | | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[ADD YOUR NAME: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532669:6cNTveGXN:m:1:3331421248:FEB4BC518C29A090C3503BCAED514F76:r "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532669:6cNTveGXN:m:1:3331421248:FEB4BC518C29A090C3503BCAED514F76:r "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**

Thank you,

House GOP

The RNC may require presidential candidates to reach a grassroots donor benchmark to participate in debates! That means without YOUR support, Nikki Haley could be disqualified.

Make no mistake, the Washington establishment would love nothing more than to knock her down from this key campaign platform. And if Nikki is silenced, the Washington establishment wins. Friend,
Soros and his prosecutor thought my ARREST would make me SHUT DOWN our presidential campaign and retire from politics.
They thought I would throw in the towel and give up on running for the White House in 2024.
_**But let me be as clear as possible: I will NEVER give up on our movement.**_
My arrest ONLY STRENGTHENED my resolve to save our great nation.
If we allow extortionists to manipulate and interfere in our elections, we will lose America for good.
So... to our many, many opponents who thought that my ARREST would finally be the “end of Trump,” I say **I’M NOT GOING ANYWHERE!_NOT NOW – AND NOT EVER._**
_Our_ campaign will WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE IN 2024 – AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

body:

**California:** Some of the strongest gun laws in the country.
**Florida:** Some of the weakest gun laws in the country.
**The results:** Florida has significantly higher firearm death rates, violent crime rates and property crime rates than California.
Strong gun laws work. Don’t believe the GOP nonsense. What Ron DeSantis is doing is weak, pathetic pandering.

Peter, every morning I wake up, I've got one thing on my mind: **SERVING THE AMERICAN PEOPLE**.

I'm not saying that to sound corny; I'm saying it because deep down, I know that we're in a battle for America's soul. | | Hey Peter, do you know who the biggest winner of the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is? It’s not climate radicals, American leftists, woke asset managers, or even Joe Biden. **It’s China.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=98d55063054b46cc9f26e9b2ce41751b&_e=Jzqy8iO9aHDyhtAV_DTaW61ywAjOUfLIL3t4xRiWH7JLWnY6pYeTNSBK47fAixz6fTaByqlq41RLn6sRrxhGs0LEdNmgRuhSL2F5mEMK_b2rWu116scmTzUXy9zztb9vE_P8OEKA1fO3Qa4tEBWBSogu8pupNkIjyPPFHGg5zc317yA6lBGhXSZqCeKLbSpo3TUIqKCgNU-UKwfHnz-EucV1ck-KtUqYUSe9wBg6LphX1VamRqsWThKz7bdY2GxOTlhjEr-wE6R-UUd-8wr_GH-wKLWO-6T0J4F8lwFfhAWqVwYFVvRT-IkVucITxi8_48M2CAYjzakrDJJ-8FZjqfrHbSPYbEZ7N_82xcZsMZ6t6Jr0Sptr_jIOc5VU3_Yq)
---
The ESG agenda is funded and supported by Chinese firms and the Chinese Communist Party, which wish to weaken America from within. **How are they achieving this?**
1. Attempting to shut down access to America's vast natural resources, making us dependent on their foreign energy and lithium.
2. Recreating their social credit system for American businesses, which prioritizes politics over profitability.
3. Widening the division among Americans by injecting “woke” politics into every facet of American life.

**[STOP THEIR ANTI-AMERICA AGENDA: FIGHT ESG >>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=98d55063054b46cc9f26e9b2ce41751b&_e=Jzqy8iO9aHDyhtAV_DTaW61ywAjOUfLIL3t4xRiWH7JLWnY6pYeTNSBK47fAixz6fTaByqlq41RLn6sRrxhGs0LEdNmgRuhSL2F5mEMK_b2rWu116scmTzUXy9zztb9vE_P8OEKA1fO3Qa4tEBWBSogu8pupNkIjyPPFHGg5zc317yA6lBGhXSZqCeKLbSpo3TUIqKCgNU-UKwfHnz-EucV1ck-KtUqYUSe9wBg6LphOsHZ4ikNhUx-43b4F_PNuV4eNQOju6wzaL2gzBT6otRHy6xU2rXgNG2ty_SqecvDR7jl3fvwrAbDih3Pc1YH0jbjv5FYYsnpvgwdqhgAjpomk5xzA1-0yzhhapIcC77lnjK_Xeywev2pyapJV2635)**With the help of grassroots conservatives and lawmakers, Heritage Action is EXPOSING China’s ESG agenda for what it is—**socialism with a flowery name. ** Unfortunately, many Americans are still unaware of the dangers that ESG poses to their everyday lives. clean_body: Many Americans are still unaware of the dangers that ESG poses to their everyday lives.| | | | | Hey Peter, do you know who the biggest winner of the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is? It’s not climate radicals, American leftists, woke asset managers, or even Joe Biden. It’s China. The ESG agenda is funded and supported by Chinese firms and the Chinese Communist Party, which wish to weaken America from within. How are they achieving this? 1. Attempting to shut down access to America's vast natural resources, making us dependent on their foreign energy and lithium. 2. Recreating their social credit system for American businesses, which prioritizes politics over profitability. 3. Widening the division among Americans by injecting “woke” politics into every facet of American life. the help of grassroots conservatives and lawmakers, Heritage Action is EXPOSING China’s ESG agenda for what it is—socialism with a flowery name. Unfortunately, many Americans are still unaware of the dangers that ESG poses to their everyday lives. That’s why we’re calling on YOU to help us spread the message to as many Americans as possible. | Team — Just a few weeks ago, the Mississippi State Legislature threw out legislation that would have restored the state’s ballot measure process. **2 years in a row now** , the state House has refused to reinstate the use of voter-driven ballot measures — a punitive move after voters had passed a marijuana legalization measure in 2021 — _even though 72% of Mississippi voters want to see their ballot measure process reinstated._ **Not only is this a HUGE attack on democracy, _but this move is in direct opposition to the will of Mississippi voters!!_** _So, team, we want to know if you agree with the majority of Mississippians: _ **Do you think Mississippi’s ballot measure process should be restored?** [YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61452131/400129918/1272919108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGI1Y2JmNS02OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lVB11aKSyv89T-nhaB10Zc8S9ETJAt3Gwd-PpK7nVc0=&emci=427197c2-63d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6db5cbf5-69d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) name: Team AOC
subject: Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Tennessee Republicans expelled two Black Democratic members of the State House for protesting gun violence days after a devastating school shooting in Nashville.
#
Last night, Tennessee Republicans expelled two Black Democratic members of the State House for protesting gun violence just days after the devastating school shooting in Nashville. Their white colleague, who also took part in the protest, was not expelled.
The whole world is watching Tennessee today — Republicans may think they’ve won, but their fascism is only further radicalizing and awakening an earthquake of youth organizing, both in the South and across the nation.
[Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson are speaking out against GOP fascism, and we need to support them in this critical moment. Will you split a $6 contribution between Reps. Jones and Pearson right now to demonstrate solidarity with their brave actions calling for gun control?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230407-tn.lU9Muq&refcode=em20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230407-tn.lU9Muq&refcode=em20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)**
Republicans are trying to scare students, Democratic representatives, and anyone who disagrees with them into silence.
But Gen Z voters will not be silenced — if you thought youth organizing was strong, just wait for what’s coming because our movement will continue to grow:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230407-tn.lU9Muq&refcode=em20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)
What's happening in Tennessee is dangerous and undemocratic. Leaders like Justin Jones and Justin Pearson are leading the fight against gun violence and standing up to injustice, no matter the cost.
[Donate now to stand with Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson against fascism in Tennessee.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230407-tn.lU9Muq&refcode=em20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230407-tn?refcode=em20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&t=23&refcode2=4098_2526796_iUgJJN&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230407-4098-P_FND_SPL_GRM&t=24&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4098%2E2526796%2EiUgJJN)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “What side are you on”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter — last
night, two Black Democratic members of the Tennessee state House were
expelled because they protested gun violence in the days after the recent
mass shooting. Their white colleague who protested was not expelled.

This is beyond outrageous.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133293?refcode=em20230407-28367&t=1001&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm ][IMG]
Summer Lee is speaking truth to power on this injustice. We must rise up
to speak out against this blatant fascism and support the two
Representatives who were expelled, Justin Pearson and Justin Jones.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133293?refcode=em20230407-28367&t=1002&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm ]Will you split a $3 contribution right now between Rep.
Justin Pearson, Rep. Justin Jones, and Justice Democrats? We need to
support these two leaders and your contribution to JD will help us move
the needle on common-sense gun reform.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133293?refcode=em20230407-28367&t=1021&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm ]Contribute $3

Thank you for taking action today,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230407-28367-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28367_1203867_7v8ZYm&akid=28367%2E1203867%2E7v8ZYm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. | | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SAyrhjYQcAJ57dxULptAOg&sysid=1)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ORsvDLEUOHg0IV%2bCh%2fSEXA&sysid=1)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to **[sign up today for FREE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654361%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f30vt%2fKsk0eXwWX47Hik%2fw&sysid=1)**. In today’s world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. Our team summarizes every story in a couple sentences or less and offers you a link to the full story so you can read deeper on what matters to you. _[The Flyover](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SAyrhjYQcAJ57dxULptAOg&sysid=1)_ covers a wide array of topics, so you stay informed on what is important. subject: Support the expelled Black legislators in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
What happened in Tennessee yesterday was an attempt to silence us -- to
silence our movement. But it ain’t going to happen.

You've probably seen the news. In response to the recent, tragic
mass-shooting in Nashville, three legislators in the Tennessee House spoke
out. The Tennessee Three raised their voices with students calling for
action against the public health crisis of gun violence.

Two of those legislators are Black men. The other is a White woman.
Yesterday the Tennessee legislature expelled the Black men.

Today I’m helping to raise funds for the legislators who were expelled. If
you’re fired up and in a position to help power our movement -- and to
support these brave leaders -- please rush a donation to them using the
links below.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18928?t=1001&akid=3132%2E346206%2E8TQE1G ]Click here to split a donation between Rep. Justin Jones and Rep.
Justin Pearson.

Thank you for standing up.

-Charles

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** Democrats’ Agenda Delivering New Jobs, Investing Billions in Hoosiers’ Futures President Biden and his ambitious agenda is paying off for Hoosiers and their families. Since the beginning of 2021, over $11 billion in private investment has [flooded into Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61458092/400134649/-1536175135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2YxMzEyMi02ZWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpJEq-gsTnppdgFjC8hcu5_qC63pfi9bGlqePHotZuk=&emci=ccee7938-a5d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=67f13122-6ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). Companies are using the benefits of the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act and the Inflation Reduction Act to invest in Indiana.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61458093/400134651/-958656576?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2YxMzEyMi02ZWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpJEq-gsTnppdgFjC8hcu5_qC63pfi9bGlqePHotZuk=&emci=ccee7938-a5d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=67f13122-6ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)****[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61458094/400134652/-958656576?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2YxMzEyMi02ZWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpJEq-gsTnppdgFjC8hcu5_qC63pfi9bGlqePHotZuk=&emci=ccee7938-a5d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=67f13122-6ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)** World-class companies are employing more Hoosiers. In the electric vehicle sector, four companies are opening plants across the state, including General Motors, Stellantis, and Entek. A number of biomanufacturing firms are investing in the state, including Evonik, List Bio, Bunge, Skywater and Catalent. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Democrats’ Agenda Delivering New Jobs, Investing Billions in Hoosiers’ Futures President Biden and his ambitious agenda is paying off for Hoosiers and their families. Since the beginning of 2021, over $11 billion in private investment has . Companies are using the benefits of the bipartisan Infrastructure and Jobs Act and the Inflation Reduction Act to invest in Indiana. World-class companies are employing more Hoosiers. In the electric vehicle sector, four companies are opening plants across the state, including General Motors, Stellantis, and Entek. A number of biomanufacturing firms are investing in the state, including Evonik, List Bio, Bunge, Skywater and Catalent. In addition, Eli Lilly is expanding its presence in the state with a $2.1 billion biomanufacturing project. See INDems’ release by . ** Four Attorneys Assigned to Abortion Litigation in AG Todd Rokita’s Office Resign Attorney General Todd Rokita and his culture war agenda against medical professionals is costing taxpayers and preventing the office from tackling real issues. This week, that four attorneys left the AG’s office, including one who had worked for the state for a decade. All four attorneys had a role in Rokita’s litigation against Dr. Kaitlin Bernard. INDems oppose all efforts by the AG’s office to go after doctors and criminalize reproductive care. Rokita is costing taxpayers time and money, while also stripping fundamental rights from Hoosiers. from the Indiana Capital Chronicle. ** Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, by Rep. Mitch Gore (Indianapolis) to ban deadly machine gun switches gained final legislative approval. The bill now heads to Governor Eric Holcomb’s desk to be signed into law. Earlier in the legislative session, : “By adding these devices to the definition of 'machine gun,' those found in unlawful possession would face up to a level 5 felony. With that deterrent in place, we'll hopefully see a decrease in the number of fatal and non-fatal shootings in Indiana.” Rep. Gore and Statehouse Democrats are taking meaningful steps to help law enforcement curb gun violence. **** ISTA is Packing the Statehouse on April 13! The Indiana State Teachers Association is mobilizing on Thursday, April 13 to pack the Indiana Statehouse and stand up for teachers and students across our state. The Republican supermajority is failing to address our state’s teacher shortage and is proposing irresponsible expansions to our state’s charter schools. Stand with educators and make your voice heard by at the statehouse! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Tuesday, April 11: “What is a Democratic Precinct Chair?”: Learn the responsibilities and importance of being a precinct committeeperson. Also learn tips to organize in your precinct year-round. Register by . Wednesday, April 12: “How to Build Your Political Campaign Communications Plan”: Hear how to develop a successful communications plan for your campaign, and why it is important. Register by . Allen County Democrats Hosting Multiple April Events Allen County Democrats are organizing and hosting multiple events throughout April. On Saturday, join State Sen. Andrea Hunley for a breakfast meeting. On Wednesday, , come grab a seat at the ACDP Luncheon Club at Cosmos Restaurant. name: Jon Tester

body:
| Hello,

My team says we need to raise $100,000 by our critical fundraising deadline. So, [**before I ask you to chip in a donation**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43007?t=6&akid=6960%2E878179%2ENsY24P), here are three reasons why:
1. **Sabato’s Crystal Ball ranks Montana a TOSS-UP.** The path to the Senate majority runs right through Montana.

2. **I’m one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators.** Political Experts are saying my seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help us.

3. **Over $70 MILLION was spent in 2018.** So we’re gearing up for the most expensive and competitive race Montana has ever seen.

Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back. Please:

[**Split a donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign right now to help us reach our critical $100,000 goal. We’re running out of time. Every dollar will help us block Mitch McConnell from taking over the Senate »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43007?t=7&akid=6960%2E878179%2ENsY24P) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43008?t=8&akid=6960%2E878179%2ENsY24P)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Indicting President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)
|

Peter,

For the first time in American history, we are witnessing the arrest of a former president of the United States. Again, this has NEVER happened before in American history. NEVER.

**President Trump's arrest all but guarantees politics in America will never be the same again.**

I'm sending this to you now because President Trump and Republicans in Congress need your help, now more than EVER before. The Witch hunt continues with no signs of slowing down. They're going to continue to try and destroy Donald Trump forever! **[Please, send an urgent gift that we'll use to come to President Trump's defense.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)**

[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP
STOP THE WITCH HUNT ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)
For nearly eight years, Democrat politicians at every level of government have tried and failed to **SILENCE Donald J. Trump**. They hate everything he stands for, the people he speaks for; they hate the man himself. The fact of the matter is: DEMOCRATS are scared that President TRUMP will be the Republican nominee for president in 2024, something which they just cannot allow to happen.

_**So, what do they do?**_

They resurrect a case brought against the President 7 years ago - which the Department of Justice declined to prosecute with the hope that they can make the charges stick this time.

**This is as political as it gets.** President Trump's indictment perfectly encapsulates why he ran for the White House in the first place: Power is concentrated in the hands of too few individuals who do not believe every American deserves equal protection under the law.

So much for a case that in March 2022, the _New York Times_ reported had "_unraveled_."

We need to stand with President Trump today. We need to show him that we have his back. We need to send a message to all the lunatic leftists that we're united against them in their quest to destroy him. **[Chip in right now, and let's send a message to Democrats: This will backfire on you, BIGLY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)**.

[**CHIP IN
STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)
Democrats have promulgated false narratives against President Trump since before he was elected. They've spent millions of YOUR tax dollars on bogus investigations that have all been debunked. **Now, their political theater has reached a dangerous new low.**

If the arrest of former President Trump infuriates you as much as it does me, **[I'm asking you to chip in any amount right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)**.

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532649:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532650:JXH0KeGNx:m:1:3331421248:91DF2739BA9CD479A280AA1BDC7B7451:r)

---

Delaware, OH 43015

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

In new bombshell reporting from Pro Publica,
Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas was exposed for taking 20 years'
worth of expensive vacations on yachts and other luxury travel from
right-wing billionaire Harlan Crow -- all without disclosing anything.

In addition to being a Republican mega donor, Harlan Crow has also given
to corporate Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin and funded
organizations controlled by Clarence's wife, Ginni -- who was heavily
involved with the election denial campaign that led to January 6th.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230407_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1011&akid=4186%2E5885482%2EiRcHDO ]Clarence Thomas' failure to disclose these massive gifts undermines our
judicial system and the rule of law. Add your name to demand Democrats
begin impeachment proceedings against Clarence Thomas to remove him from
the Supreme Court!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230407_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1012&akid=4186%2E5885482%2EiRcHDO ]IMPEACH THOMAS

These revelations about Clarence Thomas are far from surprising. Still,
they offer a window into how the economic elite use their wealth and power
to skew the justice and political system in their favor.

Funding extravagant trips for Justice Thomas allowed Harlan Crow and
others who joined their vacations access to a Supreme Court justice with
the power to make judicial precedents and rule on cases directly related
to their businesses.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/impeach-thomas?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230407_FR_ImpeachThomas_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_ImpeachThomas&t=1013&akid=4186%2E5885482%2EiRcHDO ]Clarence Thomas is an active threat to our democracy and must be
removed from the Supreme Court immediately. Sign here if you agree!

When we organize, we win.
