name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team -- it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because President Biden's approval hit its highest point in almost a YEAR, **_and that could be a leading indicator of a MASSIVE blue wave!_**

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s **_critical_** that we have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But I just checked our President Biden approval poll and didn’t see your response -- in fact, without hearing your answers, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll in Pennsylvania!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10395%2E9716520%2EPSVkTT)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10395%2E9716520%2EPSVkTT)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230407-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10395%2E9716520%2EPSVkTT)
---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=10395_9716520_PSVkTT&akid=10395%2E9716520%2EPSVkTT)**.

name: Nikki Haley Alert
subject: READ NOW: RNC rule change pending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA Fund, Inc
body:
The establishment is giddy about this
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r) January 27, 2023
The RNC may require presidential candidates to reach a grassroots donor benchmark to participate in debates! That means without YOUR support, Nikki Haley could be disqualified.

Make no mistake, the Washington establishment would love nothing more than to knock her down from this key campaign platform. And if Nikki is silenced, the Washington establishment wins. Don't let that happen! [**With your donation, you can help her qualify.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)
**[**HELP NIKKI HERE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)**
Nikki has a STRONG base of supporters, but unless Team Haley puts some skin in the game, she could be kept off the stage!

[**Can Nikki count on you to chip in before 11:59 pm?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)
**[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532504:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)**
---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532503:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)
**[**CLAIM YOUR SPOT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532503:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)** |
Not everyone can say they were on Team Haley from the very beginning, and we want YOU to be part of Nikki's journey to the White House every step of the way!

We're only adding new names to our Team Haley Founding Members Club until midnight tonight so secure your spot NOW.

As a member of Team Haley, you'll get exclusive updates from the campaign trail and be FIRST to know about upcoming events and announcements. While Nikki is on the road, you'll be right alongside for the ride with a front-row view of all the action!

[**Just make a gift before midnight to unlock your access!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532503:JNMSdeGND:m:1:3365131770:7EA29952C85B15D1BD62F38C729B4135:r)

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Are you paying attention?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
One of the most critical deadlines of 2023 is here.

| |
---
| | | I'll be blunt.

One of the **_most critical_** deadlines of 2023 is here. If we miss this goal, you can say goodbye to our America First agenda and hello to 2 more years of Biden and Schumer's destructive plans.

**Here 's where we stand:**
\- Our border remains wide open.
\- Crime is rampant.
\- Inflation is devastating hard-working Americans.
\- Big Tech continues to censor our voices.
\- Democrats continue to assault election integrity voter laws.
\- Indoctrination in our education system remains unchecked.
\- and Pelosi just took Hakeem Jeffries on a national fundraising tour with the biggest liberal, megadonors in their elitist circles to __**DOUBLE DOWN**__ on their destructive agenda!

Are you paying attention? The cards are stacked against us, and our majority in the house is on thin ice. If Democrats keep fundraising at this pace, 2024 is already set in stone. We must fight back, and we must start NOW. **[Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crush our deadline!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40a00f8018b94594857ef4c107e75c92&_e=WU3ELTCaiWgArEHAHTkOfCdfQqhMZMCmTVO6Gwu4h87jsvH2eP8Md1-1kpiehoehr24yte-20pXCX22nrUotHtVKoVDGmeYMWdt42Q1WOwBCtOA9AMcTGbdcpFQiKaz1dAUZHCMpBz1mwlg9kJOi9U6i8EvfBMkpqcb_HkZGtNEMZNcSEQyNvgHAngtiKt1dSUgvJ8bH9qnYatTT6BHV2yHiGmyJLIZ_fNyEYpEHw7Atk8G9L69F4UCjFfExcWsanAIUSSAnnM8pr13rDV4wuGq1JvNCzPbwnX13VrriFA5TBj-el09YLmS401tH2XeAbJxEV72UIp4BeRGK2IEpdHHxvRLIbX9LkTB8TNndZQzpe46BcfH_DTAVldxN9f27BwQLHSp7Ba77XZw1EROmqgqiBkC8T9KitIbBpC3AlCrX9gHZgHXttIGUFSEwg9IuS70uWZFglyQuO5JWvuv2vQ%3D%3D "Please rush $15 by midnight to help us crush this deadline!")**

clean_body: | = | Yesterday, two young Black Democrats from the Tennessee state legislature were EXPELLED after joining student-led protests on gun violence. And it gets worse. The TN House GOP advanced a bill granting permission for teachers to carry guns in schools throughout the state. Not only are the GOP’s actions dangerous and anti-democratic, but they’re also hypocritical. While children become victims of gun violence, TN Republicans have sat silent and prioritized banning books and drag queens. = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Justin Pearson and Justin Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends, democracy in Tennessee is under attack.
**Yesterday, two young Black lawmakers from the Tennessee House of Representatives, Justin Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled from the state legislature in retaliation for attending a protest against gun violence.**
Rep. Gloria Johnson who also attended the protests was spared from being ousted. Why? She said that it "might have to do with the color of my skin."
Instead of focusing on the real issue of banning assault weapons in the wake of a horrific Nashville school shooting, Tennessee is focused on dismantling the right to assemble under the first amendment, disenfranchising marginalized voters across the state, and keeping white supremacy alive and well.
_This is unprecedented._ Tennessee Republicans have just proved that they are not afraid to abuse their power for political retribution.
[**Democracy is under attack in Tennessee and we need to fight back. Please rush a donation between Justin Pearson, Justin Jones, and The Long Run to fight back against this attack on democracy.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-pearson-jones._034rH&refcode=em230407-1-t1&t=1&akid=4340%2E196590%2Es5zHyo)
In solidarity,
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-pearson-jones._034rH&refcode=em230407-1-t1&t=2&akid=4340%2E196590%2Es5zHyo)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4340%2E196590%2Es5zHyo). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4340%2E196590%2Es5zHyo)

Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4340%2E196590%2Es5zHyo)

Milwaukee, WI 53201

Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here: | = Friends of Helen Gym PO Box 11766 Philadelphia, PA 19101 United States | mailto:info@helengym.com Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym

name: Katie Porter
subject: OC family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20702%2E3422442%2EqX28yp)
Derek,
I’m proud to say my kids and I are an Orange County family. But I grew up without the sprawling outdoor malls and beaches Southern California has to offer. I was born and raised in Iowa on my family’s farm.
As a kid in rural Iowa, I participated in 4-H and Future Farmers of America. I also saw the farm crisis of the 1980’s destroy livelihoods and change our community forever. I still remember the traffic jam when our town’s bank closed, and families rushed to pull out their money. Not long after, my own dad had to leave farming and went to work at the town’s reopened bank.
**I saw firsthand the power both private corporations and government had to change lives, for better or for worse.**
I know how forgotten many rural Californians feel living in areas where Democrats hardly show up. And I know how policies that might work in San Diego might not work in Sacramento. **California’s diversity is our strength, and our state deserves a Senator who will show up in every single part and pocket.**
That’s what I intend to do on the campaign trail and as our next Senator. Your donations help us travel the state and begin connecting with voters from all walks of life.
I’m grateful to have you on our team.
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230407-1?refcode=EMAG07_1_IOW_20230407_V1_F&refcode2=20702_3422442_qX28yp&akid=20702%2E3422442%2EqX28yp)**
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG07_1_IOW_20230407_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=20702_3422442_qX28yp&akid=20702%2E3422442%2EqX28yp)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=20702%2E3422442%2EqX28yp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=20702%2E3422442%2EqX28yp)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: I'm sick and tired of extremist judges putting people's healthcare at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
We need a Congress that can fix this

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61463344/400141739/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTA0NGVmZS03NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhdV87XvRs21oGbNKzR_qO0e6v-Qv_MaRil-zrs4kbg=)
---
Friend,

As you may have heard, a federal judge's recent ruling has put millions of Americans at risk of losing insurance coverage for STI, HIV, and cancer screenings. It's outrageous to imagine us going back to an era when so many families struggled to afford this critical care.

**I'm sick and tired of Republican judges putting folks' healthcare at risk. **They've shown zero respect for precedent or any recognition of the real-world damage they are causing.

The only way to address this is through new legislation — to strengthen the Affordable Care Act and ensure that people's preventative care remains covered. But the hard truth is that as long as Kevin McCarthy holds a majority, the odds of things getting done are close to zero.

**[We need to move full speed ahead in our work to take back the House in 2024, and that starts with securing swing districts like mine. Please, can you pitch in $10 (or any amount) today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61463345/400141740/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTA0NGVmZS03NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhdV87XvRs21oGbNKzR_qO0e6v-Qv_MaRil-zrs4kbg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61463346/400141741/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTA0NGVmZS03NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhdV87XvRs21oGbNKzR_qO0e6v-Qv_MaRil-zrs4kbg=)**

---
I was first elected to Congress by defeating a Republican incumbent who had voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Since then, I've turned back two strong challenges from opponents who would've fully supported the GOP's ongoing efforts to gut the law.

**My district is still a top Republican target, and my constituents deserve better than a representative who would vote to take away their healthcare.**

I want to send an undeniable message to McCarthy and his allies: if their party keeps up their opposition to the Affordable Care Act, they will pay a price at the ballot box. And we send that message by putting up strong numbers early in the cycle.

**[So will you stand with me today and chip in? Every grassroots donation helps us prepare for a close race — and helps me sustain the fight to protect my constituents' healthcare.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61463352/400141747/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTA0NGVmZS03NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhdV87XvRs21oGbNKzR_qO0e6v-Qv_MaRil-zrs4kbg=) **

Thank you so much,

Jennifer

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61463353/400141748/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTA0NGVmZS03NGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WhdV87XvRs21oGbNKzR_qO0e6v-Qv_MaRil-zrs4kbg=)****

name: WFP Action Alert
subject: Tell Biden: Do Not Reinstate Family Detention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Raising our voices now is our best chance to make sure President Biden lives up to his campaign promise of putting an end to cruel and inhumane Trump-era immigration policies. | | | Peter, Last month, _The New York Times_ reported that the Biden administration was considering reinstating the Trump-era policy of detaining asylum-seeking families in prison-like camps along the southern border.1 **Since then over 100 members of Congress have signed on to a letter urging President Biden to "maintain your commitment to not detaining families and children and not return to a cruel policy of the past."** 2 We don't know exactly when a decision by the administration on this policy may come. But we _do_ know that raising our voices now is our best chance to make sure President Biden lives up to his campaign promise of putting an end to cruel and inhumane Trump-era immigration policies like family detention. **[Will you sign this petition right now and call on President Biden to not reinstate family detention for migrant families? clean_body: Raising our voices now is our best chance to make sure President Biden lives up to his campaign promise of putting an end to cruel and inhumane Trump-era immigration policies. | | | Peter, Last month, The New York Times reported that the Biden administration was considering reinstating the Trump-era policy of detaining asylum-seeking families in prison-like camps along the southern border.1 Since then over 100 members of Congress have signed on to a letter urging President Biden to "maintain your commitment to not detaining families and children and not return to a cruel policy of the past." 2 We don't know exactly when a decision by the administration on this policy may come. But we do know that raising our voices now is our best chance to make sure President Biden lives up to his campaign promise of putting an end to cruel and inhumane Trump-era immigration policies like family detention. In 2020, voters rejected Trump's inhumane policies and delivered the presidency to this administration on the promise of jobs and care for our communities. We rejected family detention under the last administration — and we need to reject it under this one too. How we treat people coming here fleeing poverty and violence is part of what defines us as a country. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , New York Times, March 7, 2023. 2\. , The Hill , March 28, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A fundamental injustice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Say NO to the GOP abortion ban
#
Peter,
In February, 22 Republican attorneys general and 67 GOP members of Congress backed a lawsuit _**trying to overturn the FDA’s two-decade approval of medication abortion**_ 1, aka “abortion pills.”
If the courts overturn the FDA’s approval, there will be immediate and devastating consequences:
* An estimated **40 million people** who can become pregnant would lose access to medication abortion2.
* **Overturning the FDA’s approval would force pregnant people to undergo the more costly and difficult to obtain option of surgical abortions** , which include a longer recovery time, are more expensive, and often require visits to clinics that are hundreds of miles away — taking patients away from their work, families and driving up the overall costs of care.
* **When lawmakers restrict abortion access, there’s always a disproportionate impact on already vulnerable groups.** A ban on abortion pills would heavily burden people of color, people who are disabled, working class communities, transgender folks, and people who live in rural areas.

**It’s time to fight back and show we will never accept ANY abortion ban.** [**If you agree, please join me today by adding your name here to voice your opposition to the GOP’s shameless attempts to strip millions of Americans of our human rights.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/tell-fda-abortion-access-human-right/?source=em20230407-2347&refcode=em20230407-2347&t=1&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/tell-fda-abortion-access-human-right/?source=em20230407-2347&refcode=em20230407-2347&t=2&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)**
Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, 24 states have either outlawed abortion or are preparing to3 — a federal ban on medication abortion is just the latest step in the GOP’s long-term plan to strip hundreds of millions of Americans from accessing abortion. We are not backing down.
In solidarity,
Pramila

* * *
1 - [CNBC](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41508?t=3&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)
2 - [Axios](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41494?t=4&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)
3 - [Guttmacher](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41493?t=5&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230407-2347-footer&t=6&refcode2=2347_420207_ZOr9qZ&akid=2347%2E420207%2EZOr9qZ)**

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Reinstate Justin Jones and refocus on our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
April 6th, 2023 will go down in Tennessee history as a dark day for our democracy.
Yesterday, two of my fellow members were expelled from the Tennessee House for their unfaltering dedication to represent the voices and concerns of their respective districts. This shocking abuse of power is merely the latest instance of the continual, pervasive attack by House Republicans upon the pillars of our democracy in Tennessee.
Our State House should act as the people’s house, but the people’s business was not carried out on Thursday. Removing Justin Jones and Justin J. Pearson from elected office was unbecoming of our body and wholly antithetical to our constitutional duty of uplifting and defending the will of the people.
As we await a special election for both members, I call on the local governments of Davidson and Shelby counties to promptly reinstate both Justin Jones and Justin J. Pearson to their rightful, duly elected seats in the Tennessee House.
House Republicans who voted in favor of expulsion have made a mockery of our government, and wasted precious time persecuting three strong voices for change and progress in our state. In doing so, they not only attempted to silence Representatives Jones and Pearson as legislators, but ultimately denied fair and equal representation to every member of their respective constituencies.
Our House Democratic Caucus and the entirety of our state benefits from the presence of Justin Jones and Justin J. Pearson in office, and I look forward to their imminent return.
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
Chairman | Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

name: Tim Kaine (via UD)
subject: What I’ve learned from my time in public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter,

I’ve been so lucky to meet thousands of Virginians and Americans throughout my time in public service, and I’ve learned something from each new person I’ve had a chance to get to know.

I’ve learned more about what people truly value — family, time with loved ones, good health, economic security, a safe and secure home. I’ve learned what can make people smile — great music, a friendly face, a helping hand. And I’ve learned a lot about the universal struggles that people endure — grief, loss, the stress of providing for family and caring for children, unexpected costs and illnesses and other roadblocks of life.

**Trying to find common-sense solutions to ease some of those struggles is why I’ve dedicated my career to public service. From my time serving as a missionary, a civil rights attorney, and as an elected official at the local, state, and federal levels, I wake up every day with a true purpose: to do what I can, where I can, to help people across Virginia and America live a better life.**

That purpose is why I’m seeking re-election to the Senate in 2024. I’ve been lucky to have the support of so many people over the past three decades, and I hope I’ll be able to count on your support again during this campaign.

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Tennessee
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Like people across the country, I have been both heartbroken and outraged by what has been happening in Tennessee. Following the deaths of six people in a shooting at school, Tennessee residents went to their legislators with a message that it is time—past time—to do more to keep people safe from gun violence plaguing their communities, as it is communities across the country. Three of their legislators joined them in protest. Now two of those three legislators—the two young black representatives—have been expelled from the Tennessee legislature for doing so.
This anti-democratic action is not only an outrage; it is a warning. Threats to our democracy are real. Our response must be, too.
That is one reason I am proud that our campaign will be participating in Democracy Summer.
What is Democracy Summer? Founded by my dear friend and colleague Rep. Jamie Raskin, Democracy Summer seeks to bring about political change in America by training and deploying the next generation of Democratic organizers and leaders to win elections at every level. This fellowship teaches high school and college students state-of-the-art tactics in voter registration and political organizing, the dynamic history of political and social change in our country, and essential lessons for political leadership. We will have a Democracy Summer team here in Houston for an on-the-ground and virtual program to connect our fellows with leaders across the country.
If you know anyone who might be interested in a summer fellowship with #TeamLizzie, please share this link to apply before the April 14 priority deadline! [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023]

[https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023]APPLY NOW [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023]

We worked together to win this seat in 2018 and to hold it in some of the toughest races in the country because we know what is at stake. Our work to mobilize around elections will continue to be vital to protecting our democracy and to bringing about change for our district, our state, and our country. We all need do all we can to elect leaders who will protect our democracy and lead us forward in the right direction.
So thank you again for all you do—for your support, commitment, and partnership.

clean_body: ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [] Like people across the country, I have been both heartbroken and outraged by what has been happening in Tennessee. Following the deaths of six people in a shooting at school, Tennessee residents went to their legislators with a message that it is time—past time—to do more to keep people safe from gun violence plaguing their communities, as it is communities across the country. Three of their legislators joined them in protest. Now two of those three legislators—the two young black representatives—have been expelled from the Tennessee legislature for doing so. This anti-democratic action is not only an outrage; it is a warning. Threats to our democracy are real. Our response must be, too. That is one reason I am proud that our campaign will be participating in Democracy Summer. What is Democracy Summer? Founded by my dear friend and colleague Rep. Jamie Raskin, Democracy Summer seeks to bring about political change in America by training and deploying the next generation of Democratic organizers and leaders to win elections at every level. This fellowship teaches high school and college students state-of-the-art tactics in voter registration and political organizing, the dynamic history of political and social change in our country, and essential lessons for political leadership. We will have a Democracy Summer team here in Houston for an on-the-ground and virtual program to connect our fellows with leaders across the country. If you know anyone who might be interested in a summer fellowship with #TeamLizzie, please share this link to apply before the April 14 priority deadline! [] [ NOW [] We worked together to win this seat in 2018 and to hold it in some of the toughest races in the country because we know what is at stake. Our work to mobilize around elections will continue to be vital to protecting our democracy and to bringing about change for our district, our state, and our country. We all need do all we can to elect leaders who will protect our democracy and lead us forward in the right direction. So thank you again for all you do—for your support, commitment, and partnership. name: Team Cori
subject: Did you catch Lynese’s email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is helping lead the fight to finally pass the Equal Rights Amendment.
#
Hey Peter, did you catch Lynese’s email from earlier this week?
Equality can’t wait. That’s why Cori, in partnership with Rep. Ayanna Pressley, recently launched the _first-ever_ ERA caucus.
This historic caucus — and the multi-racial, multi-generational grassroots movement we’re building — will be exactly what we need to get the Equal Rights Amendment across the finish line and achieve constitutional equality for all.
**[Show your support for Cori’s work by chipping in $5 or anything you can today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230407.m8COmo&amount=5&refcode=em20230407-2476&t=1&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)**
Continue reading below to learn more about the Congressional Caucus for the Equal Rights Amendment and the renewed push to establish constitutional gender equality.
Thank you,
Team Cori
\----Forwarded Message----
I have some exciting news to share:
**Cori, alongside Rep. Ayanna Pressley, launched a new Congressional Caucus for the Equal Rights Amendment 100 years after the amendment was first introduced in Congress.**
Black women have been on the forefront of the fight for equal rights in our country, so it is fitting that this renewed push to establish constitutional gender equality is being led by Cori, Ayanna, and other members of the Congressional Black Caucus.
[**Please consider showing your support for their work to include gender equality in the Constitution by chipping in $5 today.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230407.m8COmo&amount=5&refcode=em20230407-2476&t=2&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230407.m8COmo&amount=5&refcode=em20230407-2476&t=21&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)**
This caucus will aim to:
* Affirm the Equal Rights Amendment as the 28th amendment to the Constitution;
* Raise awareness within Congress to establish constitutional gender equality as a national priority;
* Partner with an inclusive multi-generational, multi-racial coalition of advocates, activists, scholars, organizers, and public figures; and
* Center the people who stand to benefit the most from gender equality, including Black and brown women, LGBTQ+ people, people seeking abortion care, and other marginalized groups.

When the U.S. Constitution was first drafted, women, Black and brown folks, and all marginalized groups were intentionally written out. This exclusion has persisted for almost the entire life of our nation.
**Equality is long overdue, Peter. That’s why Cori is helping lead the fight to finally publish the Equal Rights Amendment.**
**[Please consider showing your support by contributing today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230407.m8COmo&amount=5&refcode=em20230407-2476&t=22&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)**
—Lynese, Senior Advisor

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230407?refcode=em20230407-2476-footer&t=23&refcode2=2476_1082990_3KtnmW&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2476%2E1082990%2E3KtnmW)

**First and foremost, thank you for your support, and for joining our movement!**
We launched this campaign just two months ago, on the idea that our country needs a new generation of common-sense, solutions-oriented leadership in Congress.
We’re definitely on to something, friends. The response has been inspiring.
Thousands of people have joined our fight for leaders who’ll solve problems – not just yell about them on cable TV – and deliver on the issues our communities care about most - **homelessness, housing, reproductive rights, the environment, and making sure our government works for everyone who calls this country home**.
In just a few short weeks, we’ve built incredible momentum, and I’m excited to stand at your side as we continue this fight.
Thank you and onward,

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: My life in photographs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

My name is Tiffany Smiley and I wanted to tell you a little bit about myself.

I grew up in Pasco, Washington where I helped out on my family's farm and learned the value of hard work.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

I went on to play soccer at Whitworth College, where I also studied to become a nurse so I could pursue my passion of helping others in need.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

I married my high school sweetheart Scotty, who went on to serve our country in the United States Army while I started my nursing career.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

In 2005, I received a call that changed both our lives forever, Scotty was severely wounded by a suicide bomber in Iraq, causing him to fall into a coma and permanently lose sight in both of his eyes.

I immediately booked a flight for Walter Reed Medical Center to be by Scotty's side.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

When I arrived, Scotty was still in trauma care, and I was informed that he would never be able to serve his nation again in uniform. They even asked me to sign a document, right there on the spot, consenting to Scotty's immediate discharge from the Army.

**_I refused. _**

Since that day I've made it my mission to ensure Scotty, and every veteran gets the benefits and care they earned.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

Scotty went on to serve as America's first blind active-duty Army officer, breaking barriers for many who followed along the way.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

It's not every day you hear about American women going up against the U.S. Military. But we defied the government in a big way--_and won._

We stood up to a broken bureaucracy because it was the right thing to do. I will always stand up for our heroes and continue being an advocate for our veterans.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

In 2007, we welcomed our first child. While Scotty will never be able to 'see' our children's faces, he's always been an incredible father and hero to our boys.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

Now, our family is taking on a new challenge. I'm staying in the fight to help families across the country achieve the American Dream.

I will take the same fight and optimistic spirit I've shown throughout my life to help families secure a better life. I believe that now, more than ever, Americans need a voice to find solutions to their unique problems and end the partisan gridlock in Congress.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

My family began this journey in the halls of Walter Reed and we look forward to continuing this journey with you across the country.

I hope you will join us in the fight to better our democracy and stand up for working-class Americans everywhere.

[**_So please - can you chip in just a few bucks to protect the American Dream?_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532207:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)
[** PROTECT THE AMERICAN DREAM **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532208:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)
**
****
**
[** STAND WITH TIFFANY SMILEY **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62532208:6XD5heGZN:m:1:3365131770:A46DCDBB02F1C196FC38B540608AB3FC:r)

I know you'll do the right thing

Sincerely,

Tiffany Smiley

**Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.**
** **

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: This grassroots team played a big role in helping Democrats make history last year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn. | |
---
Derek, it’s James Carville. I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: I’m amazed by what this team has accomplished. You took back the White House. You flipped the Senate in 2020 and held it in 2022. The Democrats you helped elect to the House have passed more legislation than any Congress in history. Some people called it impossible. I call it the power of the grassroots! **But let’s be honest, Derek. There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn.** The DNC needs this team to rally together so they can invest in the programs and strategies necessary to help Democrats win in every corner of the country. clean_body: There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn. | | Derek, it’s James Carville. I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: I’m amazed by what this team has accomplished. You took back the White House. You flipped the Senate in 2020 and held it in 2022. The Democrats you helped elect to the House have passed more legislation than any Congress in history. Some people called it impossible. I call it the power of the grassroots! But let’s be honest, Derek. There’s a lot left to fight for and we can’t take our foot off the gas -- not when Republicans are trying to throw a wrench in Democrats’ plans to fight for American families at every turn. The DNC needs this team to rally together so they can invest in the programs and strategies necessary to help Democrats win in every corner of the country. As a guy born in Georgia, I know firsthand that any state can be a blue state if we invest early enough and get our message out to voters before they head to the ballot box. Extreme Republicans are running for president in 2024, and we can expect even more MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that means chipping in to the DNC to support Democrats running up and down the ballot. Let’s do the dang thing, James James Carville Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. Fellow American,

A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America.

We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values.

Fellow American, I am that outsider.

I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d7009937396943189a813ee7807f8db8&_e=nM0fU0kYCB_jKBuz_GSifWpC_QHkRRj0QvhfZiWSRqyqJmDz8filWhTjGyKj5Gd7ycOrnzW9Oyw5oWedJcTRPsSaeAljI9ayBy-paFKbXUEG7PpxGgoM4Lqpg9AC3n-yQfV0IZORQaBkSWLjAD9xQtyd7ZxPjMJLjHIPen4Z_fs8pKBZL7uVPhF-C2sL4Q0yFjCvSyLfR_nNCwjjjFVje3QT2yRFe-0dO9gy_dd3bLyzg2fY6Wa0sYNOT-D3vXEoUQhvbTDCWxdOxmgFfhTnwsFfF-0oc2P6hF93aZFi7uccTdQCvDhLN4UeyJk8mtzf_YJSP-0mCDFOsOXgx-6qDYIYzrRGVwoLnDip1OrvDDjQJaLG1h_eJ9WD89L90W30brDYd3OFpNkEGBT2DyGiVA%3D%3D)
We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone.

I am not asking for a lot - _**[just $1 or even $5 before midnight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d7009937396943189a813ee7807f8db8&_e=nM0fU0kYCB_jKBuz_GSifWpC_QHkRRj0QvhfZiWSRqyqJmDz8filWhTjGyKj5Gd7ycOrnzW9Oyw5oWedJcTRPsSaeAljI9ayBy-paFKbXUEG7PpxGgoM4Lqpg9AC3n-yQfV0IZORQaBkSWLjAD9xQtyd7ZxPjMJLjHIPen4Z_fs8pKBZL7uVPhF-C2sL4Q0yFjCvSyLfR_nNCwjjjFVje3QT2yRFe-0dO9gy_dd3bLyzg2fY6Wa0sYNOT-D3vXEowAqBrleiyICZiCLXVPHakS7lZPfRl-HOakaQPyQPC0v3fLT8WBXzxMSaFjO5UAx4dQRKVMNU9mhc9Wzd-uyDmGfFZ7QxodbP1l9Wj26bzrCBlS6atxa1F-mKorbpr6zN6eLfeJxzKnH_BCIE6SIkeg%3D%3D)**_

Let's do this together, Fellow American.

I am counting on you,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It’s going to take an outsider in the White House to deliver the results we need to put America back on track. | | Fellow American, A professional politician can't make the changes we need to deliver for America. We need an outsider with the courage to GUT the managerial bureaucracy that has grown so toxic and corrupt that it undermines American values. Fellow American, I am that outsider. I've never held public office. I haven't spent years dialing for dollars from big donors - so I am not beholden to them. I am not beholden to ANYONE. We must change how things are done in Washington - I am ready to take on this fight. I am investing my own money, but I can't do this alone. I am not asking for a lot - My goal is to boost our number of unique donors in this race, so a little bit from conservatives like you across the country will help us fuel this movement. Let's do this together, Fellow American. name: Kim Bernice Nguyen
subject: re: the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Today is World Health Day, which brings awareness to health issues that affect people across the globe, including issues of health access.

Health care access is under attack right here in America. Just last week, a conservative judge blocked a key part of the Affordable Care Act, ruling that insurers don’t have to cover free preventive care like cancer screenings and HIV drugs.

_And House Republicans are proposing extreme budget cuts that could gut Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act._

**As someone with a background in public health – and as an American who has struggled to afford the rising cost of health care – I know firsthand the importance of lowering costs and expanding health care access.**

[So please, will you sign my petition demanding Congress protect the ACA and take action to expand health care access for all Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61465167/400149323/1044191600?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230407_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzI2ZjY0MTUtN2VkNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulf_RdKb7IiG7Ur4TxWYCLMFQBjdV-bbuE__Z7dRBuk=&emci=2e6f6415-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=326f6415-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61465168/400149324/1044191600?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_WL_230407_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzI2ZjY0MTUtN2VkNS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ulf_RdKb7IiG7Ur4TxWYCLMFQBjdV-bbuE__Z7dRBuk=&emci=2e6f6415-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=326f6415-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

clean_body: | | Today is World Health Day, which brings awareness to health issues that affect people across the globe, including issues of health access. Health care access is under attack right here in America. Just last week, a conservative judge blocked a key part of the Affordable Care Act, ruling that insurers don’t have to cover free preventive care like cancer screenings and HIV drugs. And House Republicans are proposing extreme budget cuts that could gut Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act. As someone with a background in public health – and as an American who has struggled to afford the rising cost of health care – I know firsthand the importance of lowering costs and expanding health care access. | | Thanks for signing on, Kim | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Conservative News: Guess Who Is California Dreamin'?
body:
Better days lie ahead for Illinois Conservatives as the exodus of Establishment Elites continues.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/14c2298735a8/conservative-news-guess-who-is-california-dreamin?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
HAPPY EASTER & CHAG SAMEACH

Former IL House GOP Leader Jim Durkin Selling Home, Months After Resigning from Humiliating Election Defeats, Postage Discount Abuse Revelations (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/former-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-selling-home-months-after-resigning-from-humiliating-election-defeats-postage-discount-abuse-revelations.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Former Illinois House Republican leader Jim Durkin is selling (https://www.realtor.com/realestateandhomes-detail/4719-Grand-Ave_Western-Springs_IL_60558_M83825-85457?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his home in Western Springs, just months after resigning from his seat in the legislature.
(Source: Realtor.com)

In November, the day after the election, Durkin (https://abc7chicago.com/jim-durkin-illinois-election-results-2022-news/12438033/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) announced that he was resigning (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) as House Minority Leader.

During the midterm election, Durkin suffered embarrassing losses, giving House Democrats once again, supermajority control in the Illinois House – proving his ineffectiveness in creating a winning strategy for House Republicans.
A "For Sale" sign is shown in front of the Durkin residence. (Source: Illinois Review)

In media interviews after announcing his resignation as House GOP leader, State Rep. Jim Durkin attempted to place all of the blame on the 45th President of the United States Donald Trump (https://www.chicagobusiness.com/politics/trump-blamed-illinois-gop-losses-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

“As long as we continue to say that we are the party of Trump and that we have to abide by the party principles in the platform, 100% we’re gonna continue down this path of losing.”

Sources also confirmed to
Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/sources-il-gop-blames-jim-durkin-for-postage-discount-abuse-as-gop-faces-potential-postal-audit.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that the Illinois Republican Party is blaming Durkin for the party’s postage discount abuse, where mailers “Paid for by the Republican Party of Illinois” were sent during the primary to viciously attack conservative Republican grassroots candidates that were challenging Durkin’s friends and political allies.

And sources also confirm to Illinois Review that the IL GOP is under an official postage discount audit that was approved by the US Post Office’s
Office of Inspector General (https://www.uspsoig.gov/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – an audit that Republican party officials fear could drive them into bankruptcy as a result of its findings.

Just days before resigning from office, Durkin was the only Republican to join the Democrats,
voting (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=00000185-8628-de44-a7bf-ee3f47b80000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in favor of the assault weapons ban (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a move that angered conservative Republicans across the state.
Incoming IL House GOP Minority Leader Jim Durkin, R-Western Springs in 2013. (Photo credit: Associated Press)

In November, just weeks after the midterm election, Durkin’s wife, Celeste Fisher wrote an opinion piece in the Chicago Tribune (https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/commentary/ct-opinion-jim-durkin-illinois-republicans-election-results-20221128-ae5vu6hdznertdp5k4gp76fwta-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) defending her husband, and referring to him as an “endangered species.”

Fisher writes the bizarre piece from a mother’s perspective, while Durkin plays the role of “dad,” as she lectures the children about how great their dad is and what a mess they’ve made in Illinois, and that dad needs to drive around in his car to cool off.

“The mom in me wants to fold my arms, give the ‘Mom look’ to those who have made this mess and say, ‘Now look what you’ve done. What do you have to say for yourself, young man, young lady?”

Fisher then rattles off Durkin’s accomplishments as a liberal legislator and Republican leader, praising him for voting for the assault weapons ban and his low grade with the National Rifle Association; supporting the Equal Rights Amendment; and their friendship with Democratic US Sen. Dick Durbin.

Fisher even takes a jab at former President Donald Trump.

The piece then concludes with this odd and condescending tone as Fisher writes,

“But, Illinois Republican Party, you are in big trouble. I just can’t look at you right now. And while you sit up in your room, while your dad cools off, I really hope you think about what you’ve done.”

Fisher is part of Stanford University’s online novel writing program, and many believe that the Durkin’s are preparing to move out to California to be closer to the liberal school – a place that this publication is confident of, where they’ll be welcomed with open arms.

What better place for a Republican in Name Only (RINO) than Stanford University?

Here’s hoping that dad cools off by driving all the way to California – never to come back.

Republicans in Illinois will be in a much better place because of it.

https://youtu.be/XyfN9Uy1tw0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

President Donald Trump addresses the crowd at his Mar-a-Lago estate Tuesday night, following his unprecedented arraignment in New York City. Many of his family members, including his children Donald Trump, Jr., left, and Eric and Lara Trump, right, attended the speech. (Source: Illinois Review)

Mayor Pekau Sends Email to Constituents Titled "Active Shooter" to Draw Attention to His Post-Election Attacks on Political Enemies (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/mayor-pekau-sends-email-to-constituents-titled-active-shooter-to-draw-attention-to-his-post-election-attacks-on-political-enemies.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Thursday evening, Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau sent an email to constituents titled “Mayor’s Update – IMPORTANT ACTIVE SHOOTER ALARM INFORMATION!”

The email without a doubt created instant and widespread panic given the recent mass shooting at a Christian school in Nashville where three 9-year old children and 3 adults were tragically murdered.

After immediately opening the email, alarmed constituents are told in the second paragraph that,

“Fortunately, the active shooter alarm was accidentally set off.”

In other words, a false alarm. And a false and misleading headline, too.
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau sent an email to constituents on Thursday evening titled, “Mayor’s Update — IMPORTANT ACTIVE SHOOTER ALARM INFORMATION!” to draw attention and level attacks against his political enemies. He writes in the email that the active shooter was a false alarm.

Pekau then pivots and praises his close friend and ally, Orland Park Emergency Services & Disaster Agency (ESDA) coordinator Rich Miller (https://www.willcountyema.org/blank-u0zcq?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who, along with personal dog Leo – the village’s therapy dog, received an award at the 100 Club of Illinois Valor Award Ceremony last evening, which the mayor attended.

But now that Pekau has your attention with the false, misleading and grossly inappropriate headline, he then launches into an attack on his political enemies, falsely claiming that this publication accused Miller of impersonating a police officer and that other people were out to destroy Miller’s reputation with false information about his alleged criminal background.

The truth is that in a previous article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , this publication highlighted Eric Vates, the president of Orland Park Mazda and Sean Kampas, an IT consultant and village trustee, who are frequently spotted at community events wearing official police uniforms, despite not being in law enforcement.

Pekau continues to play the empathetic victim while defending Miller, writing,

“Here is what I will not get over and will never forget. The same people who have been trying to destroy my life did and said despicable things about Rich [Miller].”

The unhinged mayor then concludes his message under the headline, “Mayor’s Update – IMPORTANT ACTIVE SHOOTER ALARM INFORMATION!” with,

“These people should be ashamed of what they did to Rich Miller. Their friends and family should be ashamed and the unions should be ashamed. Those of you who support them and apologize for them should be ashamed. While I watched him get the Rich Kozic Memorial Award from the 100 Club of Illinois the very next night, I was sick to my stomach and was brought to tears because I thought of what he was put through just the day before.”

Pekau is obsessed with playing the victim, and he plays on constituents’ emotions by alleging that his life is always in danger.

And sources confirm that last year, Pekau fortified (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/sources-paranoid-pekau-installs-bulletproof-glass-frosts-windows-in-orland-park-village-board-room-making-case-for-security-detail-if-referendum-passes.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the Village Hall Board Room, replacing the windows that overlooked a pond, with bulletproof glass – and adding a film that gives a “frosted” look on the glass, to enhance security measures.

All this while claiming that Orland Park is the safest city in Illinois, tweeting in 2021,

“I joined Newsmax to talk about rising crime in Chicago, a stark contrast to OP’s distinction as the safest city in IL. The anti-law enforcement policies/rhetoric of Lightfoot, Foxx, Casten & Newman put our communities & officers at risk.”

But to use a headline with “active shooter” to trick people into opening up his email so he can increase his audience interaction as he levels attacks against his political enemies is beyond disturbing – in fact, it’s a sign of something much worse, proving that the mayor is more than just unhinged after suffering massive and debilitating election night defeats.

The US Constitution has the
25th Amendment (https://constitutioncenter.org/the-constitution/amendments/amendment-xxv?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) where an incapacitated or rogue president can be removed from office – but perhaps Orland Park should consider such a mechanism for removing Pekau.

Spreading false and misleading information is one thing, but invoking a tragic event like an “active shooter” headline to draw more people to read your hate-filled email crosses every line.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f58e2d8f24-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_07_05_53&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f58e2d8f24-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Tackling problems big and small
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Here's one thing that surprises a lot of people when I tell them what it’s like to serve in the House of Representatives

Team, when I was elected to Congress, I promised to focus on making life easier for regular families. A lot of that work means taking on the big fights — defending abortion rights, standing up for Social Security and Medicare, and helping lower costs for hardworking Coloradans. **But one thing that surprises a lot of people when I tell them what it’s like to serve in the House of Representatives is how much of our time is also spent on under-the-radar issues — resolving problems that are critically important but that never make front-page news.** I’m proud to be working to end the mail delays that are making life harder for families in the Buena Vista and Twin Lakes community. I’m proud to be helping constituents access the Social Security and veterans’ benefits that they’ve earned after a lifetime of service and sacrifice. And I’m proud to fight for federal investments in programs important to our community like Head Start. **I love doing this job because I’m committed to serving our community in every way I can, but the thing is, Team, I need your help to keep me here. clean_body: Here's one thing that surprises a lot of people when I tell them what it’s like to serve in the House of Representatives Team, when I was elected to Congress, I promised to focus on making life easier for regular families. A lot of that work means taking on the big fights — defending abortion rights, standing up for Social Security and Medicare, and helping lower costs for hardworking Coloradans. But one thing that surprises a lot of people when I tell them what it’s like to serve in the House of Representatives is how much of our time is also spent on under-the-radar issues — resolving problems that are critically important but that never make front-page news. I’m proud to be working to end the mail delays that are making life harder for families in the Buena Vista and Twin Lakes community. I’m proud to be helping constituents access the Social Security and veterans’ benefits that they’ve earned after a lifetime of service and sacrifice. And I’m proud to fight for federal investments in programs important to our community like Head Start. I love doing this job because I’m committed to serving our community in every way I can, but the thing is, Team, I need your help to keep me here. If we let Republicans flip this seat red, then all the work we’ve done will come to an abrupt halt. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Whether it’s defending our nation’s democracy or helping a single constituent solve a problem with their federal benefits, I’m committed to giving this job my all every single day, and I’d be so honored to have your support. body:
Washington leaders are stockpiling abortion pills | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c8c1abaa6f0/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13545647?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ebd17e5b63&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Don’t get me wrong, a woman’s right to choose her path is an act of empowerment.

But as a woman with 3 daughters, I see the world burning around us with more pressing issues that impact us all, _regardless of gender. _

Theft is rampant, stores are closing, and our youth are dying from fentanyl overdoses.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=aac87e61c1&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| _Time is of the essence_. The longer we ignore bad behavior, the irresponsible government spending, and the opioid crisis – the bigger these problems become.

**Peter, all the abortion pills in the world aren’t going to bring us the lasting solutions that we need to be working on together,_now_.**

We have an abundance of children in the world who need our attention now, including those in our foster care system which is in desperate need of repair. These concerns are pressing on my heart now, and I’ve been working on a plan to improve our foster care system.

**As your future Congresswoman,** I will reject the trendy games that are played upon the people for political capital on social issues. It’s time for leaders that elevate the real issues and rally the people to work together in addressing them.

I need your help to amplify my call to action about _getting realistic_ , and tackling the obstacles that are creating tough times for us all! When you support my campaign**[ with even $20](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=174876f874&e=0e51d1e991), this strengthens my ability to get my message out to more Washingtonians. [I hope you’ll join my fight today:](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=f21dbeba71&e=0e51d1e991) **
---
| [DONATE $25 »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=87256d31d2&e=0e51d1e991 "DONATE $25 »")

name: Team DPVA
subject: We need your input.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---
Derek, We’ve been through two sessions with Glenn Youngkin and the VAGOP in power and we want to know your take on things. Do you approve of the VAGOP? [**Please take our quick poll.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61465917/400155107/-1197833677?refcode=dpva-em-230407-GOPpoll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDRiODMyNy04MGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7edSrOKHCSTJixDQf_bfyqbmLe7O0S7zXTw14IX6sE=&emci=5d530008-aed4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=bd4b8327-80d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15759664) | **********[TAKE OUR POLL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61465918/400155108/-1197833677?refcode=dpva-em-230407-GOPpoll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDRiODMyNy04MGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7edSrOKHCSTJixDQf_bfyqbmLe7O0S7zXTw14IX6sE=&emci=5d530008-aed4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=bd4b8327-80d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15759664)**********

subject: BREAKING: National abortion ban threat rising
body:
Here’s what you can do now.

| | Friend, **A judge in Texas just made the decision to halt FDA approval of the most commonly-used, safe, and effective abortion pill called mifepristone.** This ruling **could impact all of us**. By halting approval, the Texas decision could impact access to the pill nationwide. [**Write to Congress NOW and urge them to pass The Women’s Health Protection Act — legislation that would nationally protect our right to abortion.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61471769/400179167/-112442553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Y4NGNhZi1hMWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rbYTCWAlXKktGBBj7Gqs7CY8gYm9HER0G7LxBlqMfOU=&emci=c77bf4d2-96d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=27f84caf-a1d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) This ruling isn’t about “safety” like some anti-abortion extremists claim, it’s about controlling our personal freedoms — and it disproportionately affects vulnerable communities. clean_body: | = = Hey there, folks — Michael here. I'm reaching out because Senator Jon Tester and I both know just how important it is that we hold our Senate majority in 2024. That's why I am working alongside my colleagues, like Jon, who are fighting for real solutions in Washington. = Jon is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection in 2024 and Republicans have already named him as a top target. Mitch McConnell and his super PAC allies will throw everything they’ve got to try to flip his seat red — they’ve already started spending money on attack ads against him. If McConnell finds any weaknesses in these early months of Jon’s campaign, he’ll think Montana is ripe for the taking. The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to retake the Senate majority, and they’re laser-focused on Montana. Let’s be clear: This election isn’t a sure thing. Experts say this race is a toss-up and rank Montana as one of the seats most likely to flip red. That’s why it’s SO important you make a contribution today — everything is on the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jon Tester & Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you for your continued support, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Team, In February, I wrote a letter to rail companies BNSF and Union Pacific demanding they work with the U.S. Department of Transportation to prevent trail derailments like the East Palestine disaster from happening in New Mexico. Hundreds of you joined me and signed on in support. **Well, I have an update. This week, Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg joined me in Deming to announce a $45 million grant to improve rail safety.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61466303/400156218/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230407buttigieg_gv_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjY0NmY3YS04MmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxbZWjqtn1UcVPwPTelWYoVAsnCkeLvOECW4nFMrKBQ=)
_Senator Ben Ray Luján, Rep. Nanette Barragán, Secretary Buttigieg, and me_ Rail plays a critical role in New Mexico’s economy: one metric ton of chemical cargo travels across our state every year. It’s imperative that goods continue to move safely and efficiently across our state, which is why I called on the DOT and the rail companies to act. In his first visit to the district, Secretary Buttigieg also highlighted federal investments to New Mexico’s roads, safe drinking water, and affordable energy thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Act (which far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell voted against). **[We’re already making progress and bringing federal attention to the concerns and well-being of our district. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

This is just the beginning, Peter. | | | Hey, Peter – We had an eventful month, and as one of our biggest supporters, we wanted to make sure to keep you in the loop on everything United Rural Democrats accomplished in March. **Earlier in March, we came out with our first round of endorsements for the 2023/2024 election cycle.** These candidates represent the best of Democrats in rural America. They are farmers and former military service members. They’re running for state and federal government. And most importantly, they’re committed to fighting for all rural Americans. **__[Chip in here to support URD-endorsed candidates, including Lucas Kunce and Jon Tester →](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc9sRfagjMSYUMvZ1uPvpDMXlhP98oMSW5lfNusvPW_VKFOosPBSWFuwpWzdVViWE7MvYvv63pBX5M-V3aQKwLms9EUBc9rN3ZfNycD09noZ50hOiGHDmOMi8iTdtLMNbLw4AaLKAHJy1weeVrHRqK0NQbO-w9sz5BRqm7a8X1hF7CiM4FJmjdgS8Jw5_r4yYthjAct6p23egBTcZ_bSXCjJr8YU58xt9qo0sPxGhzmZ1wQd95fZK6t8J_AcVpNJ8rfvmSG-XcwZSjwsJo3K5YtdRmULtQg0iXhQK0vlCR6wIN57dziPlj1WpHsuqSWaOLV1RRra7ErHmCxzF1X4eYwQ/3v5/wWtdBKpNSOCr3LQprJzGyQ/h0/e3Z8xHSpEMks3HC2yWm68Dr6COARDzjzU7hlla2NRBA)__** Our Advisory Board Member, Sarah Godlewski, was appointed to serve as Wisconsin’s Secretary of State. | | **An Easter To Remember 🌷**
---
| |
---
As we head into Easter weekend, I want to share a special story I reminisce about every year. When I was a young boy, my dad and I got stuck behind a bus belching black smoke out of its engine. He said it reminded him of April 1, 1945, [the best Easter Sunday he ever had](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7c5ad2d99414eeaa9dbf1444eb5454e&_e=muJXCr9s8ph2QYb8gwK6WwBUjFBGEA9cvIGKcg_PyunsbKFkC5DRB3DQFEOM3NSxayW_Bzmr02c8G9m3cProKuOexS__Bsh3xMrRLu7Lv3iPKPu99LCAZOq10K4njHjy_LCfYVZhQEq62IgD2A_nmH7SO400wqC0z4i2DIltZ0fuzhTL4qUYWsjEtDv0tXjmIHZXwR1HWo-Yck3QoPe3VaIYyYHqjX72OV0Jnv0d4HSHXR53a92rkrmQRWXklFaG). My dad and his fellow U.S. Marines had just landed on Okinawa, Japan as it was heavily guarded—and the fighting was rough. This would turn out to be the last major battle of World War II when the U.S. pulled off an Allied victory. All the blood, smoke, and strife made my father a better man. He took those lessons of war and service and lived his life to the fullest, inspiring others with his patriotism. While my dad is no longer with us, I reflect on this story every Easter weekend as it’s a reminder to show gratitude for the men and women who sacrifice so we can live freely. If you can, take a moment to say a prayer for the service members spending this Easter Sunday away from their families to keep us safe. I wish you all a happy and memorable Easter with the people you love.

| | From peanuts to Cracker Jack, America’s favorite pastime is rich with tradition. There’s nothing quite like the sights, smells, and sounds of a crowded baseball stadium with rousing fans. As another season gets underway, I’ll be rooting for our Double-A team, the Tennessee Smokies. The team has been in the East Tennessee region for more than 100 years, and we are proud to have them. Keep in mind Tennessee is actively vying for a Major League Baseball team. If [awarded a franchise](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7c5ad2d99414eeaa9dbf1444eb5454e&_e=muJXCr9s8ph2QYb8gwK6WzDMB2f26DtP1Q7IDnoTMdGpufdFj6sQK-uJQZfXZdQQmCdYXwzvDXx1d-XhLR3XYOpSa57sNVeUjFTonZljd-GKjg92z7UT7nHW2Wmri9ed2-9ut_XcykWjoHHQelkZinAwsdvQu8binrRDZd1rhwVncKmFE_Io7tHWKD8R6d4siN_QtgnaHSC_Uydiv4hn8NB9QRYp0TtQOa1mam8Tbx1vLTOI86p7_Vs50wVJRtn2X9HVBeTmNJn0zPNtdQQqkoPtTsgvY687SGvXeVmxDrc%3D), the Nashville Stars would join our lineup of standout Tennessee teams. _Play Ball!_

it’s clear that the 2024 race for the Senate is already underway
