Did you see this reporting from _The Hill_?
**The Hill:**
**“Republicans targeting Senate Democrats”**
**“The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) rolled out ads ... targeting Senate Democrats up for reelection”**
[**Amy Klobuchar is on the ballot next November. Can you help her continue fighting in Washington?****Split a contribution between Amy and****our campaign****now >>**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5327?t=3&akid=1234%2E61531%2EXZIykH)
The 2024 election might feel far away -- but with the GOP rolling out a new wave of attack ads against Democrats, it’s clear that the race for control of the Senate has already begun.
**Supporters like you not only power Amy Klobuchar's fight for progress in the Senate but also her efforts to defend the Democratic Senate majority against attacks from Republican political insiders. You helped power me to victory last year, and now you can help do the same for Amy. If you’re able, will you split a quick contribution between Amy and Peter to help them continue working for us?**

name: Aruna Miller
subject: Some of my favorite moments from our first session
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61466729/400157334/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGRjYmRmOC04MmQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uysM-tFKG4izwrxL-NWcZbR96NPnKGDMr0uDjjA1znQ=&emci=07dcbdf8-82d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=18dcbdf8-82d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
Hey team! Believe it or not, we’re already approaching the end of the 2023 legislative session here in Maryland. Time flies when you’re having fun, AND getting a lot of good work done for the people of Maryland. **Here are just a few of my favorite moments from this legislative session:** |
---
For this transportation engineer, it was great to join U.S. Department of Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and Amtrak CEO Stephen Gardner for their announcement of a **$4 billion investment for the Frederick Douglass Tunnel, which will create 30,000 jobs in Maryland.** We’re all aboard for this partnership!
---
While abortion rights are being rolled back in conservative states across the nation, I’m proud to stand with Wes, Speaker Adrienne Jones, and other legislative partners in **defending Marylanders’ reproductive freedom by working to enshrine abortion access in our state constitution.**
---
As a transportation engineer by trade, it has always been a priority to provide more environmentally conscious solutions for our growing transportation needs, which is why I was proud to testify in support of the **Clean Transportation and Energy Act (HB 550).**
---
Maryland is the wealthiest state in the nation, but 1 in 8 children live in poverty. **The Family Prosperity Act, the Moore-Miller Administration’s vision to end childhood poverty** , will permanently extend the Earned Income Tax Credit and expand the Child Tax Credit to support our families.
---
In March, we painted the town green in celebration of **St. Patrick’s Day in Annapolis**. Wes and I had a great time with with the Maryland State Fireman’s Association, kids, families, and canines!
---
I proudly cheered on **University of Maryland’s Terps** throughout March Madness, and was thrilled to meet a fellow Miller! Our Maryland teams made us proud this March.
---
It was a pleasure to attend the **38th Annual Women’s History Month Luncheon** hosted by Prince George’s County Angela Alsobrooks with First Lady Dawn Moore and Comptroller Brooke Lierman to celebrate public servants and scholarship recipients who embody Congresswoman Spellman’s commitment to service and excellence.
Well... you get it. I could go on and on sharing photos of fun moments and achievements we’ve had over the last few months!
I can’t wait for Wes to sign the many bills that our friends in the legislature have passed or will pass in these final few days in order to lift up every Marylander and move our state forward.
The work continues!
Thanks for being part of our movement,
Aruna
PS — Here’s one last good one of me and Wes. I couldn’t ask for a better Governor to work alongside!
---

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.
---

Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our free online course,** ["C.S. Lewis on Christianity."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b32124d9d0c4e7eb893f22c1d005fcc&_e=XyEplmtrCbpf4OZXBx6yExhy7bs3i8xCt29VMVhit0RF_Xasw4KxCSzavzea5W0Ebx7kOGSTbU-krc477Ia9VyNzrI3vXoC8kbTO9mr0ieoMjsYbsMCDHg_G-icCGzqjvWd8ELneSQrIO34Za-YK46PEqBAJPJHVZxTdHsS_IaivWWvL6RKuGh_CpWqSAFwwQw3mysxbkfEVUDXlWlfsfzVAUaWMleyw-fVP8Wd0ezLm8QboSQ_0SiL5U4mE3j0rvgdsQ03qIwH8Ow77QTTm2BK-_6lZYjRPg5xIjBbnnWj8XEmKRHeCtojNQVaWDEl69q3RSSPKmJC46GqGhLfrHk-X26ZgeOQvqRLcIhXMm3Hx-lPAnxbaxiwbgVwYKcc-VYdk2dVtTyM_fvuf86XWX8o7Oz5BglgBEw0iKoVT6oM%3D)** **You can watch your video and register for the course below: ** **_[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/c-s-lewis-on-christianity](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b32124d9d0c4e7eb893f22c1d005fcc&_e=XyEplmtrCbpf4OZXBx6yExhy7bs3i8xCt29VMVhit0RF_Xasw4KxCSzavzea5W0Ebx7kOGSTbU-krc477Ia9VyNzrI3vXoC8kbTO9mr0ieoMjsYbsMCDHg_G-icCGzqjvWd8ELneSQrIO34Za-YK46PEqBAJPJHVZxTdHsS_IaivWWvL6RKuGh_CpWqSAFwwQw3mysxbkfEVUDXlWlfsfzVAUaWMleyw-fVP8Wd0ezLm8QboSQ_0SiL5U4mE3j0rvgdsQ03qIwH8Ow77QTTm2CmXWOnNBYUzV-k8wL6M0SgfWj8SwTbtXVPjRlT5-gfN3CkoLZEs7Q4sAlNgyFmkqL-MonQTOhWGdvIXtmQUve6bADUL8L5WS-7DFmFPpU-WXY6Z0U4MVDaVgsitryXqMXTiC4gXIgmBb71OgfqFzzM%3D)_**

| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we have produced this course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward--one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis--as the instructor for this course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you 'll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by [registering for this free online course](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b32124d9d0c4e7eb893f22c1d005fcc&_e=XyEplmtrCbpf4OZXBx6yExhy7bs3i8xCt29VMVhit0RF_Xasw4KxCSzavzea5W0Ebx7kOGSTbU-krc477Ia9VyNzrI3vXoC8kbTO9mr0ieoMjsYbsMCDHg_G-icCGzqjvWd8ELneSQrIO34Za-YK46PEqBAJPJHVZxTdHsS_IaivWWvL6RKuGh_CpWqSAFwwQw3mysxbkfEVUDXlWlfsfzVAUaWMleyw-fVP8Wd0ezLm8QboSQ_0SiL5U4mE3j0rvgdsQ03qIwH8Ow77QTTm2HWgzeewB2TQWoMov4-3CaNFznDh6wQpJZwk49-sqZ5yZSjVQVUKBfmp5ymZoArGeugLuG0R1DRGcdy5x0iYLH4fFg-VZKj0CDtDKsJjz6vY9WRkxLeuAQmrgY0sbXanzE3bqKIRg9LRjNstFSUrpRQ%3D). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****. ** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis--enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Tennessee Republicans just expelled Rep. Justin Jones and Rep. Justin Pearson for protesting gun violence. Let’s give them a bullhorn to keep up the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2075%2E5257348%2EUekwUq ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_tndems.29F54v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC30_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2075%2E5257348%2EUekwUq ]split a donation
between Rep. Justin Jones of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis,
Tennessee. But first, please give me a moment to explain why, and why your
support — especially today — is so important.

Republicans in the Tennessee House of Representatives just expelled Rep.
Jones and Rep. Pearson from the chamber for standing up to the NRA and
protesting gun violence after a mass shooter slaughtered 6 people in a
Nashville school — including 3 nine-year-old children.

Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson were two of the only Democrats and Black
lawmakers in the chamber. Following the Nashville school shooting, they
stood with over 1,000 youth protesters who staged a peaceful protest at
the Tennessee Capitol for gun safety legislation.

Republicans called these youth protesters “insurrectionists,” with the GOP
House Speaker saying it was “at least equivalent, maybe worse” than the
January 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. Soon thereafter, Reps. Jones
and Pearson were singled out for an expulsion vote along with one of their
white Democratic colleagues.

But only Reps. Pearson and Jones were expelled. Tennessee Republicans are
sending a very clear message: That two young Black men democratically
elected by their districts to represent them in the Capitol can be
silenced in an authoritarian show of force against dissent.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em_tndems.29F54v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC30_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2075%2E5257348%2EUekwUq ]Rep. Justin Jones of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis raise their
fists on the floor of the Tennessee House of Representatives. Photo credit:
Reuters/Cheney Orr
Photo credit: Reuters/Cheney Orr

Let’s be clear about what’s going on here, Derek: This is an
affront to democracy — to respond to a protest against gun violence and
the murder of children — with one of the most blatantly authoritarian and
unconscionable actions taken by Republicans yet, expulsion from office.

I’m running for the United States Senate to defend our democracy and make
it stronger. But today, I’m not the one who needs your support — Tennessee
Democrats like Justin Jones and Justin Pearson also need your help.

Rep. Justin Jones and Rep. Justin Pearson will be running in special
elections to continue representing the districts that Tennessee
Republicans just expelled them from serving in the state House. Let’s give
them a bullhorn.

My team tells me that a good email can raise about $20,000. That’s from
just a few hundred people chipping in. To send a clear message, we should
strive to raise ten times that for their campaigns — but Derek,
I’m being completely honest, it’s going to take your donation to help get
there.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=apr2023_abs_em_tndems.WYVOTg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_RES_AC30_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2075%2E5257348%2EUekwUq ]Will you split an urgent $10 contribution between Rep. Justin Jones of
Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis so they can return to the
Tennessee House of Representatives even stronger, with a movement and the
resources behind them to bring real change and gun safety to the people of
Tennessee? 100% of your donation will go to these two lawmakers. Chip in

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [ ]split a donation between Rep. Justin Jones of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis, Tennessee. But first, please give me a moment to explain why, and why your support — especially today — is so important. Republicans in the Tennessee House of Representatives just expelled Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson from the chamber for standing up to the NRA and protesting gun violence after a mass shooter slaughtered 6 people in a Nashville school — including 3 nine-year-old children. Rep. Jones and Rep. Pearson were two of the only Democrats and Black lawmakers in the chamber. Following the Nashville school shooting, they stood with over 1,000 youth protesters who staged a peaceful protest at the Tennessee Capitol for gun safety legislation. Republicans called these youth protesters “insurrectionists,” with the GOP House Speaker saying it was “at least equivalent, maybe worse” than the January 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. Soon thereafter, Reps. Jones and Pearson were singled out for an expulsion vote along with one of their white Democratic colleagues. But only Reps. Pearson and Jones were expelled. Tennessee Republicans are sending a very clear message: That two young Black men democratically elected by their districts to represent them in the Capitol can be silenced in an authoritarian show of force against dissent. [ ]Rep. Justin Jones of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis raise their fists on the floor of the Tennessee House of Representatives. Photo credit: Reuters/Cheney Orr Photo credit: Reuters/Cheney Orr Let’s be clear about what’s going on here, Derek: This is an affront to democracy — to respond to a protest against gun violence and the murder of children — with one of the most blatantly authoritarian and unconscionable actions taken by Republicans yet, expulsion from office. I’m running for the United States Senate to defend our democracy and make it stronger. But today, I’m not the one who needs your support — Tennessee Democrats like Justin Jones and Justin Pearson also need your help. Rep. Justin Jones and Rep. Justin Pearson will be running in special elections to continue representing the districts that Tennessee Republicans just expelled them from serving in the state House. Let’s give them a bullhorn. My team tells me that a good email can raise about $20,000. That’s from just a few hundred people chipping in. To send a clear message, we should strive to raise ten times that for their campaigns — but Derek, I’m being completely honest, it’s going to take your donation to help get there. [ ]Will you split an urgent $10 contribution between Rep. Justin Jones of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis so they can return to the Tennessee House of Representatives even stronger, with a movement and the resources behind them to bring real change and gun safety to the people of Tennessee? 100% of your donation will go to these two lawmakers. Chip in today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Justin Jones and Justin Pearson will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Tennessee Republicans made a choice yesterday — to continue an ugly legacy of discrimination and denial of political representation to Black Tennesseans. We can make a different choice. And we can be active participants in helping to shape our future. — Adam 150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally with an important campaign update.

_**FIRST**_ \- National Republican groups poured tens of thousands of dollars into attack ads aired in VA-07.

_**THEN**_ \- VA-07 was officially named a _**‘frontline’**_ district in the 2024 election – signaling how close our race is shaping up to be and how critical winning it is to regaining the House majority.

_**NOW**_ \- The NRCC has named my district one of its _**top targets**_ for next cycle.

All this means outside money will soon flood our district, and we have to do everything we can to respond. All this means outside money will soon flood our district, and we have to do everything we can to respond. = | | | = | = | = | = | = This isn’t new territory for us, and I know with your support we’ll mount another winning campaign. Arizona deserves more than a Senator who has consistently done the bidding of corporations and wealthy donors, who treats her official staff like personal assistants, and who gives more of her schedule to the Senate masseuse than she does to concerned constituents.
**These reasons and more are why we’re going to replace Kyrsten Sinema in 2024.**
**Polls have consistently shown Sinema coming in last place in a three-way general election**. However, Democrats have reason to be concerned that she will**pull enough voters away from the Democrat** to hand the seat to Republican candidate like Kari Lake.

clean_body: The Wall Street Journal has published leaked details from Sinema’s staff retreat | | Peter - 🚨🚨🚨 Today the Wall Street Journal published an exclusive report on Kyrsten Sinema’s 2024 re-election campaign. A slideshow from a recent Sinema staff retreat included a campaign timeline as well as details on communications strategy. “One slide breaks down the timeline through the remainder of 2023, including getting a poll and opposition research done by Sept. 30 and getting in place campaign staff by Dec. 31. Another slide on current communications strategy emphasizes her independent streak in the Senate.” The article further revealed that Sinema’s “focus will be on bringing in a significant number of the state’s independent voters and soft Republicans.” And that Sinema is expected to announce she’s raised another $2 million in the last three months – with $10 million in her war chest. We need your help. Even though Sinema polls consistently in last place, her very presence in this race can spoil Democrats’ chances and hand the Senate seat to the Republicans. We need to do everything we can to cut off her re-election path RIGHT NOW. | | "Democracy Summer will not just change your life. It will change your country." -Rep. Jamie Raskin Dear Peter: **There is only one week left to apply to be a 2023 Democracy Summer Scholar!** If you're upset about MAGA attacks on American democracy and personal freedom and you're interested in political leadership and organizing, you won't want to miss out on this life-changing opportunity. **[Apply below today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467994/400162306/907520766?utm_source=valhoyle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0MzgzZS04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vH88ZbDcgdur1rXKKtIBX3E5uiO0L_CKCLyqu5hXdbo=&emci=621c217e-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b04383e-89d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)** [Apply Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467995/400162307/907520766?utm_source=valhoyle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0MzgzZS04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vH88ZbDcgdur1rXKKtIBX3E5uiO0L_CKCLyqu5hXdbo=&emci=621c217e-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b04383e-89d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579) Democracy Summer has been the heart and soul of Congressman Jamie Raskin's campaigns since he first entered politics. **Now, I am thrilled to be a part of this program's expansion as one of _nearly 60 partner campaigns_ throughout the country.** Scholars will participate in state-of-the-art educational sessions with extraordinary seminars hosted by top scholars, organizers and leaders from across the country! Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II, and other distinguished speakers and experts on the front lines of American politics and government. Not to mention, Scholars will also host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants— **and they will have the opportunity to attend a meeting with the entire campaign staff!** As we prepare for a huge electoral showdown with Trump's forces in 2024, **Democracy Summer will be the transformative organizing experience you won't forget!** So if you're ready to embark on a summer of political organizing and learning and to make new lifelong friends along the way, **[click the link below and apply by April 14th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467996/400162308/907520766?utm_source=valhoyle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0MzgzZS04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vH88ZbDcgdur1rXKKtIBX3E5uiO0L_CKCLyqu5hXdbo=&emci=621c217e-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b04383e-89d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)**! [Apply Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61467997/400162309/907520766?utm_source=valhoyle&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjA0MzgzZS04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vH88ZbDcgdur1rXKKtIBX3E5uiO0L_CKCLyqu5hXdbo=&emci=621c217e-7ed5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=0b04383e-89d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579) Thank you so much for your support! clean_body: | | | | "Democracy Summer will not just change your life. It will change your country." -Rep. Jamie Raskin Dear Peter: There is only one week left to apply to be a 2023 Democracy Summer Scholar! If you're upset about MAGA attacks on American democracy and personal freedom and you're interested in political leadership and organizing, you won't want to miss out on this life-changing opportunity. Democracy Summer has been the heart and soul of Congressman Jamie Raskin's campaigns since he first entered politics. Now, I am thrilled to be a part of this program's expansion as one of nearly 60 partner campaigns throughout the country. Scholars will participate in state-of-the-art educational sessions with extraordinary seminars hosted by top scholars, organizers and leaders from across the country! Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II, and other distinguished speakers and experts on the front lines of American politics and government. Not to mention, Scholars will also host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants— and they will have the opportunity to attend a meeting with the entire campaign staff! As we prepare for a huge electoral showdown with Trump's forces in 2024, Democracy Summer will be the transformative organizing experience you won't forget! So if you're ready to embark on a summer of political organizing and learning and to make new lifelong friends along the way, ! Thank you so much for your support! We hope to see you this summer. Val P.S. Additional information about the program can be found , and if you know a high school or college student who may be interested, feel free to forward them this email! | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61468235/400163067/-2010650714?refcode=E20859-20230407-CampaignUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDExMGE1ZC04YWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csLNnSOmtV3kVl2A8_JLbAw_QeixMM-EEGoFIYNCHgE=) I also attended the Gender Equity Summit at UVM to share my story of being a woman in politics, and to celebrate the contributions of those on campus working towards equity and the journeys we all take to become women in leadership positions. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61468236/400163068/-2010650714?refcode=E20859-20230407-CampaignUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDExMGE1ZC04YWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csLNnSOmtV3kVl2A8_JLbAw_QeixMM-EEGoFIYNCHgE=) Finally, I popped over to Winooski to celebrate the unveiling of a new school building with students, educators, and Vermont’s entire federal delegation! Investments in schools like those in the Winooski School District are critical to the growth of our communities and the success of our students. **Kicking off April by seeing so many of your smiling faces on the campaign trail has been the BEST! As always, I’m carrying your stories, ideas, and challenges with me back to DC as I prepare to continue fighting for Vermont values in Washington.** Yours, Becca B. name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: The tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61468217/400162935/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Y4OTRmNC04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX9tM25NgTJ49RbcAqvi8gxTJjs1CNt7Ufis_rsyBis=)
Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: [Will you give $5 or more before midnight tonight to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61468219/400162937/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Y4OTRmNC04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX9tM25NgTJ49RbcAqvi8gxTJjs1CNt7Ufis_rsyBis=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**
**[That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61468221/400162939/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk105-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2Y4OTRmNC04OWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zX9tM25NgTJ49RbcAqvi8gxTJjs1CNt7Ufis_rsyBis=)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tClQUZwGoEOS_rmuR1aPwA2?unsubscribedata=j%2FP4ebERIXTGnd4EvYi2x4xbT%2BaycQEG7YpnJurKgSasWuwBvpxf1YJ1TjU64grWOcBWWKivtYpND4Dq5wuIiH4pk9ivlUZHo9hAywcrr4%2BmpzM4kY3f0QZ1r9v7RCjrmm3LZzO6g3v3nGGKoprWnDp7XdmU9uRwJNmhUfAcgom9TV7QrQA2VxGJpA75VjkC%2FcUV5LzwKDUpE4S2TcvFeJQ2XFj988%2F4CxdK9rUD%2BPJ%2BseHLCRESdQvoEDduS7PC2hSs8xzVnwa8k1dQFBN89hMFMh2bJIrGfskrBQyHClQHn2APMzIzDqvMy7IH9E8V%2FlahAYXG85Dwd3lPZEsZ7XEYD4jQMqQAngA13k67x6RtBgWTrqetZ064lrFB9AWvMN4WfFg3br7VmO0rUH%2FoTAYRkGYgisF9%2B0F0ZYLhRwBC7jgqdx2l8JbVYKGYJ1sT) Friends of Sherrod Brown

clean_body: | | | = Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American. But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” The long and short of it is I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you. = With gratitude, Sherrod Brown | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

| This is absurd, Peter.

Republicans are focused on banning everything they deem is “hurting our kids.” Books. Drag shows. Sex-Ed. You name it.

But when it comes to addressing assault rifles — the very thing killing our kids at schools — they are silent.

It’s clear the GOP’s priorities are out of whack. We need to take back the House majority in order to protect our communities from weapons of war that have no place on the streets. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: zero room for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m going to need grassroots supporters like you by my side to win.

| Peter–I just launched my very first reelection campaign for the U.S. Senate in Nevada. Can I take just a minute to explain why this race is so important?

Right now, analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that the GOP has “a clear path” to retaking the Senate majority – and it could all come down to what happens in Nevada.

In the last Senate race here, the GOP spent over $55 MILLION to turn Nevada red – and they nearly succeeded. Democrats won by less than a percentage point. Just 7,928 votes.

**This means we have zero room for error.** With _The Washington Post_ calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – already launching misleading attack ads against me.

**I’m going to need grassroots supporters like you by my side to win. But with just hours left to reach our Reelection Founding Donor goal, my team says we’re still falling short. We need 1,456 more donations before our critical midnight deadline – and I’m counting on your to help us get back on track.**

[_**So please, Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you split $5 between my campaign and Fight for Progress now to become a Founding Donor of our very first reelection campaign in Nevada? Every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61468667/400164753/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230407-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkZTNiOWU4LThjZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OO7R3_mWqbNgs0cxOQYVDU4IafgrxliUKDbjsegHlp4=)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: TPUSA speaker Riley Gaines assaulted by Leftist activist
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._qBSkELg)
---
Fellow American, Riley Gaines - the courageous college swimmer who has spoken up in defense of women's sports from biological males - had just finished her talk at a Turning Point USA event at San Francisco State University... **...when a biological male in a dress ASSAULTED HER!** Fellow American, I believe these DOMESTIC EXTREMISTS should face REAL legal, educational, and career consequences ... _or this madness will never stop_. [**If you're with me, can I count on your support of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more to Turning Point USA right now to help us HOLD ACCOUNTABLE and STOP these radical Left extremists on college campuses?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) _As my thanks to you, if you make a gift of ANY amount by Wednesday, April 12, I'll send you a FREE "Real Men Aren't Women" T-SHIRT from our TPUSA merchandise store._
---
[Stand with Turning Point USA](http://trk.secureandprosper.-dGCJw)
---
**As Riley's husband later told Fox News, she was "HIT MULTIPLE TIMES" by a biological man!** She was rushed from the room by law enforcement and BARRICADED for hours for her safety. Thankfully, none of our Turning Point USA students were harmed ... but this Leftist violence should NEVER have happened! **It's time for lawmakers and university leadership to impose REAL consequences for these CRIMINALS, and I will PERSONALLY make myself available to ANY LEADER who wants advice on how best to proceed and who has the courage to take a stand.** [**If I can count on YOUR support in this URGENT WORK, please make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more to help me and Turning Point USA right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) As my thanks for your generous gift, I'll send you a FREE "Real Men Aren't Women" T-SHIRT from our TPUSA merchandise store ... if you make a gift of ANY amount by Wednesday, April 12.
---
[Stand with Turning Point USA](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
In the past month, Turning Point USA - the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL conservative campus organization - has seen VIOLENT RADICALS attack our events from coast to coast. **•** Most recently, it was Riley Gaines in California. • Just days ago, at the University of Albany, ANTI-CHRISTIAN, FAR-LEFT students interrupted a TPUSA event with pro-life speaker Ian Haworth ... and these out-of-control students proceeded to DESTROY a BIBLE! • A week ago, far-left students hijacked a pro-life event at Virginia Commonwealth University featuring TPUSA speaker and Students for Life's Kristan Hawkins, as protestors THREW PUNCHES and INJURED a chapter president! • And a month ago, a violent ANTIFA MOB assaulted cops and shattered glass as they attempted to break into my TPUSA event at UC Davis!
---
[Stand with Turning Point USA](http://trk.secureandprosper.-QmfxCsxQ)
---
Fellow American, when EVERY campus conservative speaker is falsely labeled a Nazi, a fascist, a racist, or as somehow wanting a "trans genocide" -- as _happened to me!_ \-- by radical student groups and their allies in the mainstream media and administrations, these Left-wing domestic extremists feel free to ASSAULT and TERRORIZE. I will NEVER back down from the "Woke" mob, and I will NEVER stand down in protecting our Turning Point USA students and speakers. **That's why Turning Point USA and I are LEADING THE FIGHT to HOLD ACCOUNTABLE and STOP these radical Left extremists on college campuses.** [**If you're with me - and you want to help TPUSA pursue REAL legal, educational, and career consequences for these VIOLENT ACTIONS - please chip in whatever you can right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._L6HDLQdeDZEcg) I'm deeply grateful for your support. For America,
---
Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA

As my thanks to you, if you make a gift of ANY amount by Wednesday, April 12, I'll send you a FREE "Real Men Aren't Women" T-SHIRT from our TPUSA merchandise store. As Riley's husband later told Fox News, she was "HIT MULTIPLE TIMES" by a biological man! She was rushed from the room by law enforcement and BARRICADED for hours for her safety. Thankfully, none of our Turning Point USA students were harmed ... but this Leftist violence should NEVER have happened! It's time for lawmakers and university leadership to impose REAL consequences for these CRIMINALS, and I will PERSONALLY make myself available to ANY LEADER who wants advice on how best to proceed and who has the courage to take a stand. As my thanks for your generous gift, I'll send you a FREE "Real Men Aren't Women" T-SHIRT from our TPUSA merchandise store ... if you make a gift of ANY amount by Wednesday, April 12. In the past month, Turning Point USA - the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL conservative campus organization - has seen VIOLENT RADICALS attack our events from coast to coast. • Most recently, it was Riley Gaines in California. • Just days ago, at the University of Albany, ANTI-CHRISTIAN, FAR-LEFT students interrupted a TPUSA event with pro-life speaker Ian Haworth ... and these out-of-control students proceeded to DESTROY a BIBLE! • A week ago, far-left students hijacked a pro-life event at Virginia Commonwealth University featuring TPUSA speaker and Students for Life's Kristan Hawkins, as protestors THREW PUNCHES and INJURED a chapter president! • And a month ago, a violent ANTIFA MOB assaulted cops and shattered glass as they attempted to break into my TPUSA event at UC Davis! Fellow American, when EVERY campus conservative speaker is falsely labeled a Nazi, a fascist, a racist, or as somehow wanting a "trans genocide" -- as happened to me! \-- by radical student groups and their allies in the mainstream media and administrations, these Left-wing domestic extremists feel free to ASSAULT and TERRORIZE. I will NEVER back down from the "Woke" mob, and I will NEVER stand down in protecting our Turning Point USA students and speakers. That's why Turning Point USA and I are LEADING THE FIGHT to HOLD ACCOUNTABLE and STOP these radical Left extremists on college campuses. I'm deeply grateful for your support. For America, Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Were Trump's Rights Violated?
body:
Leave my car alone! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Colorado members: Do you care about protecting your Tabor refunds?[Sign AFP's petition today.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-t/) **Were Trump's Rights Violated?** Has New York District Attorney Alvin **[Bragg violated Former President Trump's Sixth Amendment rights](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-i/)?** **God Bless School Bus Drivers!** Support is growing for a former school bus driver in Ohio that resigned recently after finally **[having enough of misbehaving kids and letting them have it in a profanity-laced tirade](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-d/)**. **EPA Coming for Your Vehicle** The EPA will soon announce [s**tricter rules on carbon dioxide and nitrogen oxide that would ban the sale of a very popular vehicle**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-h/) driven by millions of Americans. **Zero Responsibility** The White House on Thursday released its review of the widely-criticized U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan in 2021**.[Guess who they are blaming for the botched withdrawal?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-k/)** **Cocaine Beaches** This is crazy! **[Three packages of cocaine worth over $100K](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-u/)** have washed up on three different Florida beaches in recent days. **Musk Puts NPR in Their Place** NPR didn't like being labeled as 'state-affiliated media' by Twitter and complained loudly. **[Elon Musk responded as you would expect him to](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-o/)**. Of course, [**the White House is defending them**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-x/) **Writings From a Killer** Nashville police have **[released more information about what they have found at the Christian school killer's home](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-m/)**. _The question is, will they tell us what she wrote?_

**Go After the Biden's** Rep. James Comer said**[two county attorneys from Tennessee and Kentucky have asked him how they can "go after" the Biden's](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-c/) **following Former President Trump's indictment. **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* Ah **[Shucks](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Everyone loves **[monster trucks](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-f/)**.
* That's **[weird](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-z/)**.
* **[Facts](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-v/)**.

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qurhdiy-trhiujldw-e/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. body:
Yesterday’s expulsion of duly elected officials in Tennessee...

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469245/400166997/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230407TNRR_N_KK_90DO_1_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZmFhNzU4LTkxZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eu-4yQE3JgGUUIm1YrRJp4bD2naWfN4jgPZizVuJHXE=)
| Fellow activist,

Yesterday’s expulsion of duly elected officials in Tennessee only solidified for the communities we seek to serve and register to vote that their voices and votes don’t matter. As an organization that centers engaging and mobilizing communities of color, immigrant communities and the youth, our jobs were made even more difficult because of the undemocratic act in Tennessee. We will continue to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania to ensure the disenfranchisement that happened in Tennessee couldn’t possibly happen in Pennsylvania in the future. Together, we aim to prove that their voices and votes will not be ignored. In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner
_Chief Executive Officer
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469246/400166998/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230407TNRR_N_KK_90DO_1_NG_N_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZmFhNzU4LTkxZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eu-4yQE3JgGUUIm1YrRJp4bD2naWfN4jgPZizVuJHXE=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469247/400166999/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230407TNRR_N_KK_90DO_1_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZmFhNzU4LTkxZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eu-4yQE3JgGUUIm1YrRJp4bD2naWfN4jgPZizVuJHXE=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469248/400167000/409185284?refcode=EM_C_230407TNRR_N_KK_90DO_1_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0ZmFhNzU4LTkxZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eu-4yQE3JgGUUIm1YrRJp4bD2naWfN4jgPZizVuJHXE=)**_

clean_body: Yesterday’s expulsion of duly elected officials in Tennessee... = | Fellow activist, Yesterday’s expulsion of duly elected officials in Tennessee only solidified for the communities we seek to serve and register to vote that their voices and votes don’t matter. As an organization that centers engaging and mobilizing communities of color, immigrant communities and the youth, our jobs were made even more difficult because of the undemocratic act in Tennessee. We will continue to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania to ensure the disenfranchisement that happened in Tennessee couldn’t possibly happen in Pennsylvania in the future. Together, we aim to prove that their voices and votes will not be ignored. In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. | | We're taking back the House Speaker's gavel at the *first* available opportunity [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469361/400167432/541775293?sourceid=1048875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNiYjNhMS05MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHb3C4opPbvz5MeXVORCXZsRvg4AU_063g-In-3Y7ik=&emci=aa77d6d8-8fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2f3bb3a1-91d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) House Republicans have made it abundantly clear: they'd _love_ to spearhead a national abortion ban. EMILYs List-endorsed Democratic pro-choice women will stop at nothing to restore and protect abortion access.

**Donate now to help elect and reelect the women who can flip the House and stop anti-choice Republicans in their tracks:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469362/400167433/541775293?sourceid=1048875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNiYjNhMS05MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHb3C4opPbvz5MeXVORCXZsRvg4AU_063g-In-3Y7ik=&emci=aa77d6d8-8fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2f3bb3a1-91d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

After gaining the majority last cycle, far-right Republicans in the House have been _shameless_ in their efforts to restrict reproductive health care.

Polling (and recent elections nationwide!) clearly show: the majority of Americans are pro-choice, regardless of party affiliation. Despite this, anti-choice Republican legislators like Reps. **Mariannette Miller-Meeks (IA-01)** , **Michelle Steel (CA-45)**, and **Lauren Boebert (CO-03)** — to name just a few -– are continuing their efforts to eliminate abortion access across the country.

[**We can stop extremists like these by electing Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot. Can you donate today to help make it happen?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469363/400167434/541775293?sourceid=1048875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNiYjNhMS05MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHb3C4opPbvz5MeXVORCXZsRvg4AU_063g-In-3Y7ik=&emci=aa77d6d8-8fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2f3bb3a1-91d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

_Nearly half_ of Republicans and Republican-leaning voters disapprove of the party's priorities and only _one third_ approve of House Majority Speaker Kevin McCarthy. Republicans can't hide from it any longer, Peter: their prioritization of inflammatory legislation and special interests over the will of the American people is costing them elections.

EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice women who take a stand against GOP lies and vitriol. We only need to flip _five seats_ to regain our Democratic House majority, so we're putting everything behind the candidates who will do just that at the _first_ available opportunity. ****Donate now to support and elect the Democratic pro-choice women who can DEFEAT anti-choice extremists and FLIP the House:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61469370/400167441/541775293?sourceid=1048875&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjNiYjNhMS05MWQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tHb3C4opPbvz5MeXVORCXZsRvg4AU_063g-In-3Y7ik=&emci=aa77d6d8-8fd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2f3bb3a1-91d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Communications and Content, EMILYs List

body:

Dear Peter, Thank you for your support in encouraging **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. to run for President of the United States.** Please **[join us](https://events.teamkennedy.com/boston?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boston_event_invitation_4&n=2) in Boston** where Mr. Kennedy will address the American people on **Wednesday, April 19 at the Boston Park Plaza.** **[Register now for this historic event](https://www.teamkennedy.com/boston?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=boston_event_invitation_4&n=3 "Register for our

body:
| | | **BREAKING via _The Washington Post_ : "Trump's... leading with those more likely to vote"**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12722?ask=5&t=18&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230407-2024Update-TrumpApprovalLikelyVotersV2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230407-2024Update-TrumpApprovalLikelyVotersV2-ETG-sl1&akid=10396%2E9716520%2EdbB15D)

|
---
| Good Friday/ Politics Today
---
| John 3:16
"For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have everlasting life."
Jesus didn't come to set up a new political system. He came instead to change our hearts and save us from our sins by His death and resurrection. Jesus said,
> "My kingdom is not of this world. If my kingdom were of this world, my servants would have been fighting, that I might not be delivered over to the Jews. But my kingdom is not from the world." - John 18:36.

The Bible says that Jesus was placed on the cross at 9 a.m. and darkness covered the land from noon until Jesus' death at 3 p.m. (Mark 15:25, 33-38)
---
|
---
| They Had No Godly Or Righteous Motive
---
| Where would Western Civilization be without the Ten Commandments? Thankfully, the principals of the Bible changed the world and gave us order. But, we are still imperfect sinners and capable of great evil. Evil does exist. Without knowing the principles of the Bible, I guess it's easier to understand, or explain the un-explainable, like why a different culture could fly a plane into the World Trade Center, or why some people would want to mutilate children. I heard someone say, "Our country will not be saved by a donkey or an elephant; rather we will be saved by a Lamb."
Our country is in big trouble and we are definitely experiencing spiritual warfare. Today, the media and radical left are trying to convince us what is right is wrong and what is up is down. Church attendance is low, our rule of law has been weakened, and the debauchery with regard to children, marriage, and respect for life seems like the times of Sodom and Gomorrah. I know the truth is the light and God will get the last word. We need to keep the faith and pray.
When reading about the crucifixion, I took the following notes and surmised politics haven't changed much. Politicians still today, bank on gullible voters and use half truths and exaggerations to gain support. Be careful of those who say one thing, but in reality, like the Pharisees, only care about preserving their power.
When Jesus walked this earth, the Pharisees were exposed, and because they were exposed by the true and authentic holiness of Christ, they hated Him, and they couldn't wait to get rid of Him. It wasn't just the Pharisees who wanted Jesus dead - King Herod also saw Jesus as a trouble-maker, who was coming between him and his political ambitions.
Jesus' presentation of Himself as the Messiah was a threat to the Herodians' attempt to make Herod the influential political power in the land.
Both the Herodians and the Pharisees wanted Jesus out of the way because he was a threat to their power. That is why they came together to plot against Jesus (Mark 3:6).
It was not for anything Godly or righteous that the religious leaders wanted to put Jesus to death. It was their pride, arrogance, and hypocrisy that caused them to bring Jesus before Pilate to be crucified. They did not want to hear the truth of God.
Jerusalem was full of Jews who travelled there to celebrate Passover. The religious leaders did not want to arrest Jesus during Passover because they were afraid that the people might riot. But God's timing was different.
Reasons why the religious authorities hated Jesus so much:
They were jealous; they couldn't stand it because they were envious and suspicious of his popularity.
They were upset that he didn't join in with them, but rather publicly rebuked them.
He exposed their phony righteousness for what it was.
They were afraid of losing their power and authority. The Pharisees were judgmental. Jesus said, "You're like dead men's tombs, whitewashed sepulchers that are painted without blemish on the surface, but inside are filled with dead men's bones. You clean the outside of the platter, but the other side, the inner side, is filthy. You do everything possible to hide that impurity, that grime, and that filthiness from public view. You pretend to be righteous, and you major in that pretense of being righteous." -Matthew 23:27
The Pharisees were fake. And nothing reveals a counterfeit like the presence of the genuine.
Jesus died for our sins today 2023 years ago. "Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me." -John 14:6

My opponent, Duane Adams, bragged about this flyer during our debate. It is costing him and he should be ashamed.

| Bob Good is supporting Duane because, when referring to John McGuire in a video, Bob said, "He tried to primary me". But I did not primary him. So let me get this straight, to protect his power Bob is supporting a three-time Democrat who has raised taxes in Louisa County 40% over the last five years, and calls a constituent a coward because I considered my options?
This is a close race, but we will win if all of our delegates show up on May 6 at Buckingham County High School. I'm running for State Senate so we can help Governor Glenn Youngkin un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

Hi Peter — I wanted to personally reach out and give you a chance to share your input with me today. **[Will you take a moment to complete our April priorities survey here?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/april_priorities_survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=131%2E35263%2E1VmvbL)** Your feedback will guide my work in the weeks and months ahead, and here’s why: As your Senator, I work every day to deliver tangible change for Wisconsinites and the American people. But this is not something I want to do alone: I need your input and your voice to make sure your priorities are at the center of our work in the U.S. Senate. We’ve got a lot of important work ahead of us — from defending our reproductive rights, to addressing the climate crisis, to investing in our economy and fighting back against voting rights attacks. It’s important to me to know what issues matter most to you and your family right now so I can fight for you in Washington. And the best way I know how to do that is by reaching out to ask for your input directly. Your thoughts, ideas, and opinions matter. They inform and influence the decisions I make every single day — which is why I’m asking: [**Can you take a minute (or two, tops!) to complete our April priorities survey? Your feedback ensures I'm fighting for the issues that matter to you most.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/april_priorities_survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=131%2E35263%2E1VmvbL) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/april_priorities_survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230407_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=131%2E35263%2E1VmvbL)
---
Please know I’m listening, and I’m thankful for your input.
Looking forward to reading your responses,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=131%2E35263%2E1VmvbL) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=131%2E35263%2E1VmvbL)**

| **Sen. Roberts' senior tax freeze passes Senate, heads to House**
JEFFERSON CITY — The Missouri Senate has passed SJR 21, which allows counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens. The following is a statement from Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis:

“Rapidly rising rents and home value prices have been an overwhelming burden for senior residents who have lived in their homes for decades, worked hard their entire lives, and now find themselves going through economic hardships because their limited incomes do not allow them to keep up with skyrocketing property taxes. This legislation seeks to make it so that the people in my district and across the state who should be enjoying the fruits of their efforts to improve their community may do so.”

SJR 21 passed the Missouri Senate last year with overwhelming bipartisan support. It would allow a county to exempt taxpayers sixty-five years or older from increases in the assessed value of their property. The bill now heads to the Missouri House of Representatives.
---
|
---
| **Senate Democrats push to oust human rights commissioner**
Senate Democrats are urging Gov. Mike Parson to fire the chairman of the Missouri Commission on Human Rights for misleading a Senate committee during recent testimony while lobbying on behalf of a religious organization in opposition to legislation directly relating to the commission’s duties.

All 10 Democratic senators signed the April 3 letter to Parson asking him to immediately remove Timothy Faber from the commission, which investigates complaints of illegal discrimination in housing, employment and places of public accommodation. Parson, a Republican, appointed Faber to the commission in 2021.

On March 29, Faber testified before the Senate General Laws Committee against a bill to amend the Missouri Human Rights Act to prohibit discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity. The law currently is limited to barring discrimination because of race, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex or age. During his testimony, Faber identified himself only as a lobbyist for the Missouri Baptist Convention and didn’t disclose his role as commission chairman until pressed by committee members.

“His attempt to obfuscate his position erodes the trust legislators require from members of Missouri’s boards and commissions,” the Democratic senators said in their letter. “This is especially troubling considering Mr. Faber specifically referenced the commission without disclosing his role on it. While Mr. Faber has a right to express his personal views or the views of other organizations with which he may be affiliated, his decision to place these roles before his duties as chairman makes it clear he can no longer continue in this capacity.”

During his testimony, Faber said protecting LGBTQ Missourians from discrimination in housing, employment and public accommodations would violate the religious liberty of those morally opposed to homosexuality. He repeated that sentiment in a subsequent interview with the St. Louis Post-Dispatch, in which he also claimed he had no intent to deceive by not identifying himself as chairman of the human rights commission.

“When we begin looking at such things as sexual orientation and gender identity, it is going to inevitably create conflict with religious liberty,” Farber told the paper. “Religious liberty is a constitutional right. Sexual orientation and gender identity are not constitutional rights.”

Faber’s questionable ability to fairly hear complaints before the commission is at the moment something of a moot point since the panel hasn’t been able to function for months due to the lack of a quorum. Although the commission is supposed to have 11 members, only four of those positions currently are filled since Parson hasn’t made appointments to the remaining seven spots.
---
|
---
| **House GOP approves new measures on initiative petition process**
On a straight party-line vote of 109-49, the Republican-controlled House of Representatives sent legislation to the Senate on April 6 imposing a wide range of procedural restrictions on the initiative petition process. However, the changes appear to violate decades of Missouri Supreme Court precedent prohibiting laws that “interfere or impede” the constitutional right to the initiative or attempt to thwart it with “technical formalities.”

The initiative process, which has been enshrined in the Missouri Constitution for more than a century, allows Missourians to bypass the General Assembly to propose legislation and place it directly on the statewide ballot for voter approval. Republicans have prioritized making the process more difficult after voters in recent years have passed several initiatives promoting issues the GOP opposes.

House Bill 703 seeks to impose a number of new technical requirements, including dictating the font type and size on petitions, specifying the shade of ink used for signatures and limiting who can circulate petitions. The bill also purports to require signatures to be thrown out in the event a court rewrites a petition’s ballot title, even though a 1978 Supreme Court ruling holds that a ballot title isn’t constitutionally required to circulate a petition.
---
|
---

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9b36e9209a&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

clean_body: Sen. Roberts' senior tax freeze passes Senate, heads to House | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 7, 2023 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Sen. Roberts' senior tax freeze passes Senate, heads to House JEFFERSON CITY — The Missouri Senate has passed SJR 21, which allows counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens. The following is a statement from Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis: “Rapidly rising rents and home value prices have been an overwhelming burden for senior residents who have lived in their homes for decades, worked hard their entire lives, and now find themselves going through economic hardships because their limited incomes do not allow them to keep up with skyrocketing property taxes. This legislation seeks to make it so that the people in my district and across the state who should be enjoying the fruits of their efforts to improve their community may do so.” SJR 21 passed the Missouri Senate last year with overwhelming bipartisan support. It would allow a county to exempt taxpayers sixty-five years or older from increases in the assessed value of their property. The bill now heads to the Missouri House of Representatives. | | Senate Democrats push to oust human rights commissioner Senate Democrats are urging Gov. Mike Parson to fire the chairman of the Missouri Commission on Human Rights for misleading a Senate committee during recent testimony while lobbying on behalf of a religious organization in opposition to legislation directly relating to the commission’s duties. All 10 Democratic senators signed the April 3 letter to Parson asking him to immediately remove Timothy Faber from the commission, which investigates complaints of illegal discrimination in housing, employment and places of public accommodation. Parson, a Republican, appointed Faber to the commission in 2021. On March 29, Faber testified before the Senate General Laws Committee against a bill to amend the Missouri Human Rights Act to prohibit discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity. The law currently is limited to barring discrimination because of race, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex or age. During his testimony, Faber identified himself only as a lobbyist for the Missouri Baptist Convention and didn’t disclose his role as commission chairman until pressed by committee members. “His attempt to obfuscate his position erodes the trust legislators require from members of Missouri’s boards and commissions,” the Democratic senators said in their letter. “This is especially troubling considering Mr. Faber specifically referenced the commission without disclosing his role on it. While Mr. Faber has a right to express his personal views or the views of other organizations with which he may be affiliated, his decision to place these roles before his duties as chairman makes it clear he can no longer continue in this capacity.” During his testimony, Faber said protecting LGBTQ Missourians from discrimination in housing, employment and public accommodations would violate the religious liberty of those morally opposed to homosexuality. He repeated that sentiment in a subsequent interview with the St. Louis Post-Dispatch, in which he also claimed he had no intent to deceive by not identifying himself as chairman of the human rights commission. “When we begin looking at such things as sexual orientation and gender identity, it is going to inevitably create conflict with religious liberty,” Farber told the paper. “Religious liberty is a constitutional right. Sexual orientation and gender identity are not constitutional rights.” Faber’s questionable ability to fairly hear complaints before the commission is at the moment something of a moot point since the panel hasn’t been able to function for months due to the lack of a quorum. Although the commission is supposed to have 11 members, only four of those positions currently are filled since Parson hasn’t made appointments to the remaining seven spots. | | House GOP approves new measures on initiative petition process On a straight party-line vote of 109-49, the Republican-controlled House of Representatives sent legislation to the Senate on April 6 imposing a wide range of procedural restrictions on the initiative petition process. However, the changes appear to violate decades of Missouri Supreme Court precedent prohibiting laws that “interfere or impede” the constitutional right to the initiative or attempt to thwart it with “technical formalities.” The initiative process, which has been enshrined in the Missouri Constitution for more than a century, allows Missourians to bypass the General Assembly to propose legislation and place it directly on the statewide ballot for voter approval. Republicans have prioritized making the process more difficult after voters in recent years have passed several initiatives promoting issues the GOP opposes. House Bill 703 seeks to impose a number of new technical requirements, including dictating the font type and size on petitions, specifying the shade of ink used for signatures and limiting who can circulate petitions. The bill also purports to require signatures to be thrown out in the event a court rewrites a petition’s ballot title, even though a 1978 Supreme Court ruling holds that a ballot title isn’t constitutionally required to circulate a petition. | | 2023 SENATE BILLS \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. subject: This latest move from the GOP is an outrage, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|

**_Washington Post:_ “Tennessee vote marks latest GOP move to stifle dissent, experts say”

_POLITICO:_ “The move by Republicans is remarkable for its naked partisanship and the speed with which it was executed.”**

[**_Support the NDRC as we fight for fairness nationwide >_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61470216/400169347/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230407_FR_4Q_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5OGY1MWQyLTk1ZDUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oxy3VmmH7Tl8UNw1_Io2Vie8X3pMoSZYWoGHKoh6O1E=) The latest news out of Tennessee is an outrage. **_First_ ,** in 2022, Tennessee Republicans passed blatantly gerrymandered maps that Attorney General Eric Holder called **“an obvious attempt to deliver illegitimate political power to the Republican Party for the next decade.”**

**_Then_ ,** last week, in the wake of a horrific school shooting in Nashville, protestors called on Republican legislators to pass common sense gun reform, including universal background checks supported by 70% of Tennessee parents.

**_Now_ ,** instead of listening to voters’ voices, Tennessee Republicans have _expelled_ two Black legislators while continuing to ignore the will of the people. This move is unprecedented in Tennessee’s history and a clear attempt to stifle dissent. **But according to _POLITICO_ , it could be “a glimpse of the future” as Republicans develop new tactics to usurp the will of the people.

AG Holder summed it up bluntly: “Without gerrymandering there would be no expulsions.”**

But at the NDRC, we know the Republican strategy of being a minority party with majority power is shortsighted. As Justin Jones, one of the expelled lawmakers, told his Republican colleagues: **“Your flexing of false power has awakened a generation of people who will let you know your time is up.”

He’s right, team – and if you agree that time is up for Republicans who seek to undermine our democracy, we need your support today. Will you pitch in now to help the NDRC keep fighting for fairness across the country?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
