clean_body: | Washington Post: “Tennessee vote marks latest GOP move to stifle dissent, experts say” POLITICO: “The move by Republicans is remarkable for its naked partisanship and the speed with which it was executed.” = The latest news out of Tennessee is an outrage. First , in 2022, Tennessee Republicans passed blatantly gerrymandered maps that Attorney General Eric Holder called “an obvious attempt to deliver illegitimate political power to the Republican Party for the next decade.” Then , last week, in the wake of a horrific school shooting in Nashville, protestors called on Republican legislators to pass common sense gun reform, including universal background checks supported by 70% of Tennessee parents. Now , instead of listening to voters’ voices, Tennessee Republicans have expelled two Black legislators while continuing to ignore the will of the people. This move is unprecedented in Tennessee’s history and a clear attempt to stifle dissent. But according to POLITICO , it could be “a glimpse of the future” as Republicans develop new tactics to usurp the will of the people. AG Holder summed it up bluntly: “Without gerrymandering there would be no expulsions.” But at the NDRC, we know the Republican strategy of being a minority party with majority power is shortsighted. As Justin Jones, one of the expelled lawmakers, told his Republican colleagues: “Your flexing of false power has awakened a generation of people who will let you know your time is up.” He’s right, team – and if you agree that time is up for Republicans who seek to undermine our democracy, we need your support today. Will you pitch in now to help the NDRC keep fighting for fairness across the country? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. body:
| | |
---

Peter, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**take my April 2023 Priorities Survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61470592/400170817/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1044-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMjc5ZS05OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yV2aw2ERf8oF6y-P2mw3AgiJ03XYs2h5p8xu-0kkyZI=&emci=7ff9ef7c-6cd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=90a0279e-98d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504) – but first, I wanted to explain why I value your opinion so much.

I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege. While New York’s elites catered directly to the powerful and wealthy, families like my own in Brooklyn were left out of any and all decisions.

So, when this team made history in 2018 by helping me become the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way.

I created my priorities survey to connect with my base and give folks like you a platform to use your voice – **but it looks like you STILL haven’t updated your priorities with my team.**

[**Please, Peter: Will you take my priorities survey now so I can fight for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61470593/400170818/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1044-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMjc5ZS05OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yV2aw2ERf8oF6y-P2mw3AgiJ03XYs2h5p8xu-0kkyZI=&emci=7ff9ef7c-6cd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=90a0279e-98d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
---
_Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard._
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61470594/400170819/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1044-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMjc5ZS05OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yV2aw2ERf8oF6y-P2mw3AgiJ03XYs2h5p8xu-0kkyZI=&emci=7ff9ef7c-6cd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=90a0279e-98d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

I’ll be honest: Our fight for progress is nowhere near complete. Right now, millions of people are still without reproductive freedom, the housing crisis is continuing to sprawl out of control, and the gun violence epidemic is still claiming innocent lives of all ages.

**With the fundamental rights of millions being attacked from all sides, it is _vital_ that I know what matters most to supporters like you, Peter. That’s why I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to complete my priorities survey so I know which fights are most important to the people I represent in this new political landscape.

[Please, so that I can fight for you, will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61470595/400170820/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1044-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMjc5ZS05OGQ1LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yV2aw2ERf8oF6y-P2mw3AgiJ03XYs2h5p8xu-0kkyZI=&emci=7ff9ef7c-6cd5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=90a0279e-98d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

name: Grassroots Opinions (via DLCC)
subject: re: SCOTUS ethical code
body:
Congress members AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable... | | |
---
| | It’s clear that the Supreme Court is no longer an impartial, fair branch of government. For over 20 years, Justice Thomas has accepted luxury trips nearly every year from Harlan Crowe, a GOP mega-donor – never disclosing them. But that’s not all: Reporting from _The Washington Post_ recently revealed that Clarence Thomas’s wife, Ginni Thomas, collected over half a million dollars to fund a right-wing activist group while she spread the Big Lie. Not to mention that the Supreme Court bowed down to right-wing pressure campaigns to reverse _Roe v. Wade_ – instead of upholding legal precedent. Members of Congress AND the American Bar Association are calling for a code of ethics for Supreme Court Justices so they can be held accountable for conflicts of interest. It’s time we make sure that our justices decide cases for us – not special interest groups. [_**So, what do you think? Take our poll now to share with us if you support a code of ethics for the highest justices in the land >>**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmQx-0VksT-d2P-V5LsslJIfqrRUif81jqDNr4WghvBh9_MZyldot8g4wRAFUrIgwD365_sDrFyZG-0YQcy9XrtIaTrsP8fJm-IEZnuEkQ9-NnFuxRt7EIPV5RMs-biYNjP2LmKsJOnDoGhql8Y6E7PjA-qZ8PSetzKhjd2M3Xj_IfFhRKk_V2XUmC6QG6qYeHc4_MFLuohEmoTWStjO2wzJydq1BhTb6NhnPeyvejAVN0XnY4lf7gCuuW9nVcv0LMKR0TxcqxP1uYZETM8z-12QPHgGtcBWJi3E-nMMhO2g5/3v5/KlMalKSjQPaj3mD3udxFsw/h0/VSsPcKfJmetPUC2JItyzgBub_FU1v83w6EdYFw5B7FA) | **Do you support a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices?**

Yes
No
Unsure
**[Answer now →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmQx-0VksT-d2P-V5LsslJIfqrRUif81jqDNr4WghvBh9_MZyldot8g4wRAFUrIgwD365_sDrFyZG-0YQcy9XrtIaTrsP8fJm-IEZnuEkQ9-NH3760sqSMPud7NH_xCM2KgDjytQ-U_sPso0g0svV5PgHsMKSWUfBFaeK4gJObEGsGj6o7aq-em19i7ufZsaf15A3ChjKBzM7WiPZUtoYpEp6bX986GIDBeOqSS6QY40wb0kw8jHS8X26faGVLGy0cuKyctBtYkceqcJ3nkBdUwM/3v5/KlMalKSjQPaj3mD3udxFsw/h1/XpgjTbQWYZN9pCh6Zi4zO6_fdmkleUqGx0eBp7B4qTI)**
---
The other two branches of the federal government have ethical standards they must adhere to – the Supreme Court should too.
Our nine justices serve for _life_ – giving them a lot of power for a long time in determining the rights and freedoms of Americans. That’s why it’s imperative that we trust them to adhere to the Constitution and put the laws of this country first.
Anyone making legal decisions that affect hundreds of millions of people should never have a conflict of interest, and that’s why Congress is considering a law that would create a code of ethics for Supreme Court justices.
**But before it makes its way through the legislature, we at the DLCC want to get an accurate read on what our grassroots supporters think about instituting this code.** [_**What do you say – can you answer our poll?**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZFbbg9F02kk7hrszsXJHqV9LtDlWjIo0UfJOePhn1rmQx-0VksT-d2P-V5LsslJIfqrRUif81jqDNr4WghvBh9_MZyldot8g4wRAFUrIgwD365_sDrFyZG-0YQcy9XrtIaTrsP8fJm-IEZnuEkQ9-NnFuxRt7EIPV5RMs-biYNjIFzZghbmVIaybqXHeFg6Dm4pYxRJEynnkVgbaVJsJlCz1u-kTQyBKKVoOpog40H1FtQ5M7NghLg3ijMuEqGabF4q_RWgK82094n3PBVqpj6OQ32Wm1ECZqfVsEvSsSaEQ204mP7KjBhx4rBJKRKKqgoPaE0p4471wjT7u5u2xXT/3v5/KlMalKSjQPaj3mD3udxFsw/h2/bLgIGCVJb5qnr7ooNxT0oAqVV6bzvivj8-I45CDVfZ0)
